name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: How can I be hopeful?
body:
If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTM2MjUwNzYS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjQ0MDA4NjA3MQS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |
---
| | |
* * *
---
| | I’ll admit that it doesn’t always make sense to me, but I have a deep feeling of optimism about the power that people still have to protect our future. Not because I think things are going well, far from it. The current administration has shown no restraint from its darkest urges, and has no compunction about assuming power to make its dreams — and my nightmares — come true.
---
| | I have hope because I see that this administration is flailing, partly because people are taking action and showing Trump and his MAGA cronies that we won’t sit idly by while they destroy our communities, democracy, and planet. Every time our movement flips a deeply conservative district, or millions of people take to the streets in a show of community care and power, like at the latest No Kings protests (8 million people showed up!) I feel that hope growing.
---
| | This administration is weak and has no other recourse but to dig deeper into harmful, unpopular policies — from [**overturning the Endangerment Finding**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_), to starting a new war that is raising costs even further and hurting everyday people and the planet, all while making Big Oil CEOs richer. Trump told the country he could end wars with the blink of an eye, would cut energy bills in half, and usher in a wave of prosperity. Yet the only people prospering are him, his family, and his billionaire friends.
---
| | But while this administration tries to wear us down, LCV and our partners in the Conservation Voters Movement are making progress for people, our planet, and democracy — whether that’s [**_Indiana Conservation Voters defeating Trump's redistricting power grab_**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/8wqzCjYGXpHX/MUwxbEc5bWtKU0FkbllzejhUVk5sYXpOUjU5MVVlK0JGYnJ2ZzBMNzl6bzJwWkpIcVNkTDhhZS9YdTlPbitNRmt1RVRINmIweVNXT3VwaFl5bjlDK09VOEI2ZDlXbk5PSVFmd3M5czZXcm89S0/), or our work with the [**Energy Bills Relief Act**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/KybpT-_XN2f_) to make energy cleaner and more affordable for American families. We are focused on the wins our movement needs this November.
---
| | I see the signs of victory ahead. We’re ready to move past Trump so we can keep our air and water clean and protect our public lands, which in turn keeps our communities, and the most vulnerable among us, healthy and safe. We’re ready to show this administration — through a strong democratic process — what it looks like to make America truly great.
---
| | I’m privileged to have a front row seat to all LCV’s work. It helps keep me going when the bad news is in full swing. So if you or your friends are needing a bit of hope, too, the best advice I can give is to join this movement.
---
| | Best,
---
| | Chris BrooksVice President, Membership
League of Conservation Voters
---
| | | [ SUPPORT LCV ](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/x_yzTgrKe~)
---
| | |
* * *
---
| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,[ _update your contact information_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13625076&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjQ0MDA4NjA3MQS2&spReportId=MjQ0MDA4NjA3MQS2) _._ [_Click here to unsubscribe_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13625076&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjQ0MDA4NjA3MQS2&spReportId=MjQ0MDA4NjA3MQS2) from our supporter list. [_Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here_](mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=) , or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.
**740 15th St NW, Suite 700**
**Washington, DC 20005**
**202-785-8683**
---
| | | [ DONATE ](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_4bqMEY9-)
---
|
* * *
---

name: Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: No more time to waste
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260410-486&t=1&akid=486%2E12592%2E9EkIwP)
We’ll be straightforward: **We are running out of time.**
[****](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260410_2.mcDGa-&amount=3&refcode=20260410-486&t=2&akid=486%2E12592%2E9EkIwP)
Early voting is already happening, and Election Day is just 11 days away on April 21. There’s no way around it, what we do right now will decide the outcome.
That’s why we’re making this Saturday, **Super Saturday** , our biggest push yet.
**➡️ Hundreds of volunteers.**
**➡️ Thousands of doors.**
**➡️ Conversations happening across the Commonwealth all at once.**
We’re going to pass the YES campaign for redistricting in Virginia by getting out in the Commonwealth and reaching voters where they’re at.
[**But we need the resources to keep this going through the final days****. Can we call on you to donate $3 right now to support our Super Saturday Fund and help power this effort?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260410_2.mcDGa-&amount=3&refcode=20260410-486&t=3&akid=486%2E12592%2E9EkIwP) _We’re 87% of the way to meeting our $20,000 goal and we can’t afford to slow down now._
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260410_2.mcDGa-&amount=3&refcode=20260410-486&t=22&akid=486%2E12592%2E9EkIwP)**
We’ve come too far to fall short now, let’s finish this together.
Onwards,
Virginians For Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=23&refcode2=486_12592_9EkIwP&akid=486%2E12592%2E9EkIwP)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=486%2E12592%2E9EkIwP)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/update-contact-information/?&t=25&akid=486%2E12592%2E9EkIwP)
* [Unsubscribe](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=486%2E12592%2E9EkIwP)

Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
Contributions or gifts to Virginians for Fair Elections are not tax deductible.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: What a win here could mean
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund and authorized by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Only with your support can I win this race and make it to the U.S. Senate to fight for you and your family.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=1004%2E124072%2Ec1OvDl)
| | | |
---
Peter,

There’s a lot of chatter from political pundits and election analysts about all of the things Democrats need to do to win big this November. It can be dizzying.
There’s one thing they can all agree on: North Carolina is the most important Senate race this year. Winning here could mean flipping the Senate for Democrats.
I’m ready to win this fight to flip the U.S. Senate – and when I do, **we could have 51 votes to fight for the issues Republicans are ignoring and outright attacking.**
51 votes to expand health care – like I did as Governor of North Carolina – not strip it away to fund forever wars abroad.
51 votes to strengthen voting rights and protect our democracy.
51 votes to lower costs for working families, not cut taxes for billionaires.
Peter, I’m a lifelong North Carolinian, a former Sunday school teacher and a two-term Governor who has always tried to put the folks I’ve served first. I know we can win this fight.
**Republicans are coming after me with everything they’ve got – recently announcing an eight-figure ad buy to defeat me – and now a recent poll shows this race statistically tied. I need your help today to surge ahead.[Will you chip in $5 to help me flip North Carolina blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8617?t=8&akid=1004%2E124072%2Ec1OvDl)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8618?t=9&akid=1004%2E124072%2Ec1OvDl)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8619?t=10&akid=1004%2E124072%2Ec1OvDl)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8620?t=11&akid=1004%2E124072%2Ec1OvDl)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8621?t=12&akid=1004%2E124072%2Ec1OvDl)
---
Thank you for everything.

Roy Cooper
| |
* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=1004%2E124072%2Ec1OvDl)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**_[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=3&akid=1004%2E124072%2Ec1OvDl)_**
| | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6297?source=&t=4&akid=1004%2E124072%2Ec1OvDl)
---
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6298?source=&t=5&akid=1004%2E124072%2Ec1OvDl)
---
| | [SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=6&akid=1004%2E124072%2Ec1OvDl)
---
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=7&akid=1004%2E124072%2Ec1OvDl)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund and authorized by Cooper for North Carolina.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1004%2E124072%2Ec1OvDl)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=13&akid=1004%2E124072%2Ec1OvDl)

name: Invoke the 25th (via VPP)
subject: We haven’t heard back from you…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Our window to remove Trump is closing!
| **Our window to REMOVE Donald Trump from office is closing!**

More than 70 Democratic lawmakers and HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS of Americans are demanding Trump’s removal — but you’re not one of them!

[Our records show you haven’t responded to our urgent petition, so we’re giving you one last chance to sign before it’s too late »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment?source=VPP_20260410_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=6&akid=23604%2E878179%2EQPGHYm) | [ADD MY NAME: REMOVE TRUMP UNDER THE 25TH AMENDMENT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment?source=VPP_20260410_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=7&akid=23604%2E878179%2EQPGHYm)
---
Thank you,

The Voter Protection Project
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
**This is unprecedented!!**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment?source=VPP_20260410_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=8&akid=23604%2E878179%2EQPGHYm)
Trump is going off the rails and _everyone_ can see it.

Dozens of House Democrats are _calling for the 25th Amendment to be invoked._ Now everyone from **esteemed organizations like the NAACP** to **former MAGA-diehards like Marjorie Taylor-Greene** are joining in.
**EMERGENCY PETITION!**
---
| [DEMAND THE 25TH AMENDMENT BE INVOKED! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment?source=VPP_20260410_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=9&akid=23604%2E878179%2EQPGHYm)
---
**— 3,000 Signatures Needed —**
**We need to act _NOW_ before our window of opportunity closes!**

Trump is DESTROYING America’s prosperity, reputation, and democracy, but we have a new chance to stop him. [Will you add your support?? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment?source=VPP_20260410_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=10&akid=23604%2E878179%2EQPGHYm)
**EMERGENCY PETITION!**
---
| [DEMAND THE 25TH AMENDMENT BE INVOKED! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment?source=VPP_20260410_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=11&akid=23604%2E878179%2EQPGHYm)
---
**— 3,000 Signatures Needed —**
Thank you,

— The Voter Protection Project
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=23604%2E878179%2EQPGHYm). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=23604%2E878179%2EQPGHYm).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=23604%2E878179%2EQPGHYm) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=23604%2E878179%2EQPGHYm). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=23604%2E878179%2EQPGHYm)
---

name: Eileen Laubacher
subject: a humble, but urgent, request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eileen for Colorado
body:

clean_body: | | | | Peter, While I was sitting in the back of the Presidential Motorcade, I put together something VERY IMPORTANT that needs your signature right away. I put together an official Trump petition to put maximum pressure on the Senate to pass the SAVE America Act without further delay. Midterms are on the line. The MAGA majority is on the line. All future Trump Executive Orders are on the line. AMERICA IS ON THE LINE. I’m asking you to do a favor for me — will you sign my petition to mandate Voter ID NOW ? | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. All contributions are subject to the limits and prohibitions of the Federal Election Campaign Act. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (i.e., without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are strictly prohibited. Contributions made in the name of, or refunded by, any other person are unlawful. | Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc., P.O. Box 509, Arlington, VA 22216. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate’s Committee.

During his powerful remarks in Corpus Christi, he introduced me to the crowd and said these words that **still give me chills:** _**"A phenomenal friend and a phenomenal Congressman. Thank you for the great job."**_ Coming straight from the man who put America First, crushed the radical left, and delivered for America – that meant the world to me. **Now I want to thank President Trump by showing him how GRATEFUL We The People are for having him as our President.** I'm sending President Trump a personal thank you card to say thanks for his endorsement, his friendship, and his unbreakable leadership. **But I want it signed by YOU – the patriots who make this fight possible.** [**Will you sign my Trump Thank You Card and add a short message I can pass along to him?**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/w9a6Zn9hsnc9ecIjlOJlBpZTjQDRn-kSDVVCvmbdJN82vTxZFwZ5V-OCSCSkEnrO9L2NdnPX7KgxKPFtFnRt3ZJD5wTxlWsuwfbKl2orf323NbqYcC8wnrC3c1v1iVfzgAI6VvI5EJQssJkP1BVR4Zc8DspoxSZI3tQ4UfBnm3mAddwRFm5Pez2jqpHfco60boE7KSzGKi3kgwbIXavSXcaFlpMkqpy3lc-XF2X2qEoHnuvd4XxWmfan2g7lLlPBhWatzI5bEETDHX_ILR3Gxc6VruBzPOoIjpaXVxyk68WGlYh7JzYdrz1p6c25MchECwFp-jXIg7upWeRo4-3XC8YC6BbsXx6fvONn1W70TaKeZRksYtyLJJmcOgHAQPOd596m-i9EAuD7z6gzKMKIXma-aYtpugoYJVUktr_oowiiva_nDZk8589IKBdjQIddBR36T8BoNXVoS2POg4Al8Qt6Z_dlIeruBfLWyKuxyNiHbJUN6ew8y7RBI8pw4fHMGJZe1gCguC_i-bTtfqNnefAN_eRhni55_lgfnv6Q34_WoGC97YQRRg9g8QixBz4q7jlumHFnkVgQuQ2N9VrIsQs_Fx0hG-RbYTV333Yx9p9YexS25JI8BbsYKuxY4yvbUq0jbxh9X24PUXg_Vpqu9MOtAD_nfzkmbsB-WzsPa0I9tmLAxPypFjYiuDxMPiRaEcyk-1jUJep3MzU8P4rjAE3EwNbPfgPNufqtQQWLBZSd5YD2JZLDZ6qY4qEbL5tKzA4BYWlXIhjYGpKQNHZcrgCAGNpRSZeU-nVA1LS8krDHITVE12qwuvuKHraz5kwiu2ssSAc14AxErXB_TamxWI0lSz_mE5s5dAf12xE8cSIJgrcM6CK-6qXPrabsV0Z5N7sXi3h544rMDrDUTCmDPWfJ52z70uODFylwNSihEmkJqB9BCW-EzY_XTy2QZrWN3KHE2jwtF4NdTiUSDR4KW6FUfIMvIeLHRoi-6lTd8PHyzGOA56b2qXzLbYYqMk53DEE0LxMvSkoPZB3xTNMxyxyYDpNbzrRKRrciUp1PtuOmzDUSokS0a0GDueY8CXUsqGzHWCAzFDaYaKAGnrnPNyUlb9_onGVNu_qO/f34Rx05lfEVwvh6g1wZi3uMPGzEMGtFJ/19)

clean_body: | | | Peter, President Trump just gave me one of the biggest honors of my life. During his powerful remarks in Corpus Christi, he introduced me to the crowd and said these words that still give me chills: "A phenomenal friend and a phenomenal Congressman. Thank you for the great job." Coming straight from the man who put America First, crushed the radical left, and delivered for America – that meant the world to me. Now I want to thank President Trump by showing him how GRATEFUL We The People are for having him as our President. I'm sending President Trump a personal thank you card to say thanks for his endorsement, his friendship, and his unbreakable leadership. But I want it signed by YOU – the patriots who make this fight possible. | | With honor, Michael Cloud United States Congress (R-TX) | | | | Paid for by Cloud for Congress | | P.O. Box 7027 Victoria, TX 77903 | |

name: Roger, me, Team DNC (2)
subject: making sure you saw Roger's message, Derek
body:
---
Derek, We wanted to make sure you saw this time-sensitive update from the DNC’s executive director. **Here are the toplines:** Democrats need to net **FOUR** Senate seats and **THREE** House seats to take back Congress this November, but the resources required to secure these wins are hefty. **So, Derek, if you can pitch in today, here is a personalized link:**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?refcode=em_20260410_6662_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6662_22930333_Tbzyhu&akid=6662%2E22930333%2ETbzyhu) [**Rush $7 or any amount that’s meaningful to you to help us have a strong showing on our next FEC report.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?refcode=em_20260410_6662_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6662_22930333_Tbzyhu&akid=6662%2E22930333%2ETbzyhu) **[DONATE $7 NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?refcode=em_20260410_6662_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6662_22930333_Tbzyhu&akid=6662%2E22930333%2ETbzyhu)** Thank you, Team DNC \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Roger Lau, Executive Director @ DNC** <feedback@act.democrats.org>
Date: Mon, Apr 6, 2026
Subject: A quick update for Derek from the Executive Director of the DNC | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260410_6662_fr&refcode2=6662_22930333_Tbzyhu&akid=6662%2E22930333%2ETbzyhu)
---
Derek,
As the DNC’s Executive Director, it’s my job to guide our Party’s long-term strategy.
So, as we look ahead to the midterms, here’s a quick update for you:
Democrats need to flip **four** Republican seats to take control of the Senate this November. That means winning races in states like Texas, North Carolina, Ohio, and Alaska. To take back the House, we need to hold the seats we have and flip at least three more.
**This operation is going to take a _massive_ amount of resources. Trust me, our team is crunching the numbers every day.**
But we also know how to win tough races. That’s why at the DNC, we’re making unprecedented investments in voter registration and state parties. And we’re working to reach voters who may have sat out previous elections.
We’re doing everything we can to make sure we take back Congress — but to make sure we’re on track to win, we have to meet our fundraising goals. Unfortunately, we’re not quite on track right now.
[**So, Derek, I’m personally asking: Can you rush a $7 donation to the DNC today to help us meet our critical goals? Your contribution will help ensure that Democrats in key races have the resources they need to win this November.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?refcode=em_20260410_6662_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6662_22930333_Tbzyhu&akid=6662%2E22930333%2ETbzyhu)

name: James Carville
subject: It’s all Ohio, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
#
It’s James Carville. I need you to listen up because I’m only going to say this ONCE:
**Our path to the Senate goes STRAIGHT through Ohio.**
Okay, who am I kidding? I’m going to tell you that about a hundred more times between now and election day. Hell, I might even say it a hundred more times this WEEK. But if that’s what it takes to get you off the sidelines to help Sherrod Brown win this race, then I ain’t shutting up.
**[I know some of you are already fired up to help out – if that’s you, I need you to split a $5 donation between Sherrod’s campaign and State Democrats Committee RIGHT NOW before I say more. For everyone else, let me tell you a bit more about what we’re up against.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102666?refcode=em20260410-10291&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=1&akid=10291%2E614464%2EhxzRo4)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102667?refcode=em20260410-10291&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=10291%2E614464%2EhxzRo4) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102667?refcode=em20260410-10291&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=3&akid=10291%2E614464%2EhxzRo4) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102667?refcode=em20260410-10291&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=10291%2E614464%2EhxzRo4) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102667?refcode=em20260410-10291&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=10291%2E614464%2EhxzRo4) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102667?refcode=em20260410-10291&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=10291%2E614464%2EhxzRo4) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102667?refcode=em20260410-10291&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=10291%2E614464%2EhxzRo4) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102666?refcode=em20260410-10291&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=10291%2E614464%2EhxzRo4)
---
Folks, I’ve had it up to HERE with Jon Husted and his buddies in the Senate majority. They clearly only care about one thing and one thing only: keeping their lobbyist friends happy and their campaign coffers overflowing. Meanwhile, families across the country are footing the bill.
We urgently need real fighters – not these spineless suits who roll over every time some special interest donor waves a checkbook in their face. That’s why we need to elect Sherrod Brown. He’s devoted his career to serving Ohio, and he’s not afraid to stand up to the powerful to do what’s right.
But we have a problem. National Republicans will do whatever they can to hold onto their majority, and that means they’re going to spend UNIMAGINABLE amounts of money in Ohio to keep this seat. They shattered spending records going after Sherrod last time, and they're already gearing up to spend even more this cycle. We're talking an absolute tsunami of attack ads.
**That’s why we need to help Sherrod hit every single goal every step of the way, starting with his daily deadline TONIGHT.[Can you make a $5 split donation RIGHT NOW to help Sherrod win this battleground race?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102666?refcode=em20260410-10291&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=9&akid=10291%2E614464%2EhxzRo4)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102666?refcode=em20260410-10291&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=10291%2E614464%2EhxzRo4)**
If we can win in Ohio, we can win the Senate too. It’s that simple. Let’s go win this thing.
James Carville

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=11&akid=10291%2E614464%2EhxzRo4).

_Let me share a few reasons why this time will be different:_

Because of my skin color, Nancy Pelosi, Gretchen Whitmer, and radical leftists think I should be a Democrat. Shame on them. I served in our military as an Apache Helicopter Pilot and was deployed during Operation Iraqi Freedom. I put my life on the line to protect everyone - Republican and Democrat alike. And now, I’m being told who and who not to vote for? I don’t think so. I announced my candidacy for Governor of Michigan because for too long, one of America’s TOP Battleground States has been run by woke career politicians. I’m the guy to change that. But not alone. I won’t let their intimidation tactics work. I’m a proud veteran, dad, and black conservative running to deliver results for our country. body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41125%2E3422442%2Eu9plZh)
Peter,
Our filing deadline is **one week away**. When it closes, the number we put out will be public for everyone to see.
This number isn’t just math— _it’s proof that Californians are standing with Katie._ Our campaign is fueled by people like you, not special interests or billionaires’ bank accounts.
Unlike her opponents, Katie doesn’t take corporate money. She doesn’t cash six-figure checks, and she doesn’t rely on her own wallet.
She’s living the same struggles as millions of Californians. She’s a single mom who clips coupons, figuring out how to make it all work.
Katie is fighting for what working families deserve: **single-payer health care, no income tax for those earning under $100k, less expensive housing, and free child care** so parents don’t have to choose between their kids and their jobs.
If Katie is going to win, we need to show just how many Californians are behind her by April 18th—to drive momentum, convince voters, and prove that a people-powered campaign can beat big money.
**[Will you chip in $5 today to put out the strongest number possible and show that California is ready for a governor who fights for working people, not billionaires?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260410_2_ak.lSGzdt&refcode=em20260410-41125&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41125%2E3422442%2Eu9plZh)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260410_2_ak.lSGzdt&refcode=em20260410-41125&t=22&akid=41125%2E3422442%2Eu9plZh)
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260410-41125&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=41125_3422442_u9plZh&akid=41125%2E3422442%2Eu9plZh)**

name: Letitia James
subject: This is a revenge campaign — and I need your help to fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
I will not be intimidated.
| Folks, Donald Trump and his political enablers in his administration are coming after me — _again._

The Trump administration just filed “new” criminal referrals to the Department of Justice targeting me, but there’s nothing new about them. They’re the same baseless allegations that courts and grand juries have already rejected.

You can probably guess why, friends. **_Because I did my job — and won._**

I took on Donald Trump and held him accountable for defrauding the people of New York.

Now, he’s escalating his revenge campaign, abusing his power and weaponizing our justice system for political retribution.

**I will not be intimidated. I will never give in to bullies. And I will never back down from holding the president accountable.**

My oath is to justice and to the people I serve. I intend to continue defending the rule of law and protecting New Yorkers, no matter how rich or powerful the opposition may be. That’s why I’m running for reelection as Attorney General of New York.

[Friend, I need your immediate support to keep fighting back against Donald Trump’s revenge campaign. If I can count on you, will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project right now?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106435?t=6&akid=23565%2E878179%2EE2PSgH) | [RUSH A DONATION »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106440?t=7&akid=23565%2E878179%2EE2PSgH)

Letitia James

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=23565%2E878179%2EE2PSgH). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=23565%2E878179%2EE2PSgH).**

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Colorado Removes 372,000 Inactive Voters from its Rolls after Lawsuit
body:
School District Where Illegal Alien Sexually Assaulted Girls Lawyers
Up

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR SEARCH WARRANTS IN RUDY GIULIANI RAID

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=37560&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9fUTlQaGczTDU4MD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=8e78f33a12ede9ea28bf8f603176866478364ef9b6af4dbe60a92371b14badfd]

On April 28, 2021, at approximately 6 a.m., federal agents executed
search warrants
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=37537&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjEvMDQvMjgvZmVkZXJhbC1hZ2VudHMtcmFpZC1ydWR5LWdpdWxpYW5pcy1ueWMtYXBhcnRtZW50Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=1811f5d3d8f074a5f6fd0da77288e265d674ce7edee08761a2b5f59ba0d7ef2b]
at former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani’s Manhattan apartment
and his office, seizing his cellphone and other electronic devices.
Agents reportedly seized additional materials, including a computer
used by long-time assistant Jo Ann Zafonte.

Giuliani served as a personal attorney and informal adviser to
President Donald Trump.

Judicial Watch filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=37536&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWdpdWxpYW5pLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMTE1OC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=76815f3a995891fa2bf3bbb98b7d7cb0b84b03c1430901f3cc457f53dc2cdc6e]
against the U.S. Department of Justice for records on the Biden
FBI’s search warrants used in the April 2021 raid on Giuliani’s
residence and office (_Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of
Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=37561&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWdpdWxpYW5pLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMTE1OC9dXz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=43e7604896dee6667f3608d818fb09828ad371be158870163d6994a2701c5db0 _(No.
1:26-cv-01158)).

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
the Justice Department failed to respond to a February 2026 FOIA
request. The request, which included a signed certification of
identity from Giuliani himself, seeks all records related to the April
2021 search warrants, including:

* Warrant applications, affidavits, attachments, draft versions, and
approval memoranda;
* Supervisory and Main Justice approvals;
* Attorney search approvals under Justice Manual guidelines;
* Records concerning privilege review, “taint team” procedures,
privilege determinations, and any special master involvement;
* Coordination with the FBI and the U.S. Attorney’s Office for the
Southern District of New York; and
* Emails, memoranda, briefing materials, and other communications
outside formal case files discussing Giuliani, the raids, or the
underlying investigation.

According to public reports, the raid was tied
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=37538&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjEvMDQvMjgvcnVkeS1naXVsaWFuaS1yZXNwb25kcy10by1mZWRzLXJhaWRpbmctaGlzLW55Yy1hcGFydG1lbnQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=8b76632f10c524f135f13542d7e4eae62bab029d9672b9f3f78f3b70e3cdcef8]
to an investigation into whether Giuliani violated
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=37539&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdHNlY3VyaXR5Lm9yZy83NjA3NS9naXVsaWFuaXMtZmFyYS1wcm9ibGVtLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=d7cc07b92dc56360a7c93e5df5747861727c4f829cdf0d34c10b640031c06cab] the
Foreign Agents Registration Act (FARA) in connection with his
activities involving Ukrainian officials while he was seeking
information related to Joe Biden and his son Hunter Biden.

Giuliani’s then-attorney Robert Costello noted
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=37540&F=T&&hash=f7876fd93d7076f076b34bc0469bc1990fd5ee330d8dc5b9147729978afcd97a]
that federal agents ignored Hunter Biden’s computer hard drives when
they raided the apartment, contradicting the order on the warrant
“to seize every electronic device in his home.”

The Biden DOJ’s pre-dawn raid on Rudy Giuliani was a textbook
example of weaponized justice — targeting a loyal advocate of
President Trump’s while agents deliberately ignored Hunter Biden’s
hard drives sitting in the same apartment. This selective enforcement
exposes a corrupt two-tiered system.

Judicial Watch is a national leader in exposing the lawfare and abuse
targeting Trump and other American citizens.

In April 2026, obtained records that reveal the FBI’s concerns about
the legal basis for the 2022 raid of Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home. The
records expose explicit objections from field agents who warned the
Justice Department that the unprecedented raid on Trump’s home
lacked probable cause.

In March 2026, the Justice Department reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=37416&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmJpLXJlY29yZHMtaW4taGlkZGVuLXJvb20vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=5bba4a10a75e210b24271e69bfee1fed3b181009546a8907dbec266454469b13] that the
FBI found about 1.9 million pages of records that are responsive to
our FOIA lawsuit. These documents were reportedly stored in a
“hidden room” at FBI headquarters and were first revealed by
former Deputy Director Dan Bongino (_Judicial Watch v U.S. Department
of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=36534&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWZiaS1oaWRkZW4tcm9vbS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDQwNDcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=93811d0f9f5804a35881ffcdd110866fcc7a9c266fa0c002097c9c7e356675b6]
(No.1:25-cv-04047)).

In March 2026, we sued

COLORADO REMOVES 372,000 INACTIVE VOTERS FROM ITS ROLLS AFTER
LAWSUIT

Following the settlement of our lawsuit addressing Colorado’s
compliance with federal voter list maintenance requirements, the state
has removed 372,000 ineligible voters from registration lists.

Under the National Voter Registration Act of 1993 (NVRA
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=4368&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTAzcmQtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC8yP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=0923439d0da9956dc97059c7401429fd89f8965482b4ab1687b84695fc861158]), states
must take reasonable steps to remove ineligible voters—such as those
who have died, moved, or become inactive—while protecting eligible
voters’ rights.

Judicial Watch filed the Colorado federal lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=20868&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY28tdm90ZXItcm9sbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=d3795f13d4c02a37a92de7846bf28c1a52d25fb9cb093659377090a859a72453] to
clean the voter rolls in 2020 on behalf of ourselves and three
residents of Colorado. (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. Griswold, et al_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=37563&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZ3Jpc3dvbGQtY29tcGxhaW50LTAyOTkyL11fP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=7f09c98cc849c02b3b9501794f1f058eeb0724792a296b286bb62b91e8d3557f. _(No.
20-cv-02992)).

In March 2023, Colorado’s secretary of state agreed to settle
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=29191&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29sb3JhZG8tdG8tc2V0dGxlLWxhd3N1aXQtb3Zlci1pbmVsaWdpYmxlLXZvdGVycy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f7260ef63b15ec87f6d3c20cddc85a268ea7c93313b47b76439fc1861bc9d82c]
the lawsuit and has confirmed to us that since 2023 the state removed
372,000 ineligible voters.

This is a major victory for election integrity and a massive step
toward cleaner elections.

We are a national leader in election integrity and voting rights
litigation, with a record of successful lawsuits
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=35695&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFnL2VsZWN0aW9uK2xhdy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=9397a9e3d745abe0c3f21cda7e7ee80355607c49f190c9e5632b403f671aff4b] enforcing
constitutional redistricting standards and cleaning voter rolls
nationwide.

Our lawsuits and legal actions have now led to the removal
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=35168&F=T&&hash=54a98dc0af766e1e8cc838fce97a5fdf7566055cdbed1702d666a75e847d5956]
of six million ineligible names from voter lists nationwide.

In Kentucky, state election board officials reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=34903&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtYWRhbXMta3ktbnZyYS1jb21wbGlhbmNlLW5vdGljZS0wMDA5NC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=bc0d19050231e9e2e7b38d34efcd9fa4ab74a2999b47431616febf3c8d30105d]
that “roughly 735,000 ineligible voter registrations” have been
removed from voter rolls, as part of a 2018 consent decree settling a
Judicial Watch lawsuit.

As part of its 2022 settlement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=28646&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctYW5kLW55Yy1zZXR0bGUtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f85eb002f4b9dfa8334e25686194139c3301a613cd8d8d197cbaf3272fc1aa08], New York
City alone has removed 918,139 ineligible names from its rolls: data
show 477,056
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=34904&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdmFsZW50aW5lLW55Yy1udnJhLXJlbW92YWxzLTIwMjMtMjAyNS0wMzk1Mi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e75255b60e0d9142650fb9fd77ab73add57a5816b3083f563ddb2f3e405036e4]
removals between March 2023 and February 2025, which is in addition to
the 441,083 previously reported removals.

In Los Angeles, county officials confirmed the removal of more than
1.2 million names from voter rolls as part of a settlement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=28192&F=T&&hash=2fb2f3be3c5dd2f347c4a52ba8f25affac2f48654381bec0cf2c8b2d1f133656].

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=29522&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcGVubnN5bHZhbmlhLXNldHRsZXMtdm90ZXItcm9sbC1sYXdzdWl0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=b33f9b5e5f1a5e111c3a1560505b53cf54fa81004f211534520c105700c0a578],

Federal courts in Oregon
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=35830&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvb3JlZ29uLXZvdGVyLXJvbGwtY2xlYW51cC0yLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=268c968acceaea353e51054ab5449db88b31ac85981eedf6757cf33b6b6d6d45] and

Our election law efforts are led by Senior Attorney Robert Popper, who
previously served in the Voting Section of the Justice Department’s
Civil Rights Division, where he managed voting rights investigations
and litigation across dozens of states.

In March 2026, the Supreme Court of the United States held oral
argument
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=37415&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1hcmd1bWVudC1vbi1tYXJjaC0yMy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=87e58d9275fd7bdd0ab7429e8654c731a5006840db6b8ee01017b047d0316aee] in
a landmark election integrity case over whether the federal Election
Day laws prohibit the counting of mail-in ballots that arrive after
Election Day. We brought the underlying lawsuit on behalf of the
Libertarian Party of Mississippi.

In January 2026, the U.S. Supreme Court decided 7-2
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=36862&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGVtZW50LW9uLXN1cHJlbWUtY291cnQtdmljdG9yeS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=de636c6707638922dd9e766bf7322dceeb9b555f08c46cc6b4e1b808dae9061c] in
favor of granting standing in a historic case we filed on behalf of
Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors who were before
the court to vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law
allowing the counting of ballots received up to 14 days after Election
Day.

JUDICIAL WATCH ELECTION INTEGRITY TEAM TO MONITOR HUNGARY’S
ELECTIONS

An eight-member election-integrity team from Judicial Watch will
monitor the April 12 Hungarian parliamentary elections. The vote will
determine the next government and prime minister.

We sent an election observer team to Hungary for its 2022 election –
independently monitoring voting at 52 precincts across 27 locations in
and around Budapest.

Our team has been certified to serve as international election
observers.

The team is led by Robert Popper, who previously served in the Voting
Section of the Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division, where he
managed voting rights investigations and litigation across dozens of
states. Popper established our election monitoring program. He is a
veteran poll observer for the Department of Justice. The team also
includes lawyers who have experience monitoring elections for Judicial
Watch.

Our monitoring methodology emphasizes ballot access, meaning the
ability of citizens to easily register and cast a vote in an election.
It particularly focuses on recording specific Election Day problems
concerning unlawful electioneering, arbitrary variations in the rules
for voting, aggressive voting assistance, unusual ballot handling,
voter intimidation or confrontations, and voter “turnaways.”
Turnaways occur when a voter leaves a polling place without voting due
to administrative problems, long lines, technical issues, or other
circumstances.

This methodology contrasts with the approach adopted by other
international observers, like the Organization for Security and
Co-operation in Europe (OSCE), which has criticized the Hungarian
elections from an ideological perspective based on value judgments
about matters like media bias.

Judicial Watch’s election integrity team can play a key role in
providing independent and expert monitoring of Hungary’s historic
elections.

We are partnering with Liberty Coalition for a Free and Fair Election
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=37551&F=T&&hash=427f9a497dce28b50da8636db695dde72ea403e66dadd2e3a2511562385bda07],
which is working with independent experts from various parts of the
world to provide vigorous oversight over Hungary’s elections.

We have also monitored U.S. elections to ensure compliance with state
and federal laws.

As part of our ongoing election integrity efforts, our trained
observers monitored polling sites in Wisconsin
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=33732&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbW9uaXRvci13aXNjb25zaW4tcG9sbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=48fc008892c3ea35cf83de595ab98f3a079dfa8173b72e2035af33eb59e1ea10] in November
2024. Separately, we ran an Internet hotline for voters in all states
to report suspicions of election and voter fraud.

Our legal team monitored the polls in Georgia
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=28535&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctbW9uaXRvcnMtZ2VvcmdpYS1lbGVjdGlvbi1wb2xscy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b16ff476ed0af0286740eee00f95a69a84d12bb3c6ad9bbb6cf7c20c7c39a0f1] in
2022, as well as Virginia
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=37552&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtd2lsbC1tb25pdG9yLXZpcmdpbmlhLXBvbGxzLWVsZWN0aW9uLWRheS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=76c8854129cef17d7891ff9c3f68ca5380f36aa62a2287f9f3d8a81722fd4500]
in 2016, and New Hampshire
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80773&L=37553&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3Mtcm9vbS9qdWRpY2lhbC13YXRjaC13aWxsLW1vbml0b3ItcG9sbHMtbmV3LWhhbXBzaGlyZS1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f777ea58859a9684522fa7d81c4cfda6f438a805c0c877e0ce745d148a12738c]

SCHOOL DISTRICT WHERE ILLEGAL ALIEN SEXUALLY ASSAULTED GIRLS LAWYERS
UP

firm to give advice on handling the case of an illegal immigrant who

> that speaks 194 languages and the district with a budget of $3.9

clean_body: School District Where Illegal Alien Sexually Assaulted Girls Lawyers Up [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR SEARCH WARRANTS IN RUDY GIULIANI RAID [] On April 28, 2021, at approximately 6 a.m., federal agents executed search warrants [] at former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani’s Manhattan apartment and his office, seizing his cellphone and other electronic devices. Agents reportedly seized additional materials, including a computer used by long-time assistant Jo Ann Zafonte. Giuliani served as a personal attorney and informal adviser to President Donald Trump. Judicial Watch filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Justice for records on the Biden FBI’s search warrants used in the April 2021 raid on Giuliani’s residence and office (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [ (No. 1:26-cv-01158)). We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Justice Department failed to respond to a February 2026 FOIA request. The request, which included a signed certification of identity from Giuliani himself, seeks all records related to the April 2021 search warrants, including: Warrant applications, affidavits, attachments, draft versions, and approval memoranda; Supervisory and Main Justice approvals; Attorney search approvals under Justice Manual guidelines; Records concerning privilege review, “taint team” procedures, privilege determinations, and any special master involvement; Coordination with the FBI and the U.S. Attorney’s Office for the Southern District of New York; and Emails, memoranda, briefing materials, and other communications outside formal case files discussing Giuliani, the raids, or the underlying investigation. According to public reports, the raid was tied [] to an investigation into whether Giuliani violated [] the Foreign Agents Registration Act (FARA) in connection with his activities involving Ukrainian officials while he was seeking information related to Joe Biden and his son Hunter Biden. Giuliani’s then-attorney Robert Costello noted [] that federal agents ignored Hunter Biden’s computer hard drives when they raided the apartment, contradicting the order on the warrant “to seize every electronic device in his home.” The Biden DOJ’s pre-dawn raid on Rudy Giuliani was a textbook example of weaponized justice — targeting a loyal advocate of President Trump’s while agents deliberately ignored Hunter Biden’s hard drives sitting in the same apartment. This selective enforcement exposes a corrupt two-tiered system. Judicial Watch is a national leader in exposing the lawfare and abuse targeting Trump and other American citizens. In April 2026, obtained records that reveal the FBI’s concerns about the legal basis for the 2022 raid of Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home. The records expose explicit objections from field agents who warned the Justice Department that the unprecedented raid on Trump’s home lacked probable cause. In March 2026, the Justice Department reported [] that the FBI found about 1.9 million pages of records that are responsive to our FOIA lawsuit. These documents were reportedly stored in a “hidden room” at FBI headquarters and were first revealed by former Deputy Director Dan Bongino (Judicial Watch v U.S. Department of Justice [] (No.1:25-cv-04047)). In March 2026, we sued [] the Justice Department for records from the FBI’s Biden-era “Arctic Frost” probe, specifically involving the Criminal Division, the Office of Information Policy, Attorney General Merrick Garland, Deputy Attorney General Lisa Monaco and Special Counsel Jack Smith’s team (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:26-cv-00746)). In March 2026, we asked a Georgia state court to reject [] Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis’ efforts to continue hiding records about her office’s communications with Jack Smith’s office and the January 6 Committee (Judicial Watch Inc. v. Fani Willis et al. [ (No. 24-CV-002805)). In February 2026, we secured the release [] of rosters identifying the names of top deputie [ [] who worked for former Special Counsel Jack Smith (Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:23-cv-01485)). In January 2026, we sued [] the Justice Department for communications of FBI agents regarding the prosecution of former Trump trade advisor Peter Navarro (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No.1:26-cv-00079)). In January 2025, a federal court ordered [] the Justice Department to provide us with information on communications between Jack Smith and Fani Willis regarding the prosecution of Trump. In May 2025, the Justice Department was directed to search text messages from the Special Counsel’s Office for responsive records (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 23-cv-03110). COLORADO REMOVES 372,000 INACTIVE VOTERS FROM ITS ROLLS AFTER LAWSUIT Following the settlement of our lawsuit addressing Colorado’s compliance with federal voter list maintenance requirements, the state has removed 372,000 ineligible voters from registration lists. Under the National Voter Registration Act of 1993 (NVRA []), states must take reasonable steps to remove ineligible voters—such as those who have died, moved, or become inactive—while protecting eligible voters’ rights. Judicial Watch filed the Colorado federal lawsuit [] to clean the voter rolls in 2020 on behalf of ourselves and three residents of Colorado. (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. Griswold, et al [. (No. 20-cv-02992)). In March 2023, Colorado’s secretary of state agreed to settle [] the lawsuit and has confirmed to us that since 2023 the state removed 372,000 ineligible voters. This is a major victory for election integrity and a massive step toward cleaner elections. We are a national leader in election integrity and voting rights litigation, with a record of successful lawsuits [] enforcing constitutional redistricting standards and cleaning voter rolls nationwide. Our lawsuits and legal actions have now led to the removal [] of six million ineligible names from voter lists nationwide. In Kentucky, state election board officials reported [] that “roughly 735,000 ineligible voter registrations” have been removed from voter rolls, as part of a 2018 consent decree settling a Judicial Watch lawsuit. As part of its 2022 settlement [], New York City alone has removed 918,139 ineligible names from its rolls: data show 477,056 [] removals between March 2023 and February 2025, which is in addition to the 441,083 previously reported removals. In Los Angeles, county officials confirmed the removal of more than 1.2 million names from voter rolls as part of a settlement []. Judicial Watch legal pressure also resulted in election roll clean-ups in Pennsylvania [], Colorado [], North Carolina [], Kentucky [], [] and Ohio []. Federal courts in Oregon [] and Illinois [] have ruled that our lawsuits against those states to force them to clean their voter rolls may proceed. New voter roll legal action in California is imminent. Our election law efforts are led by Senior Attorney Robert Popper, who previously served in the Voting Section of the Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division, where he managed voting rights investigations and litigation across dozens of states. In March 2026, the Supreme Court of the United States held oral argument [] in a landmark election integrity case over whether the federal Election Day laws prohibit the counting of mail-in ballots that arrive after Election Day. We brought the underlying lawsuit on behalf of the Libertarian Party of Mississippi. In January 2026, the U.S. Supreme Court decided 7-2 [] in favor of granting standing in a historic case we filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors who were before the court to vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law allowing the counting of ballots received up to 14 days after Election Day. JUDICIAL WATCH ELECTION INTEGRITY TEAM TO MONITOR HUNGARY’S ELECTIONS An eight-member election-integrity team from Judicial Watch will monitor the April 12 Hungarian parliamentary elections. The vote will determine the next government and prime minister. We sent an election observer team to Hungary for its 2022 election – independently monitoring voting at 52 precincts across 27 locations in and around Budapest. Our team has been certified to serve as international election observers. The team is led by Robert Popper, who previously served in the Voting Section of the Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division, where he managed voting rights investigations and litigation across dozens of states. Popper established our election monitoring program. He is a veteran poll observer for the Department of Justice. The team also includes lawyers who have experience monitoring elections for Judicial Watch. Our monitoring methodology emphasizes ballot access, meaning the ability of citizens to easily register and cast a vote in an election. It particularly focuses on recording specific Election Day problems concerning unlawful electioneering, arbitrary variations in the rules for voting, aggressive voting assistance, unusual ballot handling, voter intimidation or confrontations, and voter “turnaways.” Turnaways occur when a voter leaves a polling place without voting due to administrative problems, long lines, technical issues, or other circumstances. This methodology contrasts with the approach adopted by other international observers, like the Organization for Security and Co-operation in Europe (OSCE), which has criticized the Hungarian elections from an ideological perspective based on value judgments about matters like media bias. Judicial Watch’s election integrity team can play a key role in providing independent and expert monitoring of Hungary’s historic elections. We are partnering with Liberty Coalition for a Free and Fair Election [], which is working with independent experts from various parts of the world to provide vigorous oversight over Hungary’s elections. We have also monitored U.S. elections to ensure compliance with state and federal laws. As part of our ongoing election integrity efforts, our trained observers monitored polling sites in Wisconsin [] in November 2024. Separately, we ran an Internet hotline for voters in all states to report suspicions of election and voter fraud. Our legal team monitored the polls in Georgia [] in 2022, as well as Virginia [] in 2016, and New Hampshire [] in 2014. SCHOOL DISTRICT WHERE ILLEGAL ALIEN SEXUALLY ASSAULTED GIRLS LAWYERS UP Virginia’s largest school district has hired Virginia's largest law firm to give advice on handling the case of an illegal immigrant who sexually assaulted multiple girls. Our Corruption Chronicles _blog has the details []. The Virginia public school district that allowed a 19-year-old illegal immigrant to enroll in high school and sexually assault multiple girls is now paying a global law firm to “investigate” the crimes and offer legal advice, according to records [] obtained by Judicial Watch. The big league firm, the state’s largest, is billing taxpayers up to $1,850 an hour to tame blowback ignited by the scandal, which involves Fairfax High School in northern Virginia, a Washington D.C. suburb. The campus is part of Fairfax County Public Schools (FCPS), the Old Dominion state’s biggest public school system and ninth largest in the U.S. with an enrollment of 177,000 across 200 campuses. FCPS prides itself on serving a “diverse population” [] that speaks 194 languages and the district with a budget of $3.9 billion spends $21,986 per student, which is above the national average of around $16,000. FCPS received dozens of complaints about female students being groped and sexually assaulted before the high school finally had the illegal immigrant arrested, information obtained by Judicial Watch reveals. Thanks to sanctuary policies that protect illegal immigrants—even those convicted of serious crimes—Virginia is inevitably a magnet for the undocumented. In this case an illegal immigrant from El Salvador, Israel Flores Ortiz, was welcomed into the community and allowed to enroll in 11th grade, despite his advanced age. Virginia officials claim Ortiz is 18 years old but federal authorities confirm he is 19 and living in Fairfax after entering the U.S. illegally in 2024 and released into the country under Biden’s disastrous open border policies. A Fairfax Police investigation [ that Ortiz, “an adult male student assaulted numerous female juvenile victims.” The illegal alien was transported to the Fairfax County Adult Detention Center last month and charged with 13 counts of assault and battery. He is scheduled for a court hearing in early April. Initially Ortiz was charged with nine counts, but additional victims came forward, according to city officials. The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) is demanding that Fairfax County sanctuary politicians not release the “illegal alien pedophile” [] who groped high school girls. “This 19-year-old criminal illegal alien should NOT have been attending a Virginia high school and allowed to prey on innocent teenage girls,” said DHS Deputy Assistant Secretary Lauren Bis. The agency blasted Virginia Governor Abigail Spanberger for ending cooperation with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) and “siding with criminal illegal aliens over American citizens.” DHS confirms the recently elected governor has released pedophiles, rapists, gang members, and murderers onto Virginia’s streets. Earlier this year Spanberger issued an executive order [ all cooperation between state law enforcement agencies and corrections departments and ICE, the DHS law enforcement agency charged with protecting national security and public safety by, among other things, enforcing immigration laws. The directive will put more Virginians and law enforcement in danger, according to a Virginia congressman, who condemned the order []. “This action creates a dangerous situation where liberal paid protestors can interfere with federal officers who are working hard to get dangerous criminals off our streets,” said Republican John McGuire, who is serving his first House term. “Law enforcement cooperation with local, state and federal agencies is vital to the safety of our Commonwealth.” Spanberger’s order will undoubtedly attract more criminal aliens like Ortiz, who will feel protected from federal immigration authorities and shielded from deportation. Even for a local government like Fairfax County that has long offered illegal immigrants sanctuary, failing to act against a repeat sexual predator on school grounds takes it to the next level. Now the school will spend taxpayer dollars to “retain an independent outside law firm to conduct a comprehensive review,” according to a statement [] [ by FCPS Superintendent Michelle Reid. The goal, according to the superintendent, is “to establish a clear understanding of what occurred, when it occurred, and confirm that all policies, procedures, and regulations were properly followed.” The law firm hired by the district, McGuireWoods [], claims its experience in high-stakes litigation and government investigations is second to none. “We have represented Fortune 100 companies and individuals in some of the most prominent criminal, regulatory and investigative matters in recent years, repeatedly earning top national accolades,” the firm's website states. The records obtained by Judicial Watch indicate the firm bills from $700 per hour for associates to $1,850 per hour for senior partners and that the firm agreed to offer FCPS some unspecified “discount.” Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2026, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to childrenâ€™s entertainment
body:
Today you have a very special chance

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zai4rfhuuhce4fvte5apllfu6vl89u2emerdai9g_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjg68or4cjh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf96tsbkgdq1etj33gb75tktfvkgc7v5csorfaho_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjg68or4cjh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj0miafa511pi6vgblfjfjki62m12ahsnn4o2lhg_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjg68or4cjh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq1o6vb3ncl6bd7bqfpepbi4s9aep8pmobjsgmng_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjg68or4cjh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj9pnlvsa7sqt0fodtpnoj55tvd88i7jdlc3ad60_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjg68or4cjh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1ghkkh4e2qtqvv52bvfd6u7c0hnf9a3ivtjus4o_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjg68or4cjh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt0cnthu5a7hh079fgmais4ri3id5998egov5m5o_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjg68or4cjh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4u4spqoq5or49bv5le9kh7vrbaaj92c39ji2bng_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjg68or4cjh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhj925q26dmejc0iltleghb81laj9p66fjtoepv8_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjg68or4cjh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential

| BIOptimizers | Remember when you could eat pasta, pizza, or a big steak dinner and feel fine?
If that's not the case anymore...it's probably not the food that changed.
It's your digestion.
Here's what most people don't realize...
As you age, your body naturally produces fewer digestive enzymes. Significantly fewer.
Enzymes are the workforce that break down everything you eat — proteins into amino acids, fats into fatty acids, carbs into usable fuel.
When you don't have enough of them...food may not break down the way it should.
Hello bloating...gas...and sluggishness that hits like a truck after meals.
Even more frustrating...you can eat all the “clean” foods and still feel blah if your body can't properly break them down.*
MassZymes from BIOptimizers was built for exactly this.
This premium formula is packed with 18 digestive enzymes, plus 4x more protease than most brands. It’s designed to help break down proteins, fats, carbs, and dairy at every stage of digestion.*

name: Senator Johnson
subject: This isn't politics anymore. This is a permanent takeover.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson for Senate Inc
body:
The Left is on a mission to take back the Senate, and there’s no coming back from what they have planned.

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc0f8j62mthirc09n6u5e7qsjva22pvgfe21p2og_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjg6cob1c1h2bs)
---

Friend,
The Left is on a mission to take back the Senate, and there’s no coming back from what they have planned.
It's no secret –
* _**STEP ONE: Eliminate the filibuster.**_ Simple majority rule replaces the 60-vote threshold that forces the Senate to actually build consensus.
* _**STEP TWO: Pack the Supreme Court.**_ Add four, five, six new justices — all chosen by a Democrat president, confirmed by a simple majority, and the constitutional guardrails we've spent decades rebuilding dismantled overnight.
* _**STEP THREE: Make D.C. a state.**_ Two new Democrat senators, automatically, permanently. They lock in their majority for a generation.

This isn’t hyperbole. It’s the agenda they’ve said OUT LOUD.
**_[Knowing all this, I have to ask you an important question: Will you donate today to STOP the Left’s permanent power grab?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi2jhmnomffln1uvbvjlje1resr9fn1oa7pb8u6g_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjg6cob1c1h2bs)_**
The only thing standing between their radical wishlist and reality is Republican control of the Senate.
I've heard from a lot of voters lately who are frustrated. Angry, even.
Some are disenchanted. Some feel like nothing ever really changes — that we win elections and then watch the Establishment fumble it.
_**I understand that frustration. I share it.**_
I've spent my career in the Senate fighting a bureaucracy that fights back, a media that never gives us a fair shot, and a Democrat Party that plays for keeps in a way our side too often doesn't.
But here's what I know: Sitting it out doesn't punish the politicians you're angry at.
It hands power to the people who will destroy our country as we know it.
**[Are you willing to pitch in $5, $10, or $15 if it means stopping the Left’s permanent power grab? ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlfoeg9o3o94aink4s30oq0pu6mad04lbkj88tco_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjg6cob1c1h2bs)**
I've been through brutal campaigns. I've had union bosses, liberal billionaires, and out-of-state activists pour tens of millions of dollars into defeating me.
**They failed because grassroots conservatives like you showed up.**
That's all I'm asking. Make a contribution. Get off the sidelines. Don't let the Left win by default.

[PITCH IN $5](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoota2rf6r17gsb82vf6gcbrqj1srhsjar36mev8_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjg6cob1c1h2bs)

[PITCH IN $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl3imgqfbilheb59vc4vfcn6ct2p55ifu4m6799g_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjg6cob1c1h2bs)
[PITCH IN $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9m98pjq9c208o9hggjipogmk600j0jmm2hndbh8_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjg6cob1c1h2bs)
[PITCH IN MORE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsh7intnk3o83agneeh2tbr8snc2jh5v90aedghg_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjg6cob1c1h2bs)
Because if they take the Senate back – if they eliminate the filibuster, pack the court, add two permanent Democrat senators from D.C. – that's the ballgame.

This is the moment for action.

Thank you for stepping up with whatever you can,
\- **Ron Johnson**
