name: Haley Stevens
subject: A love letter to Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
You are the reason I fight.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.zZaa20OT_fXwjr5V9PC1zqZ-KaGvMhhADjhSbguBvtw?) for more
---
# [A love letter to Michigan](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=193618143&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkzNjE4MTQzLCJpYXQiOjE3NzU5MTI4MDYsImV4cCI6MTc3ODUwNDgwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nf7SJB0yYLjkGiPrDhqvbntnGFe5PAMoVbsUfm3_9JA)
### You are the reason I fight.
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Apr 11
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvaGFsZXlmb3JtaS9wL2EtbG92ZS1sZXR0ZXItdG8tbWljaGlnYW4_.HI9hk3KmNg3pjid3x9RB_KzJV7JxTsB0lf2uSWwWiSY?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/a-love-letter-to-michigan?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Dear Michigan,
We've been together a long time, and by now, you know I believe in hard work, staying scrappy, and always remembering your North Star.
And for me, that's easy: It's you, Michigan.
I love this state. I love what I do. And I love _who_ I do it for.
For the autoworkers in Flint. The small-business owners in Pontiac. The teachers in Grand Rapids, the retirees in Marquette, the nurses in Grand Blanc. [It's for the working families busting their tails every day in every corner of Michigan, all hoping to build a future where their kids can thrive.](https://substack.com/redirect/5d008c52-5be7-4b23-98a8-ba293dd195ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b6a819da-d5ce-475b-a1ca-48f8860937a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's for the Great Lakes, where we learned how to swim. The diners in Detroit, where we ate Coney dogs and built community. The games at Ford Field, summers in Traverse City, and the manufacturers across our state who put America on wheels.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/16388a2a-0e47-4e5b-9d9a-43be3f4bd6c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**This campaign is for you, Michigan. It 's **_**always**_**been for you.**
You've always had my heart - when I was fighting for 200,000 jobs in the Obama administration, when I'm sitting at my desk in Congress, and right now as I ask you to help me have the honor of being your next U.S. senator - our state's chief lawmaker and champion.
Michigan, you've made me who I am.
You've taught me grit. Hard work. The value of listening to your neighbor, learning from your community, and then leading with the same doggedness that built this state brick by brick.
**[That's the Michigan way.](https://substack.com/redirect/5d008c52-5be7-4b23-98a8-ba293dd195ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c2d29d7e-5a3d-4145-8244-b4a8254e554e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
You've given me the strength it's going to take to win this race. We've got our work cut out for us, but I'm ready. I know who I'm fighting for.
It's you, Michigan. This place. My people.
So from the bottom of my heart, I want to say _thank you_ - for reading, for believing, and for being part of this journey with me.
**[If you're with me, I'd be honored if you'd chip in to help keep this grassroots campaign going strong. Truly, I'd be grateful for any amount.](https://substack.com/redirect/5d008c52-5be7-4b23-98a8-ba293dd195ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With love and grit from Michigan,
Haley
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0e84f808-63c2-4cbe-acd0-a77e6919f083?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/5d008c52-5be7-4b23-98a8-ba293dd195ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

I don’t mean to alarm you, but the fight to take back the Senate just got even harder.

From Ohio to Georgia to New Hampshire, the GOP is set to unleash **millions** to defeat Democrats and block our chances of taking back the majority.

**What we raise in April will determine whether Democrats can stay competitive in the key states that will determine Senate control.**

If we fall short, it means that we'll have another two years of Trump and his Senate allies wreaking havoc with our lives by:

❌ Pushing costs for working families through the roof.
❌ Gutting access to health care and food assistance.
❌ Attacking even more of the basic freedoms that we’ve fought so hard to protect.

_That’s what’s at stake every time I ask for a donation._ We’re not just worried about numbers on a spreadsheet — we’re fighting for the future of our country.

Democrats can't afford to fall behind if we want to compete against the GOP’s multi-millions. name: Roy Cooper
subject: We can’t risk the GOP holding power any longer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund and authorized by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=1003%2E124072%2EzaKzqr)
| | | |
---
Peter,

My brother and I often walk around our farm reminiscing about old times and the people and places who have made us who we are today – our parents, teachers and neighbors. Lately, it got me thinking:
**Most of the politicians in Washington DC don’t have a clue what regular people want.**
The North Carolinians I meet on the campaign trail don’t want more tax cuts for billionaires, endless wars abroad and fewer rights than their parents had.
They want lower costs, affordable health care and their fundamental freedoms intact. They want a government that works for working families and elected officials who actually care.

With Republicans in power, that’s not what they’re getting.
**Peter, that’s why I’m in this fight. Experts say we have to win in North Carolina to have any chance at taking back Senate control – and I need your help to get it done.**
**[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can today to power our grassroots campaign and defeat my MAGA opponent? We can’t risk the GOP holding power any longer.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8646?t=8&akid=1003%2E124072%2EzaKzqr)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8647?t=9&akid=1003%2E124072%2EzaKzqr)

North Carolina is my home, and I’m giving this fight everything I’ve got. Thank you for contributing what you can today. Any amount makes a difference.

Roy Cooper
| |
* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=1003%2E124072%2EzaKzqr)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. clean_body: | | | | | Peter, My brother and I often walk around our farm reminiscing about old times and the people and places who have made us who we are today – our parents, teachers and neighbors. Lately, it got me thinking: Most of the politicians in Washington DC don’t have a clue what regular people want. The North Carolinians I meet on the campaign trail don’t want more tax cuts for billionaires, endless wars abroad and fewer rights than their parents had. They want lower costs, affordable health care and their fundamental freedoms intact. They want a government that works for working families and elected officials who actually care. With Republicans in power, that’s not what they’re getting. Peter, that’s why I’m in this fight. Experts say we have to win in North Carolina to have any chance at taking back Senate control – and I need your help to get it done. | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.

_**By[Cliff Schecter](https://substack.com/redirect/3dd62f0f-c99b-4cc9-afb9-3262dbf4acf5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** -- April 10, 2026_
Is Donald Trump effectively paying Iran _Protection Money_ in the Strait of Hormuz? Bowing down like he owns a jewelry or coat business on the corner of Delancey and Ridge and Meyer Lansky or John Gotti just came swashbuckling in to remind him how kerosene and fire interact?
Because, let's face it, the man should beg for forgiveness--not to murderous Irani Mullahs. But dead U.S. soldiers, murdered Iranian schoolgirls, U.S. farmers, gas prices, good taste, those possessing an IQ in excess of 85, and probably most other people alive.
Because among a long list of just flat-out, head-buried-in-feces, stupid-arse things the untreated gonorrhea goon has done, this may just be the dumbest. How do you go from free shipping through the Strait of Hormuz to a giant toll like we're stuck in Blazing Saddles? I give you the presidency of Donald J. Trump.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0797f8ab-947d-404c-a37c-ab76d912439a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So as [Iran now enacts tolls on global shipping](https://substack.com/redirect/af4d24f1-9e04-402d-b2fa-1b9904859e1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) via one of the world's key oil chokepoints, this story just got a lot bigger: it's no longer about just his warmongering or changing the subject from himself and his billionaire predator friends in the Epstein files. It's about global leverage, oil prices, shipping extortion, and _Trump 's unbelievable, pathetic, physical and intellectual febrility_.
Imagine if someone told you a few weeks ago, when this mentally and morally blighted ignoramus started a war for no reason, that Iran would now be charging $2 million on ships passing thru the Strait of Hormuz? Effectively [boosting its economy by 15%--which I'm sure won't be used on enriching uranium as Trump tore up the agreement that was preventing that--as American consumers foot the bill](https://substack.com/redirect/af4d24f1-9e04-402d-b2fa-1b9904859e1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?
We were doing just fine. But that's when Trump always steps in to do what he does...what he's done his whole life. Which is fuck everything up
It's sort of impressive how badly this dolt can screw things in no time. Like the man has a gift for ensuring everything crossing is his path is demonstrably worse than when he arrived. To quote, well, myself, from the show, "just a wholly absurd outcome for a wholly absurd president who engaged in a wholly unnecessary attack."
The ultimate checkmate. For the man with the ultimate checkered history of failure as a lifestyle choice.

name: David Hogg
subject: How do we get people to care about democracy?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Zohran is a prime example of what the leaders we deserve look like.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260411-1&t=1&akid=3360%2E587540%2EwqPaRN)
Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg.
I get asked all the time — usually by older people — how we get more people to care about democracy. They ask about young people, but also people of all ages.
**And I get why they’re asking.**
With Trump’s march to authoritarianism top of mind, democracy feels imperiled. And more and more people feel like politics as usual is not working for them.
Here’s what I think: _People will care about democracy when they see it working in their lives._ When their rent is stable and their streets get fixed, they see that the government actually can work on their behalf. They witness _democracy in action._
And that’s exactly what’s happening in NYC thanks to Mayor Zohran Mamdani:
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260411_1_mamdani.o31wh_&refcode=em20260411-3360&t=2&akid=3360%2E587540%2EwqPaRN)
Peter, actions like this may not dominate the national headlines or go viral online. But they are exactly what gets regular people to care about democracy.
Leaders We Deserve was proud to support Zohran Mamdani’s campaign last year.
**[Can you chip in $5 to help us elect more bold young leaders like Zohran?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260411_1_mamdani.o31wh_&refcode=em20260411-3360&amount=5&t=3&akid=3360%2E587540%2EwqPaRN)**
We’re finding and supporting candidates across the country who understand that democracy has to prove that it can work — _every single day_ — in people’s lives. Not simply say over and over that Democracy is the best form of government, but actually prove it so it doesn’t even have to be said.
**But here’s the reality:**
🔹 Candidates like this are up against a system that wasn’t built for them.
🔹 Older, wealthier, better-connected candidates start with huge advantages.
🔹 So if we want leaders who deliver real results, we have to invest in them early.
**That’s where you come in, Peter.** With your support, we can keep leveling the playing field and electing bold young progressives who will tackle these issues.
**[We need your support today. Will you contribute $5 now to help us elect more young leaders like Zohran Mamdani who will put democracy in action?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260411_1_mamdani.o31wh_&refcode=em20260411-3360&amount=5&t=4&akid=3360%2E587540%2EwqPaRN)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260411_1_mamdani.o31wh_&amount=5&refcode=em20260411-3360&t=23&akid=3360%2E587540%2EwqPaRN)**
Thank you for your support and for helping us rebuild trust in democracy.
— David
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20260411-1&t=24&refcode2=3360_587540_wqPaRN&akid=3360%2E587540%2EwqPaRN)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=3360%2E587540%2EwqPaRN)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=3360%2E587540%2EwqPaRN)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: DEFEND SOCIAL SECURITY (VPP)
subject: Trump’s taking away access ⚠️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Experts are calling it “horrific”
| **Trump is quietly SLASHING access to Social Security!** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106441?t=6&akid=23568%2E878179%2EY9bDTP) | [$25,000 GOAL TO FIGHT BACK: RUSH $7 TO SAVE SOCIAL SECURITY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106441?t=7&akid=23568%2E878179%2EY9bDTP)
---
* * *
🔴 Trump knows that if Americans can’t access Social Security, **_it’s as good as gone!_**

This week resulted in some interesting news regarding our border. No, not our border with Mexico, it concerns our border with Canada.
The Robinson Report revealed four "British" men were recently caught by the U.S. Border Patrol after they illegally crossed into Maine from Canada.
The men's names are: Ali Mohammed Ali Abdullah, Hameed Mohammed Nagi, Ibrahim Ayyub Khan, and Mohammed Sultan Saleh.
One of the geniuses decided to film their journey on a GoPro, where the men can be heard celebrating upon learning they reached U.S. soil.

The Robinson Report says the men were caught because two maple sugar workers noticed the men walking in the opposite direction of where hikers typically go. Once they were caught by Border Patrol, the men claimed they were just going on a hike. Their story fell apart through further questioning, the GoPro video, and Google searches indicating knowledge of where the international boundary is located.
The Robinson Report
[Four "British Hikers" Caught on Golden Road After Illegally Entering U.S. from Canada: Court Records](https://substack.com/redirect/fef380ed-ec8a-4650-9f56-1da9ee1fb890?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Four British nationals were apprehended by U.S. Border Patrol agents in a remote stretch of Somerset County woods after illegally crossing from Canada into the United States on April 3, federal court documents filed this week reveal...
[Read more](https://substack.com/redirect/fef380ed-ec8a-4650-9f56-1da9ee1fb890?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
2 days ago * 139 likes * 7 comments * The Robinson Report
It should be no surprise that during the Biden-Harris border crisis, our northern border was unsecured since many Border Patrol agents had to be reassigned to the south to deal with the large number of people illegally crossing.
The shortage of federal manpower in the northern sectors was taken advantage of by illegal aliens who had the money and ability to fly into Canada. Unlike our boundary with Mexico, there is no border wall equivalent with Canada because, historically, there has been no need. The sign you are at the international border are the stone markers installed once the lines were established.
I can foresee a future where we will need to drastically install border infrastructure next to Canada because of the idiotic immigration policies in Europe.
This, of course, assumes we have fixed our own policies when it comes to legal immigration, not just illegal crossings. It should be noted that the Trump administration has improved our legal immigration system by not giving our visas carte blanche as it was under the Biden-Harris administration. As always, there is room for improvement, but things are heading in the right direction.

I foresee a future where we will need to drastically install border infrastructure next to Canada because of the idiotic immigration policies in Europe... | | | Apr 11| | | ∙| | Guest post ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Help us beat and replace the mainstream media! Support PolitiBrawl by becoming a paid subscriber today: This week resulted in some interesting news regarding our border. No, not our border with Mexico, it concerns our border with Canada. The Robinson Report revealed four "British" men were recently caught by the U.S. Border Patrol after they illegally crossed into Maine from Canada. The men's names are: Ali Mohammed Ali Abdullah, Hameed Mohammed Nagi, Ibrahim Ayyub Khan, and Mohammed Sultan Saleh. One of the geniuses decided to film their journey on a GoPro, where the men can be heard celebrating upon learning they reached U.S. soil. A message from our sponsor (piece continues below) Insane Cards Charging 0% Interest Into 2027 (Some With Welcome Bonuses Up To $250) | | ---|---|--- If you have outstanding credit card debt, getting a new 0% intro APR credit card could help ease the pressure while you pay down your balances. Our credit card experts identified top credit cards that are perfect for anyone looking to pay down debt and not add to it! Some are even offering Click through to see what all the hype is about. (Piece continues below) The Robinson Report says the men were caught because two maple sugar workers noticed the men walking in the opposite direction of where hikers typically go. Once they were caught by Border Patrol, the men claimed they were just going on a hike. Their story fell apart through further questioning, the GoPro video, and Google searches indicating knowledge of where the international boundary is located. The Robinson Report Four British nationals were apprehended by U.S. Border Patrol agents in a remote stretch of Somerset County woods after illegally crossing from Canada into the United States on April 3, federal court documents filed this week reveal... 2 days ago 139 likes 7 comments The Robinson Report It should be no surprise that during the Biden-Harris border crisis, our northern border was unsecured since many Border Patrol agents had to be reassigned to the south to deal with the large number of people illegally crossing. The shortage of federal manpower in the northern sectors was taken advantage of by illegal aliens who had the money and ability to fly into Canada. Unlike our boundary with Mexico, there is no border wall equivalent with Canada because, historically, there has been no need. The sign you are at the international border are the stone markers installed once the lines were established. I can foresee a future where we will need to drastically install border infrastructure next to Canada because of the idiotic immigration policies in Europe. This, of course, assumes we have fixed our own policies when it comes to legal immigration, not just illegal crossings. It should be noted that the Trump administration has improved our legal immigration system by not giving our visas carte blanche as it was under the Biden-Harris administration. As always, there is room for improvement, but things are heading in the right direction. * | A guest post by| reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media covering immigration, protests, and national flashpoints across the U.S. Subscribe for full podcast episodes, unfiltered interviews, and on-the-ground reporting you won't see on MSM. name: Generations for America Foundation
subject: The Shield of Rights Journey HasBegun
body:
| | | If you no longer wish to receive our emails, click here to [Unsubscribe.](https://app.robly.com/unsubscribe?a=d8b7d91afc33e6c5ae00eb26ee696033&b=63f8b5b05373e1d3f973d11b45e051ce)
---
| |
---
**From the Team at**
**Generations for America and Generations for America Foundation**

---
Hi D. P., Generations for America Foundation is proud to announce its upcoming Spring 2026 webinar series, "The U.S. Constitution: The Shield of Rights." This twelve-week educational journey will take place every Wednesday evening from April 8 through June 24, 2026, from 7:00 - 8:00 PM EDT. This series is designed to equip Americans with a profound understanding of their fundamental rights and the individual liberties that serve as a safeguard against government overreach. Join us for any webinar or all of them. The Spring 2026 series features distinguished speakers committed to constitutional literacy. Mike Delaney: A Navy veteran with several decades of experience in engineering, Delaney applies his analytical precision to the study of constitutional frameworks. His background as a veteran and engineer brings a unique, structured perspective to understanding the historical intent and modern application of the Bill of Rights. Rocky Burke: A retired law enforcement and public safety professional with over 50 years of experience, Burke brings a career's worth of field expertise to the discussion of civic rights. His insights bridge the gap between constitutional theory and the real-world challenges facing American families today. Constitutional education from a law enforcement perspective will improve the quality of court judgments, legislation, law enforcement, voting rules and government personnel performance. It will benefit everyday Americans in terms of liberty and security.
---
| |
---
|
# Shield of Rights Constitutional Webinars
---
Know your rights and responsibilities as a resident or citizen of the USA. Special focus on law enforcement perspective is crucial for both officers and the public leading to better community relations and more informed decision-making in law enforcement. RSVP now to learn about and discuss the Constitution from the comfort of your home or convenience of your phone when on the road at [https://www.generationsforamericafoundation.com/events](http://link.rby20.com/ls/click?upn=u001.GAk7fHL-2BVi5MccRb6usJku2BaI7VtpWwTdcB7N5mOlDZuFDPpLku3h2bIoC0Emk50FHUT-2FjCp-2BsJXwRtrT0bCg-3D-3DPGuS_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCvXrI5zrvAmWKlzz2BTRM7s8INkI5SckbDmt-2BWdjKKGbLk6cfcI6HcTo-2FzwJlVunOo1mcou5HeXnw7GlMEdlJgOAxGjAWjChBhXKfT7T3c4sGdlzrBnrqx8Zzlbtk9wjctliih7lA2DjMDONL9I58-2FbKp9C7yQhkjpT5j5devUN1aWI7yIMl-2B-2Ft7j-2FMZuTC7f0VuudG7knFVZWNIVPT72f6cfoaV0Y-2BSiivR6JZ4FAykr1j8LbmodSUX5-2BSwurC72duDqq315-2BuriNr6oAe1MsQLJ6pBwpCAzy05nQyh6wZ4WXP4hg-2BnVKoPWAbmIZyGPPpghdca6kLr29fW0IkkCjwHLQZ9wbwH-2FgN-2FpVgIc17ebply8CUHtALeal2sBOmE-2BUeBpZSHKxPA21YU2BjenP3OXqOjYGrEcO7dpO1LmTtAjs-2FLS0HlTnh8pEnJvgAxAreDUrC-2Fvxur47o7xFqfC-2FhcbHilRAAYF1dEJ7RdszOudvzOk0p76PmTLZun9vADA-3D)

| |
---
|
# Robert's Rules of Order
---
Develop effective participatory decision-making skills. Develop skills to be able to serve as a competent committee chairman or member. Develop skills to be able to function well as an organizational officer or member. Understand the rules and how they function. Register for our next course starting on April 30th at [https://www.generationsforamericafoundation.com/events](http://link.rby20.com/ls/click?upn=u001.GAk7fHL-2BVi5MccRb6usJku2BaI7VtpWwTdcB7N5mOlDZuFDPpLku3h2bIoC0Emk50FHUT-2FjCp-2BsJXwRtrT0bCg-3D-3DQx1C_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCvXrI5zrvAmWKlzz2BTRM7s8INkI5SckbDmt-2BWdjKKGbLk6cfcI6HcTo-2FzwJlVunOo1mcou5HeXnw7GlMEdlJgOAxGjAWjChBhXKfT7T3c4sGdlzrBnrqx8Zzlbtk9wjctliih7lA2DjMDONL9I58-2FbKp9C7yQhkjpT5j5devUN1aWI7yIMl-2B-2Ft7j-2FMZuTC7f0VuudG7knFVZWNIVPT72f6cfoaV0Y-2BSiivR6JZ4FAykr1j8LbmodSUX5-2BSwurC72duDqq315-2BuriNr6oAe1MsQLJ6pBwpCAzy05nQyh6wZ4WXP4hg-2BnVKoPWAbmIZyGPPpghdca6kLr29fW0IkkCjeSOxPEviz2KxmfJ6KG8mmsUlU-2Feb-2BaZU9Bj77IEQct1CDZdMuPNYXPb13ZNjNg-2BllGrUeGAsQ0vQF-2FQFRcAKjf6djcverLtF7CsbgMAkX8TlVu6Ow-2F-2B3Dd4bVQqXEkYNxrtVmrSqFgy652-2FzrBmQmyo5zhztEvB2wlDISy1u7cc-3D).

# Ingrid Centurion Podcast
---
Ingrid and her guests discuss and debate timely public affairs topics concerning critical issues many of which involve the U.S. Constitution. Watch episodes now at the [Ingrid Centurion Podcast.](http://link.rby20.com/ls/click?upn=u001.GAk7fHL-2BVi5MccRb6usJksHk-2FAqNLAPh2qBboYXGfSCtc5BWOgp3koXaeAqw5qcATSllRMGbq1jeoLrvvPA-2Bgg-3D-3DeNxO_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCvXrI5zrvAmWKlzz2BTRM7s8INkI5SckbDmt-2BWdjKKGbLk6cfcI6HcTo-2FzwJlVunOo1mcou5HeXnw7GlMEdlJgOAxGjAWjChBhXKfT7T3c4sGdlzrBnrqx8Zzlbtk9wjctliih7lA2DjMDONL9I58-2FbKp9C7yQhkjpT5j5devUN1aWI7yIMl-2B-2Ft7j-2FMZuTC7f0VuudG7knFVZWNIVPT72f6cfoaV0Y-2BSiivR6JZ4FAykr1j8LbmodSUX5-2BSwurC72duDqq315-2BuriNr6oAe1MsQLJ6pBwpCAzy05nQyh6wZ4WXP4hg-2BnVKoPWAbmIZyGPPpghdca6kLr29fW0IkkCj-2BHviwLYjbOELoY8dNfTu-2BZVaEYVUkefvK2Igz60kSbbnbXeo2zNwYQoW-2BUOg3bwg6UCz-2FMP7SOUsTSInuJ1PCP-2F-2F7aRs1NIGvu8TzmKzXWhTm-2F6TZBSICv7aj2ykgsKSXG2PgZqbBfDTk1AKlg4eOdvAw6onwbyX8GbKXsLSLsw-3D) Please contact us to become a sponsor of the show or an episode. clean_body: | | | If you no longer wish to receive our emails, click here to | | From the Team at Generations for America and Generations for America Foundation Hi D. P., Generations for America Foundation is proud to announce its upcoming Spring 2026 webinar series, "The U.S. Constitution: The Shield of Rights." This twelve-week educational journey will take place every Wednesday evening from April 8 through June 24, 2026, from 7:00 - 8:00 PM EDT. This series is designed to equip Americans with a profound understanding of their fundamental rights and the individual liberties that serve as a safeguard against government overreach. Join us for any webinar or all of them. The Spring 2026 series features distinguished speakers committed to constitutional literacy. Mike Delaney: A Navy veteran with several decades of experience in engineering, Delaney applies his analytical precision to the study of constitutional frameworks. His background as a veteran and engineer brings a unique, structured perspective to understanding the historical intent and modern application of the Bill of Rights. Rocky Burke: A retired law enforcement and public safety professional with over 50 years of experience, Burke brings a career's worth of field expertise to the discussion of civic rights. His insights bridge the gap between constitutional theory and the real-world challenges facing American families today. Constitutional education from a law enforcement perspective will improve the quality of court judgments, legislation, law enforcement, voting rules and government personnel performance. It will benefit everyday Americans in terms of liberty and security. | | | Shield of Rights Constitutional Webinars Know your rights and responsibilities as a resident or citizen of the USA. Special focus on law enforcement perspective is crucial for both officers and the public leading to better community relations and more informed decision-making in law enforcement. RSVP now to learn about and discuss the Constitution from the comfort of your home or convenience of your phone when on the road at | | | Robert's Rules of Order Develop effective participatory decision-making skills. Develop skills to be able to serve as a competent committee chairman or member. Develop skills to be able to function well as an organizational officer or member. Understand the rules and how they function. Register for our next course starting on April 30th at . | | | Ingrid Centurion Podcast Ingrid and her guests discuss and debate timely public affairs topics concerning critical issues many of which involve the U.S. Constitution. Watch episodes now at the Please contact us to become a sponsor of the show or an episode. We're also looking for guests who are authorities in their field or public figures who wish to talk about topics on the show. | | | | Support our continued efforts in 2026 to inform, educate and inspire Americans both natural born and those that now call the USA their new home. We're glad you cherish our freedom and opportunity and we want to help you succeed. Learn details about . Membership is available to participate in our educational offerings as often as you wish. For more details go to | | | | | ---|---|--- © 2022-2026 All Rights Reserved | Generations for America Foundation 1985 Riviera Dr Ste 103 PMB 263 Mt Pleasant SC * 29464 |

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: Greg Abbott rigged the Texas education system
body:
Millions of Texas students will sit for the STAAR test this week
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
When my son was in 2nd grade, he tried to run away from school. He was just too exhausted by STAAR prep they were already doing to prepare for the 3rd grade tests.
Abbott promised to eliminate the STAAR test but he tripled it and renamed it instead, while kids in private school who get a taxpayer-funded voucher get a pass.
When I’m governor, I’ll get rid of the STAAR test once and for all.
**[Pitch in $5 now to help me defeat Greg Abbott and end the STAAR test.](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260411_1_staar.b_iql0&refcode=em20260411-899&amount=5&t=1&akid=899%2E299639%2ERbR_ok)**
**This month, millions of Texas students are sitting for the STAAR, a standardized test used to measure how well students are meeting state learning standards** in subjects like reading, math, science, and social studies.
Here is what makes me so angry about this standardized test.
Our public school kids are put through a high-stakes testing regime that takes time away from real learning and funnels enormous amounts of taxpayer money to testing vendors. Meanwhile, Greg Abbott is pushing a voucher scheme that sends public dollars to private schools with far less accountability.
In fact, when the voucher bill was moving through the state legislature, I offered a simple amendment. If private schools are going to take taxpayer-funded vouchers, their students should have to take the same STAAR tests as public school students.
_Abbott’s allies rejected it._
**So Abbott is basically forcing the STAAR test onto 5.5 million public school students, while private schools get taxpayer money and a free pass.**
That is not accountability. That’s a two-tier system that protects the well-connected and shortchanges everyone else.
If STAAR is _truly_ the standard Texas should use, then it should apply to every school that takes public dollars. And if it is not, then we should stop using it to punish students, teachers, and neighborhood schools.
When I am governor, we will end the STAAR testing regime as we know it and stop Abbott’s voucher scam from draining resources out of our public schools.
[**If you are ready to help me beat Greg Abbott this November and fight for public education, please chip in $5 to my campaign today.** ](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260411_1_staar.b_iql0&refcode=em20260411-899&amount=5&t=2&akid=899%2E299639%2ERbR_ok)
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260411_1_staar.b_iql0&amount=5&refcode=em20260411-899&t=21&akid=899%2E299639%2ERbR_ok)
Thank you,
Gina Hinojosa

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260411-1-b1&t=23&refcode2=899_299639_RbR_ok&akid=899%2E299639%2ERbR_ok)
[ Donate Monthly » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260411-1-b2&recurring=1&t=24&refcode2=899_299639_RbR_ok&akid=899%2E299639%2ERbR_ok)
---
Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_gov/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/update-your-information_gov/?t=25&akid=899%2E299639%2ERbR_ok)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ginafortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_gov/?t=26&akid=899%2E299639%2ERbR_ok)

Null, this made my blood boil:
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/17001?t=3&akid=2725%2E49239%2E7CJCmV)
The truth is that Trump's unconstitutional war in Iran is costing taxpayers like you and me **$1 billion per day. You read that right: $1 BILLION.**
While he threatens to continue his illegal war over disgusting social media posts, Michiganders are paying the price.

With our tax dollars and at the gas pump, yes, but also by sacrificing our own health care and child care.
**This is _not_ what we asked for. _Not_ what we want. And _not_ what we need.**
This is why we MUST flip the Senate this November, Null. We need a real check on Donald Trump and a Senate that fights for working Americans and the programs our families rely on.
**[If you're sick of endless war and politicians who would rather pad the wallets of defense contractors than take care of our families, will you pitch in $5 now to keep Michigan blue and help flip the Senate?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/17001?t=4&akid=2725%2E49239%2E7CJCmV)**

name: James Carville
subject: A damn close race:
body:
I need your attention RIGHT NOW!

Chris Pappas and his Republican opponent John Sununu are TIED in the
latest poll out of New Hampshire. THIS RACE IS CLOSER THAN NC, GA, AND ME!

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260411_1.0PsTup&refcode=em20260411-1&t=1001&akid=6047%2E582294%2EwxYvj_ ]We have a decision to make: Are we gonna do EVERYTHING we can to help
Chris Pappas win and flip the Senate? Or are we gonna risk another Trump
Trifecta? I know where I stand, and if you’re with me, don’t wait another
minute – chip in RIGHT NOW to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue »

I’ve seen a lot of campaigns in my day, so trust me when I say: This TIED
poll is a jump ball in this Senate race. Whoever grabs it first gets a
huge advantage. In a race that will see INSANE amounts of spending (we’re
talking hundreds of millions of dollars here), we need every win we can
get.

These stakes are ASTRONOMICAL: You’ve got Chris Pappas, a tried and true
fighter for working families, vs. a guy who’s promised to be a yes-man for
Donald Trump and his TRILLIONAIRE class. And now they’re tied in the
polls.

If we don’t rally around Chris right now, we could LOSE this Senate race.
So I have to ask you again: Will you do what it takes
to win and hold this seat for Democrats?

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260411_1.0PsTup&refcode=em20260411-1&t=1002&akid=6047%2E582294%2EwxYvj_ ]It’s time to fight like hell for New Hampshire and the country’s
future. Chip in $5 or whatever you can right now.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260411_1.0PsTup&amount=5&refcode=em20260411-1&t=1021&akid=6047%2E582294%2EwxYvj_ ]Donate $5 »

45-44. That’s a damn close race. Whatever you chip in today will have a
direct impact on the outcome – so let’s flip the Senate.

— James Carville

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260411_1.0PsTup&refcode=em20260411-1&t=1022&akid=6047%2E582294%2EwxYvj_ ]James Carville

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: For the first time in YEARS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Republicans need this seat; their House majority is razor-thin. And they know we have a real shot at winning this race.
It’s been a year since President Trump withdrew Elise Stefanik’s nomination to serve as U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations.
At the time, Washington Republicans did everything they could to keep her in Congress. But in the end, she walked away — and now, for the first time in years, this seat is open.
For months, we’ve been building something strong across the North Country. Thousands of grassroots supporters stepping up. Communities ready for a change. People who want a representative who understands what it means to live and work here.
We have a real opportunity to win, but we also know what we’re up against.
Republicans need this seat; their House majority is **_razor-thin._** And they know we have a real shot at winning this race. My opponent, Republican Anthony Constantino, is backed by big money and ready to spend millions of his own money to buy this seat.
But we’re not giving up. This campaign is different. It’s about sending a dairy farmer to Congress, not another politician backed by wealth and insiders.
**And I’m ready to fight for the community that raised me, and with your help, we can prove this seat isn’t for sale.**

clean_body: Republicans need this seat; their House majority is razor-thin. And they know we have a real shot at winning this race. It’s been a year since President Trump withdrew Elise Stefanik’s nomination to serve as U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations. At the time, Washington Republicans did everything they could to keep her in Congress. But in the end, she walked away — and now, for the first time in years, this seat is open. For months, we’ve been building something strong across the North Country. Thousands of grassroots supporters stepping up. Communities ready for a change. People who want a representative who understands what it means to live and work here. We have a real opportunity to win, but we also know what we’re up against. Republicans need this seat; their House majority is razor-thin. And they know we have a real shot at winning this race. My opponent, Republican Anthony Constantino, is backed by big money and ready to spend millions of his own money to buy this seat. But we’re not giving up. This campaign is different. It’s about sending a dairy farmer to Congress, not another politician backed by wealth and insiders. And I’m ready to fight for the community that raised me, and with your help, we can prove this seat isn’t for sale. If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Blake Gendebien and Heartland Patriots will process instantly: Thanks, Blake | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: ads on the air
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=8895%2E400544%2EdYVenY)
---
I've got some HUGE news, friend: **We JUST launched our FIRST ad of 2026!

With the GOP spending whatever it takes to flip our seat red, and my opponents blanketing the airwaves with lies and misinformation, it was vital for me to fight back, reach voters in all corners of the state, and get the correct narrative out there: I am the fighter ready to lead New Mexico. **
But running TV ads isn’t cheap, and with all of these attack ads against me, I need to make sure my ad stays on the air. I'm personally counting on you to chip in to our $30,000 goal so we can keep them live across New Mexico.

[Please chip in $5 or whatever you can spare now to help fund our TV ads and keep New Mexico blue.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7647?refcode=jtk433-fr-nd&t=2&akid=8895%2E400544%2EdYVenY)
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7253?refcode=jtk433-fr-nd&t=3&akid=8895%2E400544%2EdYVenY)
---
Right now, we have opponents ready to bring their extremist agenda into our state. They're self-funding millionaires: One is funded by a Kristi Noem donor and hundreds of thousands of dollars in Trump donors, and one has even pledged to put $2 million of his own money into his campaign.

With so much money pouring into our race, we run the risk of being outspent and drowned out on the airwaves. But I refuse to let that happen.
**I'm running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support from folks like you chipping in $5 so I can compete with these self-funded multimillionaires.**
_[**Please, will you pitch in now to help keep our ads live? Every dollar moves us toward a future where every New Mexican can thrive.**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7253?refcode=jtk433-fr-nd&t=4&akid=8895%2E400544%2EdYVenY)_
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7253?refcode=jtk433-fr-nd&t=5&akid=8895%2E400544%2EdYVenY)
---
Be Fierce,

Deb
|

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Without these emails, we’d lose. And Jon needs you on this one.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
It goes without saying, our campaign sends a number of fundraising emails to help reelect Jon Ossoff to the Senate.
# [](https://act.electjon.com/go/4589?t=1&akid=2056%2E5691347%2EVAZ5zf)

**You deserve an explanation.**
It goes without saying, our campaign sends a number of fundraising emails to help reelect Jon Ossoff to the Senate. So we wanted to take a moment to explain what these messages mean to this race ... and it is no exaggeration to say: The future of our country.
First, this is how we fund this campaign. The overwhelming majority of the money we raise to defend this seat comes from people like you chipping in what they can, when they can, to reelect Jon. Period.
Without these emails, we'd be absolutely overwhelmed by Republican spending and attacks from Super PACs and almost certainly lose this race.
And while we'd love to raise all the money we need to win in a single email, it doesn't work like that either. So we have to send these emails and hope enough people respond each day to keep us afloat.
Hopefully, today is that day for you. Because right now, we're facing a new $44 million in spending to defeat Jon. That makes this moment make-or-break for the campaign — and by extension, control of the Senate.
So when you see us fight back against these attacks, rise in the polls, and win this race — it's the response to emails like this that make it possible.
Jon doesn't expect you to donate to every request, but he hopes you understand the importance of this moment. Which is why we're asking:
[**Can you please rush a contribution to Jon Ossoff's reelection campaign today? Our average online donation is around $30. Many give more. Some give less. So we wanted to take a moment to explain what these messages mean to this race ... and it is no exaggeration to say: The future of our country. First, this is how we fund this campaign. The overwhelming majority of the money we raise to defend this seat comes from people like you chipping in what they can, when they can, to reelect Jon. Period. Without these emails, we'd be absolutely overwhelmed by Republican spending and attacks from Super PACs and almost certainly lose this race. And while we'd love to raise all the money we need to win in a single email, it doesn't work like that either. So we have to send these emails and hope enough people respond each day to keep us afloat. Hopefully, today is that day for you. Because right now, we're facing a new $44 million in spending to defeat Jon. That makes this moment make-or-break for the campaign — and by extension, control of the Senate. So when you see us fight back against these attacks, rise in the polls, and win this race — it's the response to emails like this that make it possible. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: The difference between me and Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2166%2E791427%2EsvgpXB)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4868?t=2&akid=2166%2E791427%2EsvgpXB)
Friend, I was born in Somalia at the start of a brutal civil war. My mother died when I was just two. My family fled the country and spent four long years living in a refugee camp in Kenya.
When we were eventually granted asylum in America, we didn’t have a penny to our name. It wasn’t easy to get by, and it became clear that my father’s minimum wage paycheck wasn’t going to be enough.
I started off cleaning office buildings, and throughout high school and college, worked as a cashier, security guard, educator, and policy analyst to make ends meet.
Throughout my life, I faced harassment for my religion, my hijab, my race, my accent – you name it. But I found my home and my community in Minneapolis. In 2018, I ran for Congress and, along with Rashida Tlaib, became the first Muslim woman to serve in this historic body.
**Donald Trump wouldn’t have lasted a minute in my shoes.**
Trump is the definition of privileged. He was born into wealth and was handed the best education and experience in his industry that money could buy. He was still a massive failure who bankrupted businesses and made a laughingstock of his family name.
My story taught me the value of hard work. It taught me the promise of the American dream. It taught me to have compassion for those in tough situations. It taught me the importance of loving your neighbor, not hating them. These are things Trump couldn’t possibly understand.
Dr. King famously said: “Darkness cannot drive out darkness; only light can do that. Hate cannot drive out hate; only love can do that.”
Yes, Trump is a vile, hate-filled individual who is driving our nation to the brink of chaos and letting billionaires pick our pockets. He can lie about me and inspire crazy people to threaten and try to attack me.
But I will not stop fighting, joyfully, for my fellow neighbors. I will not stop loving America and dreaming of a future where everyone has the healthcare, housing, education, safety, and affordable life that they deserve.
[**Friend — I am asking you to chip in today and help me keep fighting for the American dream in the face of Trump’s violent fascism and attacks on my community. We have to send a message that compassion beats bullies. Use this link or one of the buttons below:**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-apr26.yEIO3a&refcode=em260411-1-180&t=3&akid=2166%2E791427%2EsvgpXB)

Trump planning “next conquest”

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

Let’s be clear: under Trump’s SAVE Act, a driver’s license or military ID wouldn’t be enough to register to vote. It’s not even a voter ID law; it’s a blatant voter suppression law.
Trump is grasping at straws to suppress turnout to hold onto his slim majority. He knows that passing the SAVE Act and suppressing votes is the only way to push his dangerous agenda forward.
We have to block the SAVE Act in Congress, but Republicans will ALWAYS bow down to Trump’s demands unless we show them just how UNPOPULAR the SAVE Act is.
[**_Folks, we need 100 local Democrats to add their name to our petition to stop the SAVE Act. Without enough signatures, Republicans will pass this bill and ruin our chances in November!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129263118/613763818/975344700?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2026.04.11_SAVE-Act_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2Q4NzgxNC1iNTM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x7ksNboBwPnO-9YX20bAsHlkoA5kpuPr0qLuJYMM82o=&emci=30fae4eb-2a34-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=f3d87814-b535-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=7659029)

clean_body: Under Trump’s SAVE Act, a driver’s license or military ID wouldn’t be enough to register to vote. Trump’s so-called “SAVE America” Act is a dangerous attempt to make it harder for the American people to cast their ballots this November. | | Let’s be clear: under Trump’s SAVE Act, a driver’s license or military ID wouldn’t be enough to register to vote. It’s not even a voter ID law; it’s a blatant voter suppression law. Trump is grasping at straws to suppress turnout to hold onto his slim majority. He knows that passing the SAVE Act and suppressing votes is the only way to push his dangerous agenda forward. We have to block the SAVE Act in Congress, but Republicans will ALWAYS bow down to Trump’s demands unless we show them just how UNPOPULAR the SAVE Act is. | Kirsten * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: This is the broken system in one quote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=2000%2E251025%2E0YOfDu ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=2000%2E251025%2E0YOfDu ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter, this is the
broken system, boiled down into one quote:

[ A ]A post from @FactPostNews: 'Trump: We can't take care of daycare. We're
a big country. We're fighting wars. It's not possible for us to take care
of daycare, Medicaid, Medicare, all these things.'

Donald Trump, MAGA Republicans, and the billionaires who fund their
campaigns want us to think that the richest country in the world “can’t”
afford Medicare for All and other essential programs.

I call BS.

There’s always money for war. Trump’s illegal war with Iran has already
cost taxpayers over $46 BILLION dollars.

So it’s not that we “can’t” afford these things.

It’s that our politics have been captured by corporations, defense
contractors, and billionaire donors who profit when our tax dollars go
overseas instead of back into our communities.

Peter,
Trump is just a loud, ugly symptom of this underlying disease — a disease
that far too many politicians go along with.

I’ve spent my career fighting for a different kind of politics, one where
we invest in people here at home, pass Medicare for All, and build an
economy that uplifts working people. And most importantly, stop funding
endless wars that drain our resources and cost innocent lives.

But here’s the truth: The same interests that benefit from this broken
system are going to spend whatever it takes to stop campaigns like ours.

I’m the only candidate in this race who’s never taken money from corporate
PACs, and never will. That’s why I’m counting on your support. [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260411-1-ak.ngBlAa&amount=10&refcode=em20260411-1993&t=1004&akid=2000%2E251025%2E0YOfDu ]Can you
chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help us build a campaign
strong enough to take on the people who profit from this broken system?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260411-1-ak.ngBlAa&amount=10&refcode=em20260411-1993&t=1023&akid=2000%2E251025%2E0YOfDu ]Donate $10 ››

In solidarity,

Abdul

When the Freedom Caucus gathered at **Mar-a-Lago** , it wasn't a photo opportunity. It was a war council. clean_body: | | | The Freedom Caucus Fund held a top-level meeting at Mar-a-Lago. I want to tell you what happened inside that room, because not everyone gets to know. When the Freedom Caucus gathered at Mar-a-Lago , it wasn't a photo opportunity. It was a war council. And one issue dominated the room above everything else: The SAVE America Act. This isn't just another bill moving through Congress. This is the Freedom Caucus's number one priority , championed by HFC Policy Chair Chip Roy and backed by every single member of the House Freedom Caucus. Now I'm asking you to match that commitment. Will you rush an emergency contribution to the Freedom Caucus Fund today, so we can take what started at Mar-a-Lago all the way to the Senate floor and into law? Conviction alone doesn't win Senate fights. Resources do. The moment our members walked out of Mar-a-Lago , committed to this battle, the Radical Left's dark money machine started mobilizing. Lobbyists are being activated. Attack ads are being written. They are betting that the energy from that room fades before it reaches the Senate floor. Peter , what was decided at Mar-a-Lago deserves to be backed up with everything we've got. The Freedom Caucus showed up at the home of MAGA and made a promise to fight for election integrity with everything they have. We are sending this exclusive update to our top 12% of supporters because you’ve been in the trenches with us since the beginning of the SAVE America Act. I’m asking you to respond with a donation of $5, $15, $25, or even more today to fuel our fight to get the SAVE America Act all the way to President Trump’s desk. Peter, can I count on you today? | | | About Freedom Caucus Fund: Freedom Caucus Fund is committed to equipping the strongest conservative fighters in America with the resources they need to win. We support candidates who defend the Constitution, champion limited government, and stand unapologetically for the liberty, safety, and prosperity of the American people. name: Joe Jaworski
subject: It’s win or go home
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski Campaign
body:
As you know, we are in a high-stakes runoff for the Democratic nomination for Texas Attorney General. This is it. It’s win or go home. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/last-night-14194066?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=fcc645e7b4&e=5d8d80652b)

| | , Good morning. It’s Joe. As you know, we are in a high-stakes runoff for the Democratic nomination for Texas Attorney General. This is it. **It’s win or go home.** If you've been following this campaign, you know where my heart is. I want to be your nominee, and I want to take this fight all the way to November to defeat the nastiness and incompetence we’re seeing in MAGA government. We are decent people, and we deserve decent leadership. **But I can't do it alone.** I am asking for your help right now. [**Please make a contribution today to help us fund a strong, compelling video ad that will reach voters across Texas in this runoff. This is how we break through. This is how we win.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=3bd9cc5412&e=5d8d80652b) Early voting by mail begins in less than two weeks. Election Day is May 26. The window is short, and the time to act is **now**. If you’ve ever thought about helping, this is the moment. Thank you, my friend. [**Will you contribute to our effort right now so that we can get our message to voters before Election Day?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=23fb1f258a&e=5d8d80652b) Onward,

**

I want to be honest with you. In Washington, we’re surrounded by polls, charts, and reports telling us what voters are supposed to think heading into November. My team sees that data every day. **_But none of it tells me what life actually feels like for you, Peter, in your area._** It doesn’t show how rising prices are affecting your family. It doesn’t capture what’s changed in your community. And it definitely doesn’t reflect the frustrations people carry quietly every day. That’s why I’m asking you to take a few minutes to complete the [**2026 Republican Policy Assessment.**](https://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=c40bacd159f740e4880eb1f8dbe9251f&_e=1LqZuy-myv9pH9F2_VD19C3_9v4buYYB6GHOLqzkfoSaMW1Nk1fXjowXMUZzgOHMurcHj9pg8HMyxTOElDg5UfsDU7KXHQ9x5lqC7wVdcxZLzssecSH6rQkmB0-TQWAXlJ6e31nSdwyuHzPCk-aewrMf-5J7bUMlwUrs1THtXexM4pcBn-n2-8-qYb7asJ3VEJFi5O00vaNrGvpm9GKqpSmmybpikWWokSW850ELaYsOWGCZoGnpp57-wQUb1qCjzLHQPBQdCT-rgA68MkolGMtLId-B28CXvy0Vf24uGNFMWq1903jSC2kdQsRYGZjHeQcLUFyDqIAxykk-_d3sZsMb5xq_f-4oxl6UH2DWxZVXxVfrFSub2ZqjkYe7RfuTAmZHViqcOdFai2365ilN1qNh-rjC_L7lCPHAOTNQYoqhM_bK2w1eVdyhuSqv1CA8KFZXIluJOGfDs-gLtD6tNkqoq21Mx6vwvaWS-ZTsZr-i3_4o40ZFKu6eosS_gl9oiUT1rmWORolGbCd2ehD0lcoZ-RdpdjtZAjzkY4HCf2vV9uYT1PlGRARorQXzunfa6-iMGAOpwiMLo3gITrtDkQ2kHrwO9QRdlf8wt_VtRkG7lA0_b572O0LWL7r0Wp_xZF_pUhSvfhZUmQw5SV4qrXwljA9qDUmJkPViZ0-34PkuCHP3kq1cvJ7Uuh3NG8z1HMlpEorhLjSuigViRe4e_iVgPH2T5lhdN8m-Rj3VXLS5sdZW0Km6dWMIaGlNQaTdPlftZFUFanaOXKTVm-0vw_W5IYLTnulhX0XTPvT4mBB2N8B-brrTirE0KGbXQ-nP6bq3FiOLJ5s3pQA__LPqJEnms9cGigsnBsxWCUKowgDUKjbOZh2m8pNKENlUGkpOWnoWYUW7SWj0k2Hz_bi4h1fVTkwTXzy9Tiykts5iOvAWkqiIn4PyCbofN-QYmx_2nmi9PMykXQNlZfBpiqID_YjJwFHvSqFzDYhrEIec7J4%3D)

Your input helps senior leadership understand what matters before decisions are locked in for November. It gives a voice to conservatives who don’t show up in polling models or headlines. If there’s something you think Washington isn’t getting right,_or isn’t hearing enough,_ this is the moment to say it. I want to know what you’re actually seeing and dealing with right now, Peter, and how I and other leaders can help fix what isn’t working. [**Complete your assessment here!**](https://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=c40bacd159f740e4880eb1f8dbe9251f&_e=1LqZuy-myv9pH9F2_VD19C3_9v4buYYB6GHOLqzkfoSaMW1Nk1fXjowXMUZzgOHMurcHj9pg8HMyxTOElDg5UfsDU7KXHQ9x5lqC7wVdcxZLzssecSH6rQkmB0-TQWAXlJ6e31nSdwyuHzPCk-aewrMf-5J7bUMlwUrs1THtXexM4pcBn-n2-8-qYb7asJ3VEJFi5O00vaNrGvpm9GKqpSmmybpikWWokSW850ELaYsOWGCZoGnpp57-wQUb1qCjzLHQPBQdCT-rgA68MkolGMtLId-B28CXvy0Vf24uGNFMWq1903jSC2kdQsRYGZjHeQcLUFyDqIAxykk-_d3sZsMb5xq_f-4oxl6UH2DWxZWYJqefrj79iTbvMProo6F5wm4D5l7X7RiacU5otPs8KLvuaZLQDZVh0GeN68qT2_I2OSAgHhf2KG_mheERnoW8L8Mn_WxJt9iNvZAuks4sVrwZ5l6AiycmRxplPKu6IP7aT77Gre07NKIpB410xyb6DS07wSJH8scdQSk01URXWGYpWdWyHQxv8XBij1B-Tf68U9lFak_91X4NuCeLsarwkDGkM-DkPaM-MqlvJZ6uUm8vhbxyO5GXZFe4vahMc55NbTSRRYDdxLmuh7vm0Te320GYeHdpvh-StEF6yglk5y6vXn5xg1GNJ9rhU5QW8KLY3IELiJ3L6mkAoGYtZde-5_1V1FBAbT-mLVhYrke6LKpIK6b9Ea0zNN3JPQ8rZaVQdZyaQgWbT-HuAn7iDtmZ6Kaj0LzczGbbJgk_iK9502s7sLT3TKvrhoQoVdjhw5_p-f7MlzQLIF8B5xTnyR3Q09z6AK9BaTIWBkTxLVL3DNySeeME60ZZNDbx0fkJp-CJ07siSE4FDutjMF4dG4oz0OCLkhzFGT2BUcHFpAbkPTM5vnAtoFSTWXrWzAFYRczgpxV9ELPB_CaqO1E2sVY1FnF339VftBwSVmUrcXO1xjZYDbVyjyE4BFY11kIydtI%3D) Thank you for taking the time,

I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing _everything_ they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?

clean_body: If there’s something you think Washington isn’t getting right, this is the moment to say it. | | | I want to be honest with you. In Washington, we’re surrounded by polls, charts, and reports telling us what voters are supposed to think heading into November. My team sees that data every day. But none of it tells me what life actually feels like for you, Peter, in your area. It doesn’t show how rising prices are affecting your family. It doesn’t capture what’s changed in your community. And it definitely doesn’t reflect the frustrations people carry quietly every day. That’s why I’m asking you to take a few minutes to complete the Your input helps senior leadership understand what matters before decisions are locked in for November. It gives a voice to conservatives who don’t show up in polling models or headlines. If there’s something you think Washington isn’t getting right,or isn’t hearing enough, this is the moment to say it. I want to know what you’re actually seeing and dealing with right now, Peter, and how I and other leaders can help fix what isn’t working. Thank you for taking the time, Katie Britt United States Senator | | I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong. Faith. Family. Freedom. The Left is doing everything they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored. From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul. This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere. Will you stand with me? Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

From day one, this campaign has been scrappy and ambitious.
Like I did when I ran for Attorney General, I committed to showing up everywhere. Not just the Front Range, but more rural counties in the rest of our state, too. I believe in hearing directly from you, the people I’m looking to serve — not “politics as usual”.
As your next governor, I’m bringing both creative problem-solving and a commitment to upholding the rule of law to the table. And I’m honored that just days ago, this campaign won the State Assembly.
**But friends, the June primary is getting closer every day. And I’ve never succeeded alone.**

### In our childhood, every sports fantasy, every dream was possible and then... life.
Apr 11

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2c8a400a-6431-4e47-b63b-2d0417d6256c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
* * *
### **Help us defeat the mainstream media and promote capitalism and American exceptionalism.**
### **[Support The Capitalist, become a paid subscriber today:](https://substack.com/redirect/2c8a400a-6431-4e47-b63b-2d0417d6256c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Subscribe Here](https://substack.com/redirect/2c8a400a-6431-4e47-b63b-2d0417d6256c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
One can better understand the men in their life, be it father, brother, son, husband, by understanding their deep, borderline obsessive fascination with golf.
These men love golf for a reason much deeper than any stated one. Sure, the golf course is a place for legitimate business deals and genuine male bonding, and the "I just need to get away from the wife and kids" excuse is easy albeit simplistic. Exercise. Fresh air. "Doctor says I need to walk more". All valid. But the main reason, the profound, existential reason why men golf touches the very core of his being.
In his youth he had a dream, and golf keeps it, and by extension him, alive.
Golf, as an act of fighting inevitable death.
Golf, keeping men alive in hope.
Let me explain.
* * *
* * *

# [Insane Cards Charging 0% Interest Into 2027 (Some With Welcome Bonuses Up To $250)](https://substack.com/redirect/46a0691b-98e5-4ba0-991a-1d413abc7a96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/46a0691b-98e5-4ba0-991a-1d413abc7a96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* If you have outstanding credit card debt, getting a new 0% intro APR credit card could help ease the pressure while you pay down your balances.
* Our credit card experts identified top credit cards that are perfect for anyone looking to pay down debt and not add to it!
* Some are even offering generous welcome bonuses up to $250! Click through to see what all the hype is about.

[Get yours now](https://substack.com/redirect/46a0691b-98e5-4ba0-991a-1d413abc7a96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
Most men played sports in their youth, and as boys, despite being clumsy, chubby, or uncoordinated, they dreamed big. Every kid who ever shot a basketball played out the pro-sports fantasy with a TV announcer:
_**" Turner on the line with the 1 and 1 with the game tied and only 2 seconds on the clock, these are the most important free throws of his life..."**_
or, for those playing whiffle ball in the yard heard and old-time radio broadcast:
_**" Bases loaded in the bottom of the ninth with a time game folks, Turner comes to bat and this could decide the world series..."**_
Every kid who played every sport did this. Football, hockey... I bet even kids in other countries playing that silly thing called soccer imaged themselves in such iconic moments. The game on the line, the fans with collective hearts in throats, the one moment immortalized in everything from "Rudy" to the poem "Casey at the Bat" to "Hoosiers". The monumental baseball movie which made even the toughest of men hold back tears "Field of Dreams" is a reminder of that which gives heart to the peewee leagues.
In our childhood, every sports fantasy, every dream was possible.
And then... life. First, our bodies started to change, and with change often came a lack of change. We could not run as fast or hit as hard as other boys. Coordination did not improve. Growth spurt sputtered, and when the distance between the bases became regulation, the ability to make the throw to first did not come with it.
I stopped baseball at 11 years old, and then basketball at 14, first cut from the team then giving up as I was mature enough to see the truth. My sports dream ended.
Forget the pros, forget college scholarships, forget even High School sports and Varsity Jacket with the white leather sleeves.
I was now on the path of most boys. I was the 99%.
* * *
* * *
### **Help us defeat the mainstream media and promote capitalism and American exceptionalism.**
### **[Support The Capitalist, become a paid subscriber today:](https://substack.com/redirect/2c8a400a-6431-4e47-b63b-2d0417d6256c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Subscribe Here](https://substack.com/redirect/2c8a400a-6431-4e47-b63b-2d0417d6256c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
Boys turn into men, men turn into husbands, homeowners, dads, members of the community. Life happens, grass needs to be mowed, fences painted, bills paid, cars inspected, and every day unravels as a litany of innumerable responsibilities. We grow, we age, and for many men, tragically, the unfulfilled dreams of childhood turn into resentment.
The mid-life crisis understood as backlash.
Not all men, but some. And for those men golf... golf sustains their childhood dream. That once mediocre 12-year-old athlete can, but once a month, have an outstanding moment on the golf course, and with it the fire of childhood dreams burns bright. "Maybe, just maybe, I could have been a pro golfer"... a wave of true rejuvenation.
Those men are not looking for a return to childhood. They are not immature or shirking responsibilities or wishing for another life. It is more complex than that. The dream gives hope, and hope makes life easier to live.
For the unfulfilled man bogged down by life, golf is the source of eternal dreams. That man can so easily convince himself that, but for work, but for family, but for Preston's soccer practice and Sophia's ballet classes, but for the business convention in Orlando or the Perkins Merger making him work late nights, but for life itself, he could, just maybe, have been a pro.
"And thousands of visor-wearing fans screaming 'get in the hole!' after I tee off. And Jim Nantz would whisper praise about me on TV. That would be me squatting with the caddy studying the green, high-fiving admirers along the fairway, fist-pumping on TV after I birdied."
Golf: keeping men alive in hope. Yes, the knees hurt, and when that quarter fell to the floor and rolled under the bed he said "welp, looks like I lost a quarter" knowing the pain of retrieval was not worth twenty-five cents. Yes, he's further from a six pack than he's ever been in his life, and the Easter Basket is not helping matters. Yes, he's middle aged, he's not going to get the promotion, he's not going to start that business, and he's missed out on every IPO which his idiot brother-in-law reminds him every Christmas.
But yesterday? Yesterday his first drive was 270 yards, as straight as an arrow, and even the foursome behind shouted praise. "I betcha if I could play, just a few more times a week, I'd be a scratch golfer". The dream is alive.
And so is he.
It is no longer life that beat him when puberty denied height, strength, coordination, a throwing arm, a running back's speed, a hitter's swing, an athlete's body, but it is life that gets in the way of his champions heart and a winner's spirit. And that he can accept.
"Yes," he says to himself "you'll never be a pro-golfer, but you could. You really could if not for responsibility and duty. You're good enough to be a pro."
Life did not beat you, champ. You beat life. And that Saturday you spent mulching, well, it was you choosing to be an adult, to be a dad, to be a homeowner, to be a husband, to do your duty. Life did not beat you, champ. It did not.
So, this week, as the Master's is on TV and men of all ages and shapes, gather to talk golf, watch golf, play golf, as men fake practice their swing while you're talking to them, getting their grip just right on the pretend club in their hand, be kind. The dream is more than just a love of the sport, but it is a love of life itself, a life imagined, a life accepted, a life that gives hope and a hope that makes it easier to live life.
Let him have his golf. Let him have his golf dream. Even grown men need to have dreams.
Honor and courage.
* * *
* * *
_**Daniel Turner is the founder and executive director of Power The Future, a national nonprofit organization that advocates for American energy jobs. He also runs a sheep and cattle farm in rural Virginia. Contact him at daniel@powerthefuture.com and follow him on Twitter @DanielTurnerPTF**_

Peter,
I got the SAVE America Act******MANDATING VOTER ID****** passed by the House but it STILL hasn’t been signed into law.
**_SO, DON’T THANK ME YET._**
