name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: No one is this lucky
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Warren for Senate: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/370?source=em-header&t=1001&akid=2854%2E4032634%2EH18bso

In the days leading up to U.S. strikes on
Iran, traders on platforms like Polymarket placed perfectly-timed bets on
the outcome — some accounts winning hundreds of thousands of dollars, and
some made millions.

Was that a lightning in a bottle moment? I’m skeptical.

Before the capture of Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro, there was a
sudden burst of activity on prediction markets — and anonymous again
accounts walked away with hundreds of thousands of dollars in profit.

Heck of a guess, huh?

Let’s be clear: This wasn’t luck. Or some genius prediction. This is what
it looks like when people are trading on information the public doesn’t
have. There’s a term for that: Insider trading.

So I led more than 40 of my colleagues in Congress in demanding that the
CFTC and the Office of Government Ethics investigate, issue guidance to
federal employees, and brief Congress on the steps they're taking to stop
this behavior.

[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-prediction/?source=EW_EMZ30R_BET_ENG_20260408_F&t=1006&akid=2854%2E4032634%2EH18bso ]Prediction markets have sparked a golden age of insider trading — but
the party may be coming to an end.

[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-prediction/?source=EW_EMZ30R_BET_ENG_20260411_F&t=1007&akid=2854%2E4032634%2EH18bso ]I want to know if you’re with us too. Add your name if you believe
these markets should follow the same basic rules as every other financial
market — no insider trading, no manipulation, no exceptions.

[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-prediction/?source=EW_EMZ30R_BET_ENG_20260411_F&t=1008&akid=2854%2E4032634%2EH18bso ]ADD YOUR NAME

Researchers have now identified over $140 million in suspicious,
“anomalous” profits tied to these markets.

If these were SEC-regulated markets, there would be an automatic
investigation over every single one of these trades. But when the market
is unregulated, insiders have free rein to manipulate it however And it
gets even more dangerous.

Because this isn’t just about money — it’s about power.

When people can bet on whether a war will happen, or whether a foreign
leader will fall, we have to ask: Are these markets reflecting reality or
shaping it?

Think about how dangerous the answer to that question could be.

Someone with financial skin in the game may have influence over whether a
military strike happens. That's a profound threat to our national security
and our democracy.

But right now? The watchdogs are asleep.

Trump regulators are dragging their feet, even as these markets grow into
a multi-billion-dollar industry with serious risks of manipulation and
insider abuse.

And the people in charge? Too busy protecting powerful interests to
protect the public.

Trump’s CFTC chair is a crypto bro more focused on promoting industries
the Trump family profits from than investigating insider trading. His SEC
enforcement director just resigned after being blocked from pursuing cases
involving Trump's allies.

I've spent my career fighting for an economy that works for everyone — not
just the wealthy and well-connected.

And let’s be clear: this isn’t a fair market. It’s a money grab. And it’s
dangerous. I’m not going to sit by while a handful of insiders turn global
crises into their personal payday.

[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-prediction/?source=EW_EMZ30R_BET_ENG_20260411_F&t=1009&akid=2854%2E4032634%2EH18bso ]Add your name if you agree that our economy and our democracy should
never be a game rigged for the rich and well-connected.

Thanks for being part of this,

Elizabeth

Trump regulators are dragging their feet, even as these markets grow into a multi-billion-dollar industry with serious risks of manipulation and insider abuse. And the people in charge? Too busy protecting powerful interests to protect the public. Trump’s CFTC chair is a crypto bro more focused on promoting industries the Trump family profits from than investigating insider trading. His SEC enforcement director just resigned after being blocked from pursuing cases involving Trump's allies. I've spent my career fighting for an economy that works for everyone — not just the wealthy and well-connected. And let’s be clear: this isn’t a fair market. It’s a money grab. And it’s dangerous. I’m not going to sit by while a handful of insiders turn global crises into their personal payday. [ ]Add your name if you agree that our economy and our democracy should never be a game rigged for the rich and well-connected. body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
A Message from the Heartland: Why Rural Nebraska Matters
I highly recommend that every urban Republican periodically visit our more rural counties. What you'll discover there is a refreshing reminder of what makes America great: kindness, patriotism, enthusiasm, cooperation, generosity, and an unshakeable commitment to our shared values.
At least, that's what you find when our Party is led by men and women who genuinely reflect those same qualities.
Last night, I attended the Buffalo County Republican Convention. I mostly listened--and spoke only briefly--but I left deeply encouraged, grateful, and filled with pride in the hardworking people who form the bedrock of our nation and the backbone of our Party.
Every person in that room sacrificed precious hours of their time to be there. Volunteers were recognized for their tireless efforts organizing decorations, credentialing, the silent auction, registration, and countless other details. Officeholders, military veterans, and first responders received well-deserved applause. Candidates and their representatives were given a respectful forum to share their vision for the future.
Rural America serves as the great bulkhead in the cultural battles facing our country today. Those of us living in Nebraska's urban eastern corridor can too easily get distracted by the endless pettiness and partisan squabbling. We sometimes lose sight of what this fight is truly about: the preservation of our traditions, our constitutional freedoms, and the American way of life.
The men and women I visited with in Buffalo County are not taking their way of life for granted. They clearly understand that the values and communities they cherish are under threat from multiple directions. Yet rather than despair, these cheerful warriors are stepping up--donating their time, treasure, and talent to defend all that they hold dear.
None of us can afford to sit on the sidelines. We cannot assume someone else will do the work, write the checks, or provide the leadership. We have watched too many of our institutions--government, education, the media, and even some churches--crumble under the weight of self-serving egoists and pernicious corruption.
Now is the time to rally. Let us preserve what is good, true, and beautiful in our republic. Let us courageously let go of what no longer serves us--or what actively undermines us and the principles that made this country exceptional.
The heartland is awake. The foundation is strong. Let's join these rural patriots and recommit ourselves to the cultural and political war for our country.

For Nebraska, Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party

Republicans are working behind closed doors to privatize Social Security.
We must stop them.
That’s why I’m officially launching a critical petition to send the powerful message that our earned benefits are non-negotiable. Period. Full stop.
Seniors have paid into Social Security and worked hard to retire with dignity.
[We need to act now. Millions of Americans are depending on us to step up.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129269180/613778787/-1184644151?source=20260411_em_pet_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGFkZjJiYi1iNzM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sSiiLi6VJb113CzeOXOpc_eQoQ5HCe2qt2wYSEMnyzU=&emci=e8328ab5-b432-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=c0adf2bb-b735-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=21290350)

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family.

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. subject: This will decide if Trump’s agenda survives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
To Win Elections, We Need Organized, Relentless Action on the Ground!
---
| | | | | |

_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| Turning Point PAC | | | | | [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend,
---
The stakes for 2026 **_could not_** be higher.
Democrats are already organizing to flip the House and Senate.
If they succeed, they will immediately move to reverse President Trump’s border security wins, energy independence, tax cuts, and every America First priority we fought so hard to restore.
**The quiet work of the last two years could be erased in months.**

[DON’T LET THE DEMS WIN](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)
Our early-vote operation helped deliver all the swing states and put Trump back in the White House in 2024.
**[With your help](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NDN9AAwAAAAAAAHYvcf1-lYYJmsCpkTfk6J3bnSJrn50Ur29E7t95LOFY6rT9j_323h7ruOJTbpJSFotGfD3JLyuAT3hT3jBFImHuhIEmxN3bz0qDrUCFQ)** , we’ll provide the resources to scale this summer and WIN the election months before election day.
Full-time chasers are already in the field in Arizona and expanding to every battleground. We’re also endorsing the strongest America First fighters who will hold the line in Congress and key state races.
**The team Charlie Kirk built is carrying the mission forward without missing a beat.**
**[Every dollar you give](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)** to Turning Point PAC supports these proven programs: ballot chasing that actually moves votes and direct support for the candidates who will protect the gains we made in 2024.
**[The months ahead are when the real work gets done. Will you stand with us?](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)**
[DONATE $50](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)
[DONATE $100](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)
[DONATE $250](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)
[DONATE $500](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)
[DONATE $1000](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)
For the fight ahead,
Tyler Bowyer
Executive Director, Turning Point PAC
|
---
Non-Contribution Account (For TPPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TPPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: George Conway
subject: I voted for Trump. Now, I’m running to stop him.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP62/1/120031/images/Screen%20Shot%202026-01-08%20at%201.35.25%20PM.png]
I’m George Conway. Yes, that George Conway.
I put everything on the line to defeat Donald Trump.
First, I quit the Republican Party.
Then, I founded the Lincoln Project.
Now, I’m running for Congress.
I know how to beat MAGA better than anyone. I know what makes these people tick. So I’m officially running for Congress in NY-12.
Will you stand with me and split a donation between my campaign and Resist Reclaim Rebuild to help me raise $800,000 to launch my Democratic Campaign for Congress? → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-conway]
CHIP IN TO MY CAMPAIGN TODAY! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-shapiro]
Look, being a former Republican isn’t my whole story.
My mother immigrated from the Philippines as an organic chemist. I followed in her footsteps and majored in biochemistry before I went to Law School to pursue my true passion – Constitutional Law.
Looking back, the Constitution was my first love . At 10, I was obsessed with the Watergate Scandal. (Little did I know that was child's play compared to what Trump would do).
I know that sounds boring and nerdy, but the promise of our democracy, freedoms, and the rule of law fascinates me – and for years I thought Republicans upheld those same ideals.
I was so wrong. When I finally got a peek under the hood and saw what these lying, sleazebag, horrible MAGA loyalists were doing to our country, I couldn’t stomach it.
Let me be straight with you: Republicans are failing America, and as someone who’s been fighting Trump for years, I know exactly how to stop them.
It requires not running the same plays, election after election, hoping we’ll see different results. It means being bold and not afraid to fight fire with fire – like I’ve been doing at the cost of my career and reputation.
Look, Democrats’ success last November proved there’s hope. Trump may think he’s a king on a throne, but his wannabe dictatorship is built on a house of cards, and we are this close to toppling it.
If we can take back Congress for Democrats, we can cut Trump’s MAGA agenda off at the knees. To do it, we need a fearless candidate who knows what makes the MAGA machine tick, and who can rewrite the playbook and WIN.
That’s why I’m running, team. I’ve seen firsthand the devastation wrought by the selfishness and narcissism of Trump’s MAGA regime. We cannot let this be our future. If you’re with me, help me launch my campaign for Congress by splitting a donation between my campaign and Resist Reclaim Rebuild right now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-shapiro]
DONATE TODAY TO DISMANTLE MAGA! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-shapiro]
This is a fight for the future of our country, and I’m proud to have you with me.
Forward,
George Conway
Democrat for Congress in NY-12
Resist Reclaim Rebuild is an organization committed to helping Democrats win up and down the ballot, nationwide.
PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW.RESISTRECLAIMREBUILD.COM) AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE COMMITTEE.
Resist Reclaim Rebuild
1331 FLORIDA AVE NW
Washington, DC 20009
United States

MI-03 is the only blue district in West Michigan, surrounded by red.

Team,

Republicans have wanted this seat back ever since we flipped it in 2022. I’m the first Democrat in a CENTURY to hold this longtime Republican stronghold, and now they believe they have an opening.

MI-03 is the only blue district in West Michigan, surrounded by red. This makes our race **absolutely critical** in the fight to take back the House, and Republicans know it.

With a **new opponent backed by DeVos dark money and political analysts moving our race in Republicans’ favor** , the GOP is preparing to pounce on West Michigan with an outpouring of even more dark money.

Now more than ever, we need to show strong grassroots support if we are going to fight back and defend this seat. [_**Will you chip in $10 today to help us stay strong against this incoming wave of spending?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129270758/613782549/30495591?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2026-04-11_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTFhYTc4MS1iYjM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XopYSSBzeLypKHIqUZDcKimaP2AU2u8opSCdGlgto_Q=)

This makes our race absolutely critical in the fight to take back the House, and Republicans know it. With a new opponent backed by DeVos dark money and political analysts moving our race in Republicans’ favor , the GOP is preparing to pounce on West Michigan with an outpouring of even more dark money. Peter, if this week has proven anything, it’s that Donald Trump is entirely unfit for office and needs to be removed. That’s what I told _The Guardian_ this week. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129270784/613782570/1897324551?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20260411_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjFhYTc4MS1iYjM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZV7YPN3C-PMN7A1Du7oLDpFQQScZAEMhbgTfhiwVa_k=&emci=9f1aa781-bb35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=ab1aa781-bb35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=45157234) From day one of his presidency, Donald Trump has prioritized his own wealth and power over anything else, including the well-being of millions of Americans (even the ones who voted for him). His latest authoritarian move: taking our country to war with Iran. _As news of the truce broke on Tuesday night, Ansari said in a statement she was “momentarily relieved for the 90 million Iranians who just spent the worst 24 hours of their lives thinking they were about to face nothing short of a nuclear catastrophe”._ _But the Arizona Democrat maintained that Trump’s dire promises of genocide and war crimes warrant intervention by the cabinet or Congress. Earlier on Tuesday, Ansari warned that the president represents a clear and present danger to Iran, the US, and the world._ Trump has waged an unauthorized war with no strategy, no Congressional approval, and no accountability. The toll is staggering: thousands of civilians are dead, millions have become refugees, and 13 American servicemembers have died, with many more still at risk. _On the presidential campaign trail, Ansari noted, Trump promised an “America first” ideology that would keep the country out of bitter foreign entanglements such as those in Vietnam, Afghanistan and Iraq. Instead his second term has gone in the opposite direction, with the president launching military strikes on seven countries._ _“The one thing that even some Democrats were excited about when he was running for office was that he seemed to campaign on this promise of ending endless wars, and yet, over the last six months in particular, he has demonstrated he is not just a wannabe authoritarian but wants to be an emperor.”_ For too long, leaders in Washington have been too afraid to speak out. **But when our democracy and our country’s safety are at stake, we cannot be afraid to tell the truth and demand change.** _“Donald Trump does not care about Americans; he doesn’t care about democracy or freedom or human rights for the American people; so in why world would we ever believe that he cares about freedom or human rights or democracy for Iranian people? It is just a fantasy.”_ I’ve been a leading voice in calling for Trump to be removed from office. The stakes are too high to remain silent. This moment demands real action. **[Read the remainder of the article in The Guardian here to learn more about how I’m holding the Trump administration accountable.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129270785/613782571/1897324551?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20260411_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjFhYTc4MS1iYjM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZV7YPN3C-PMN7A1Du7oLDpFQQScZAEMhbgTfhiwVa_k=&emci=9f1aa781-bb35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=ab1aa781-bb35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=45157234)** | [READ MORE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129270786/613782572/1897324551?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20260411_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjFhYTc4MS1iYjM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZV7YPN3C-PMN7A1Du7oLDpFQQScZAEMhbgTfhiwVa_k=&emci=9f1aa781-bb35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=ab1aa781-bb35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=45157234)

On the presidential campaign trail, Ansari noted, Trump promised an “America first” ideology that would keep the country out of bitter foreign entanglements such as those in Vietnam, Afghanistan and Iraq. Instead his second term has gone in the opposite direction, with the president launching military strikes on seven countries. “The one thing that even some Democrats were excited about when he was running for office was that he seemed to campaign on this promise of ending endless wars, and yet, over the last six months in particular, he has demonstrated he is not just a wannabe authoritarian but wants to be an emperor.” For too long, leaders in Washington have been too afraid to speak out. But when our democracy and our country’s safety are at stake, we cannot be afraid to tell the truth and demand change. “Donald Trump does not care about Americans; he doesn’t care about democracy or freedom or human rights for the American people; so in why world would we ever believe that he cares about freedom or human rights or democracy for Iranian people? It is just a fantasy.” I’ve been a leading voice in calling for Trump to be removed from office. The stakes are too high to remain silent. This moment demands real action. | Thank you, and much more very soon. — Yassamin Ansari = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: News via Our Revolution
subject: Stop War. Stop Trump. Win the Midterms.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

NEWS FROM THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

HEADLINES: Stop Trump’s War | Merkley, Khanna weigh in | Primaries
Underway! | Dark Money Fight | Exciting New Endorsements | New
Merch | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

Trump’s War Is a Wake-Up Call. Trump has dragged us into a
catastrophic conflict — lives lost, costs rising, and now he’s
pushing billions in cuts at home to pay for more bombs abroad.

This is exactly why we must take back Congress and elect leaders who
will stand for peace and invest in our communities — not endless war
and destruction.

On Monday, nearly 100,000 people tuned in to Our Revolution’s LIVE
National Organizing Call to hear how we fight back — in the streets,
in Congress, and at the ballot box.

Senator Jeff Merkley laid it out clearly: “The Constitution gives
Congress the power of the purse and the power to declare war — and
those powers are being ignored, with devastating consequences.”

Sen. Merkley is standing up to unchecked executive power and fighting
to end these disastrous wars — and we’re proudly supporting him for
re-election.

Rep. Ro Khanna connected the dots between war, corruption, and
economic injustice: “This same elites send us to wars that don’t
benefit the American people while they rig the economy and enrich
themselves. They think they’re above the law — and people are fed
up.”

Ro is leading a push for Senate Democrats to reject any Trump
nominees for Attorney General unless they commit to full transparency
in the Epstein case and prosecutions. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37504?t=1011&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]Sign the petition here.

We need more fighters like Merkley and Khanna in Congress — and five
bold, people-powered candidates joined the call ready to take up that
fight.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35232?t=1012&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]Donate now to power our grassroots organizing and elect
working-class to win the primaries this spring and beat MAGA in
November.

★ ★ ★

[3]Fight Trump & The Oligarchs

★ ★ ★

ALL IN ON THE PRIMARIES!

Democratic primaries are happening right now, and our movement is
mobilizing. No Kings showed we can million in the streets — now we
need to get millions out to the polls.

We have a real shot to take back the House AND the Senate in November
and block the worst of Trump during his final years in office — but
we have to dig into the groundwork NOW.

And that’s exactly why Our Revolution is ramping up our voter turnout
operation across the country — we’re calling, texting, and
doorknocking our neighbors. Because every victory starts with
grassroots power.

★ ★ ★

On Monday’s call, Wala Blegay made it clear what kind of campaign
she’s running: “I took the People’s Pledge so folks know I’m serious
— no corporate money, no special interest money. And I’m challenging
my opponents to do the same.”

Wala is running in Maryland’s 5th District to bring bold,
people-powered leadership to a seat long held by establishment
insider Steny Hoyer.

A labor rights attorney, Prince George’s County Council Member, and
former Bernie delegate in 2016, she has spent her career fighting for
workers, expanding opportunity, and delivering for her community.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37505?t=1013&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]MAKE CALLS FOR WALA WITH OUR TEAM

★ ★ ★

Educator, nonprofit leader, and now our endorsed candidate for
Congress in CA-01, Audrey Denney spoke to the urgency facing
communities in rural California:

“Hospital closures and wildfires are already hitting families hard.
We need bold solutions like Medicare for All — and leaders who fight
for people, not corporations,” she said Monday.

Audrey is running to bring real representation to a region that has
been long overlooked — where parts of the district were held by
Republicans for 50 years. From food security to strengthening local
economies, Audrey has built a reputation for putting people first.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37506?t=1014&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]MAKE CALLS FOR AUDREY WITH OUR TEAM

★ ★ ★

Running for Congress in a longtime working class district in Ohio
that has recently gone red, Brian Poindexter spoke to what unites us.

“I don’t care if you shower before work or after work — we all have
to work for a living. Voters just want someone who’s going to fight
for them and for working people.”

A union ironworker and city councilman, Brian’s message cuts through
the noise: fair wages, affordable healthcare, and a secure retirement
— the “holy trinity” of economic justice that resonates with voters
across party lines.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35232?t=1015&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]We’ve got a movement to build and an election to win. Donate today
to elect working-class fighters and stop MAGA.

★ ★ ★

PA ENDORSEMENTS

In red district in Pennsylvania’s 7th, Bob Brooks’ run for Congress
is bringing working-class voters back to the movement. A firefighter
and union leader, he’s taking on a broken system that’s left
communities behind.

On Monday’s call, he spoke to a major shift happening on the ground:
“It’s one thing to feel left behind — it’s another when people
realize they’ve been lied to. They’re angry, and they’re starting to
come back because they want someone who will actually fight for
them.”

From rising costs to endless war to corruption and Epstein cover-ups,
Bob is speaking directly to the frustration people feel — and
offering a real alternative grounded in progressive values and
working-class solidarity.

★ ★ ★

Our candidate for Congress in PA-03, Chris Rabb, didn’t hold back:
“In the bluest district in the country, we should have a true
progressive fighting for Medicare for All and union rights — not
another status quo politician.”

Chris is a longtime state rep and community leader, and he’s making
it clear, “any blue will do” isn’t good enough when working people
are still being left behind.

For years, Chris has taken on the establishment, introducing bold
legislation and refusing corporate PAC money. Now, in an open-seat
race, he’s the only candidate offering true transformational change —
not politics as usual.

And, don’t forget about down-ballot races! We’re backing a slate of
progressives running for state House and Senate in Pennsylvania —
where they can make a real difference in the lives of working people
in the Keystone State.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35232?t=1016&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]This is a critical election year, and we have a lot of work ahead
of us. Donate to make sure we have the resources to get these elect
working class fighters and defeat MAGA in the Midterms.

And, don’t forget about down-ballot races! We’re backing a slate of
progressives running for state House and Senate in Pennsylvania —
where they can make a real difference in the lives of working people
in the Keystone State.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35232?t=1017&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]This is a critical election year, and we have a lot of work ahead
of us. Donate to make sure we have the resources to get these elect
working class fighters and defeat MAGA in the Midterms.

★ ★ ★

MORE ENDORSEMENTS!

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution stands with Brad Lander in his run for Congress in
NY-10 — a proven leader with a track record of delivering for working
families and taking on corporate power.

As NYC Comptroller and former Council Member, he’s fought for
workers’ rights, affordable housing, and an economy that works for
the many — not the few.

Now, he’s leading the fight against big money by taking the People’s
Pledge - rejecting dark and corporate money - and challenging his
opponents to do the same.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution is happy to endorse Aisha Wahab for Congress in
CA-14. A State Senator and daughter of Afghan refugees, Aisha has
been a leading voice for housing, labor rights, and affordability.

She’s fought to expand tenant protections, lower costs, and stand up
for communities too often left behind. She’s exactly the kind of
bold, people-first leadership we need in Congress.

★ ★ ★

We’re proud to endorse Dr. Adam Hamawy for Congress in NJ-12 — combat
trauma surgeon, veteran, and lifelong humanitarian.

Dr. Adam Hamawy has spent decades saving lives — from Iraq to Gaza to
emergency rooms in NJ. Now he’s running on a simple, powerful
message: healthcare, not bombs.

He supports Medicare for All, and he's fighting to unrig our economy
and put people over profit. This is the kind of leadership we need.

Click here to edit this text block

★ ★ ★

COLORADO SLATE

In addition to endorsing David Seligman for Colorado Attorney
General, we’re also endorsing three great candidates running in
Colorado to bring real change at the state and federal level.

Julie Gonzales for U.S. Senate and Melat Kiros for U.S. Congress in
Colorado’s 1st District are both strong proponents for Medicare for
All, immigrant protections, worker rights, and housing justice.

And, at the state level, Kenny Van Nguyen is running for House
District 33. The son of Vietnamese refugees, Nguyen is dedicated to
public service and bringing about diverse leadership in Colorado.

★ ★ ★

OREGON SLATE

In addition to supporting Sen. Jeff Merkley’s re-election campaign in
Oregon, Our Revolution is proudly supporting four amazing
progressives for State House seats.

Tammy Carpenter (HD-27), John “Waz” Wasielewski (HD-38), Travis
Nelson (HD-44), and David Osborne (HD-52). Each of them stand for
working families and have pledged to stand up to oligarchy and
corporate power.

★ ★ ★

Analilia Mejia sent shockwaves through the establishment last month
when she pulled off a major upset against big money to win the
primary in New Jersey’s 11th District.

Now, the general election will be held on Thursday — Bernie’s former
political director takes on a Republican to fill this Congress seat!
She knows we have her back.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33955?t=1018&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]Chip in a donation to make sure we get out every single vote — and
elect as many progressives as possible this year!

★ ★ ★

The 2026 midterms are pivotal to take power back from Trump and the
oligarchs who have rigged our economy and captured our democracy.

All of our candidates reject dark and corporate PAC money — and
they’ve all taken the pledge to Fight Oligarchy in office. These are
the kinds of fighters we need to win.

Check out our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35245?t=1019&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]Endorsements Page for more, and pick up our new
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36062?t=1020&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]midterms sticker above to help fuel our voter turnout machine!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

As dark money from AIPAC, Crypto, AI and other corporate interests
flood the midterms, Our Revolution is pushing the Democratic National
Committee to take action.

That’s why we led the charge to pass a DNC resolution to ban dark
money in the 2028 presidential primaries. Now, the DNC is in the
process of passing a resolution to crack down on dark and corporate
money — even covering groups like AIPAC.

But now comes the real test: how it will actually be enforced. As Our
Revolution founding chair Larry Cohen told the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37507?t=1021&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]AP: “It’s
necessary that we actually have the party do something on this issue,
not just say something.”

Democratic Party seats are also up for grabs this year. In
Pennsylvania, we’re building progressive power in the party by
endorsing these champions as State Committee Members.

They’ve all pledged to use their power to get dark money out. Not
only do we have leaders like Larry Cohen carrying the fight as a DNC
member, we’re also filling out the ranks of the party.

Lou Hancherick in Butler County; Colleen Ngyugen and John Flood in
Cumberland County; Tracy Brown and Kimeka Campbell of Dauphin County;
Mario Cimino, Colleen Kennedy, Catherine Coll, and Ashley Dolceamore
of Delaware County; Megan Kocher of Luzerne County; Michael Laws of
Northampton County; and Jeff Kennedy Faubert of Northumberland
County.

★ ★ ★

TELL DEMS: NO OLIGARCH MONEY IN PRIMARIES

Ultra-rich powerbrokers are flooding the primaries with corporate
cash from AI, Crypto, and AIPAC. Our movement candidates are
rejecting dark and corporate money, but we need the Democratic Party
to stand with us.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35247?t=1022&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]Add your name to demand a ban on Dark Money in ALL Democratic
primaries in 2026!

Our Revolution is focused on building grassroots power to Fight Trump
& the Oligarchs with our 3 Point Strategy:

1. Fight Trump’s Oligarch Agenda - from Capitol Hill to City Halls
2. Elect Anti-Oligarch Champions up and down the ballot
3. Get Oligarch Money out of Politics and uplift the grassroots

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35232?t=1023&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]We take ZERO money from billionaires and big donors. We rely on
the grassroots to keep up this great work. Chip in a donation today!

★ ★ ★

[15]Action Center

★ ★ ★

We got more than 8 million people in the streets for No Kings, now
it’s time to get million out to the voting booth. The Democratic
primaries are underway, and we hope you’ll join us for an hour or two
making calls to turn out progressive voters!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37508?t=1024&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]PHONEBANK WITH OUR TEAM

★ ★ ★

The next major mobilization event is MAY DAY. On May 1st, a massive
coalition is taking a stand against Trump, Oligarchy and Injustice.

We’ll turn out in the streets, but we’ll also be boycotting. This
means No Work, No School, and No Spending. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37509?t=1025&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]Click to plug in with
this nationwide action and keep the momentum going!

★ ★ ★

NEW MERCH!

Remember when Trump blamed Joe Biden for high gas prices and we saw
stickers at the pump? Trump’s war with Iran is killing thousands and
skyrocketing gas prices — and we need to wake people up who are still
defending this madness.

Pick up a set of these stickers (2 for $6) to help fund the work to
train event organizers, mobilize mass turnout, and provide gear and
support on the big day.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37510?t=1026&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]GRAB YOUR MERCH!

★ ★ ★

[19]Thank you to all who Donate & Volunteer

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?t=1027&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=revreport.T4WXik&t=1008&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=revreport.Wps0N4&t=1009&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=revreport.HCFlph&t=1010&akid=10526%2E5885482%2Ef3Iufu ]GIVE ONCE

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: I’m up for re-election in a Trump-won district.
body:
|
#
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129272178/613786229/846650056?refcode=em-4.11.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzQ2ZDQ0Yy1iZTM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inlQhnWLQDsE8arHTFS6RNjvUeWwtdWQ06JdoNuZAWU=) Friend, This week, we qualified for the ballot in MI-08 – and this race is officially on. Before I go any further, can you chip in $3 today to help us kick off the next phase of this campaign? Here’s a good link to donate: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmr-q2-2026**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129272179/613786230/846650056?refcode=em-4.11.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzQ2ZDQ0Yy1iZTM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inlQhnWLQDsE8arHTFS6RNjvUeWwtdWQ06JdoNuZAWU=) Let me take a step back and tell you why I ran in the first place – and why I’m running again. My husband and I raised six kids. Like most parents, we kept coming back to the same questions: What opportunities do we want our kids to have? What kind of country are we leaving behind? I think about those questions every day in this job. I think about them when I hear from parents who are working full-time and still trying to figure out how to cover child care and groceries. When I talk to seniors who did everything right and are now worried about the cost of their prescriptions. When young people in my district tell me that they’ll never be able to buy a home. In Congress, I’m focused on helping families by lowering costs, strengthening Social Security and Medicare, and making sure there are good-paying jobs here in mid-Michigan. That’s what this job is about. But we can only do this work if we win, and MAGA is all-in to stop us. **MI-08 is a Trump-won district. We saw last time how much money gets poured into a race like this to try to flip it. And it’s already happening again – more than $1 million has already been spent targeting me.** [**We’ve proven we can win here. But keeping this seat is going to take all of us. clean_body: | = Friend, This week, we qualified for the ballot in MI-08 – and this race is officially on. Before I go any further, can you chip in $3 today to help us kick off the next phase of this campaign? Here’s a good link to donate: = Let me take a step back and tell you why I ran in the first place – and why I’m running again. My husband and I raised six kids. Like most parents, we kept coming back to the same questions: What opportunities do we want our kids to have? What kind of country are we leaving behind? I think about those questions every day in this job. I think about them when I hear from parents who are working full-time and still trying to figure out how to cover child care and groceries. When I talk to seniors who did everything right and are now worried about the cost of their prescriptions. When young people in my district tell me that they’ll never be able to buy a home. In Congress, I’m focused on helping families by lowering costs, strengthening Social Security and Medicare, and making sure there are good-paying jobs here in mid-Michigan. That’s what this job is about. But we can only do this work if we win, and MAGA is all-in to stop us. MI-08 is a Trump-won district. We saw last time how much money gets poured into a race like this to try to flip it. And it’s already happening again – more than $1 million has already been spent targeting me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

subject: The path to flipping the House runs through California

body:
And it starts with these two climate champions.

|
---
We are three seats away from flipping the House of Representatives and building a real check on Trump's authoritarian agenda and fossil fuel handouts. But I'll be honest with you: Simply flipping the House for Democrats is not enough anymore. Not nearly enough. **We need a majority made up of leaders who refuse Big Oil's money — and will always choose our planet, our democracy, and people over corporate profits.** **[Right now, two of the most important paths to building that majority run through California. Randy Villegas (CA-22) and Heidi Hall (CA-03) are both JanePAC-endorsed climate champions facing highly competitive primaries in June — and they need our grassroots support to defeat the political forces aligned with Trump's dirty fossil fuel agenda. Will you split a contribution of any amount between them today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129272209/613786277/744107029?refcode=ea.88063003-be35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.88063003-be35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4MDYzMDAzLWJlMzUtZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6MmrtVvzx0nRH58ER3XZB_RTQ3RSkchiq-txxWqpMH4=)** | [**SPLIT A DONATION →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129272211/613786279/744107029?refcode=ea.88063003-be35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.88063003-be35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4MDYzMDAzLWJlMzUtZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6MmrtVvzx0nRH58ER3XZB_RTQ3RSkchiq-txxWqpMH4=)

**Randy Villegas: California’s 22nd Congressional District**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129272213/613786281/744107029?refcode=ea.88063003-be35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.88063003-be35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4MDYzMDAzLWJlMzUtZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6MmrtVvzx0nRH58ER3XZB_RTQ3RSkchiq-txxWqpMH4=)
Randy Villegas is running in one of the most competitive — _and consequential_ — congressional races in the country.
Randy grew up in California's Central Valley, one of the most polluted places in America. He knows what it means when politicians choose corporations over people, because he watched it happen to his own neighbors. And he is running to change that.
**But Randy is facing a serious challenge in the primary that will shape the kind of Democrat we send to the general election.**
His main opponent, State Assemblymember Jasmeet Bains, has taken money from 53 of the same corporations that donated to the Republican incumbent — including Chevron, ExxonMobil, and Phillips 66. She accepted over $54,000 from oil and gas in just one legislative session while representing communities breathing some of the dirtiest air in America.
**[This is exactly the kind of race where early grassroots resources can make all the difference. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129272219/613786287/744107029?refcode=ea.88063003-be35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.88063003-be35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4MDYzMDAzLWJlMzUtZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6MmrtVvzx0nRH58ER3XZB_RTQ3RSkchiq-txxWqpMH4=)
Heidi Hall is the kind of leader I had in mind when I founded JanePAC.
As a former EPA official, she spent years holding polluters accountable.
As a three-term Nevada County Supervisor, she led her county's transition to electric vehicles, invested in solar, and launched her county's first-ever greenhouse gas emissions assessment.
And throughout her career, Heidi has never taken a penny of fossil fuel money.
Here's what makes this race so exciting: New congressional maps approved by California voters under Proposition 50 have significantly shifted the political landscape in CA-03. This seat is now _competitive_ and _winnable_.
**Together, Randy and Heidi can help us flip the House and put real climate champions in Congress who answer to people.[But first, they need to win tough primaries, and early grassroots support can make all the difference. clean_body: And it starts with these two climate champions. | We are three seats away from flipping the House of Representatives and building a real check on Trump's authoritarian agenda and fossil fuel handouts. But I'll be honest with you: Simply flipping the House for Democrats is not enough anymore. Not nearly enough. We need a majority made up of leaders who refuse Big Oil's money — and will always choose our planet, our democracy, and people over corporate profits. = | = Here's what you need to know: Randy Villegas: California’s 22nd Congressional District = Randy Villegas is running in one of the most competitive — and consequential — congressional races in the country. Randy grew up in California's Central Valley, one of the most polluted places in America. He knows what it means when politicians choose corporations over people, because he watched it happen to his own neighbors. And he is running to change that. But Randy is facing a serious challenge in the primary that will shape the kind of Democrat we send to the general election. His main opponent, State Assemblymember Jasmeet Bains, has taken money from 53 of the same corporations that donated to the Republican incumbent — including Chevron, ExxonMobil, and Phillips 66. She accepted over $54,000 from oil and gas in just one legislative session while representing communities breathing some of the dirtiest air in America. = = Heidi Hall: California’s 3rd Congressional District = Heidi Hall is the kind of leader I had in mind when I founded JanePAC. As a former EPA official, she spent years holding polluters accountable. As a three-term Nevada County Supervisor, she led her county's transition to electric vehicles, invested in solar, and launched her county's first-ever greenhouse gas emissions assessment. And throughout her career, Heidi has never taken a penny of fossil fuel money. Here's what makes this race so exciting: New congressional maps approved by California voters under Proposition 50 have significantly shifted the political landscape in CA-03. This seat is now competitive and winnable. Together, Randy and Heidi can help us flip the House and put real climate champions in Congress who answer to people.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, xx Jane = | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

| | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.
---

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history. Nancy is fighting to: Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | | | | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace For Governor | | Copyright © 2025 , All rights reserved.

body:
Protect our Constitution and defend the votes of millions of voters >>

| This is urgent.

Since our last correspondence Trump’s attacks on mail-in voting have escalated.

Donald Trump officially signed an illegal executive order to ban mail-in ballots that arrive after Election Day.

**23 states have moved forward with suing Trump for his effort to restrict voting unconstitutionally right before the midterm elections.**

It’s critical that we stand up to protect our Constitution and defend the votes of millions of voters – _especially seniors, disabled Americans, and our troops who would be affected._

**[We’re urging top Democrats like you to sign our “Defend Mail-In Voting” petition if you have not done so yet – You have until 11:59pm, so please don’t wait a second longer »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129273234/613790217/-1952426633?refcode=NDCAF_20260411_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjllZjE4OS1iZjM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7gu5tkYFXRkh4M68M3ysN6dyUos87lNzpF1EOMtzhU4=&emci=58615755-ec34-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=5f9ef189-bf35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=48524772)** | [11:59PM DEADLINE: ADD YOUR NAME TO DEFEND MAIL-IN VOTING »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129273235/613790218/-1952426633?refcode=NDCAF_20260411_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjllZjE4OS1iZjM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7gu5tkYFXRkh4M68M3ysN6dyUos87lNzpF1EOMtzhU4=&emci=58615755-ec34-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=5f9ef189-bf35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=48524772)

**Trump signed an unconstitutional executive order to restrict mail-in voting** – a move that could make it harder for millions of Americans to cast their ballots and tilt the playing field in upcoming elections.

This is just his latest attempt to single-handedly shape how our elections and democracy operate.

_And it comes just a week after Donald Trump himself voted by mail in a Florida special election._

If actions like this go unchallenged, they could limit access to the ballot box for countless eligible voters.

We can’t overstate how dangerous this is. That’s why we’re launching an urgent effort to defend mail-in voting and protect fair access to our elections.

clean_body: Protect our Constitution and defend the votes of millions of voters >> | This is urgent. Since our last correspondence Trump’s attacks on mail-in voting have escalated. Donald Trump officially signed an illegal executive order to ban mail-in ballots that arrive after Election Day. 23 states have moved forward with suing Trump for his effort to restrict voting unconstitutionally right before the midterm elections. It’s critical that we stand up to protect our Constitution and defend the votes of millions of voters – especially seniors, disabled Americans, and our troops who would be affected. | Thank you for your support, New Dems –FORWARDED BEGINS BELOW– This is a total nightmare: Trump signed an unconstitutional executive order to restrict mail-in voting – a move that could make it harder for millions of Americans to cast their ballots and tilt the playing field in upcoming elections. This is just his latest attempt to single-handedly shape how our elections and democracy operate. And it comes just a week after Donald Trump himself voted by mail in a Florida special election. If actions like this go unchallenged, they could limit access to the ballot box for countless eligible voters. We can’t overstate how dangerous this is. That’s why we’re launching an urgent effort to defend mail-in voting and protect fair access to our elections. name: Amy Phan West
subject: The moderate thing was a lie.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amy Phan West for Congress 2026
body:
Friend,

Virginia elected Abigail Spanberger last November. She ran as a
moderate. She called herself a "passionate pragmatist." She promised
to focus on affordability.

Day 1 as governor, she rescinded Virginia's cooperation with ICE. Then
came the assault weapons ban. The minimum wage hike. Collective
bargaining for government workers. Expanded gun liability. The whole
left-wing playbook — signed, published, done.

Two months in, her approval rating is the worst any Virginia governor
has posted in thirty years.

Turns out voters notice when the moderate thing was the pitch, not the
plan.
CHIP IN $653 — THE MARGIN THAT MATTERS →
[https://eblastem.com/r/342843e0faa1fee4b79a5faa3?ct=YTo1OntzOjY6InNvdXJjZSI7YToyOntpOjA7czoxNDoiY2FtcGFpZ24uZXZlbnQiO2k6MTtpOjk1O31zOjU6ImVtYWlsIjtpOjUyNDtzOjQ6InN0YXQiO3M6MjI6IjY5ZGE3MTY0MzJiZGUxOTIwNDM5NTUiO3M6NDoibGVhZCI7czo1OiI0MzU4MyI7czo3OiJjaGFubmVsIjthOjE6e3M6NToiZW1haWwiO2k6NTI0O319&?amount=653]

Derek Tran ran as a moderate too. He won CA-45 by 653 votes. And since
getting to Washington, he's voted with the left, demanded ICE stand
down in our district, and done nothing to suggest he's anything other
than what Spanberger became in Richmond.

This is the play. They run as moderates. They win. Then they govern
like they meant it all along.

My family watched a version of this once before. Not in Virginia —
in Vietnam. The communists didn't announce what they were building
until they had the power to build it. By then, the guns were gone. The
opposition was gone. The only option left was a fishing boat at 2 in
the morning.

I'm not saying America is Vietnam. I'm saying I know how this pattern
works. I've seen where unchecked power leads, and I'm not going to
stay quiet while it plays out here.

CA-45 is one seat. But it's also a test. If Derek Tran keeps it,
Democrats learn the bait-and-switch works in Orange County too. If we
flip it, we show them it doesn't.

I need you with me on this.

Day 1 as governor, she rescinded Virginia's cooperation with ICE. Then came the assault weapons ban. The minimum wage hike. Collective bargaining for government workers. Expanded gun liability. subject: Bellows Butchers Girls’ Sports Ballot Question in Bid to Rig Another Election
body:
Maine Secretary of State still can't say how 250 Maine ballots ended up in an Amazon Prime package last year. She's busy torturing the English language - and the law - to undermine sex-based rights.

# [Bellows Butchers Girls' Sports Ballot Question in Bid to Rig Another Election](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2246936&post_id=193825376&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkzODI1Mzc2LCJpYXQiOjE3NzU5MjM2NTQsImV4cCI6MTc3ODUxNTY1NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIyNDY5MzYiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VTkh2AtFZkeHjQqnvIMzkLNj3-E0gyhOw3HsdXuCizw)
### Maine Secretary of State still can't say how 250 Maine ballots ended up in an Amazon Prime package last year. She's busy torturing the English language - and the law - to undermine sex-based rights.
Apr 11

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/robinsonreport/p/bellows-butchers-girls-sports-ballot?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Maine Secretary of State Shenna Bellows (D) has once again put her thumb on the scale in a blatant attempt to rig the results of a democratic election.
On April 7, Bellows released draft wording for the citizen initiative commonly known as the "Maine Girl Dads" referendum -- a measure that, if enacted, would protect sex-based rights in public school athletics and sex-specific private spaces, like bathrooms.
In practice, the initiative would overturn the Mills Administration's current policy, which forces female athletes to compete against male athletes who say they are girls.
The initiative would also prohibit the current policy of forcing young women to share locker rooms and private spaces with peers who have penises.

The initiative, formally titled "An Act to Designate School Sports Participation & Facilities by Sex," cleared the signature threshold after organizers gathered enough valid petitions to send it to the November 2026 ballot.
The draft question Bellows released reads: _" Do you want to change civil rights and education laws to require public schools to restrict access to bathrooms and sports based on the gender on the child's original birth certificate and allow students to sue the schools?"_
The Protect Girls Sports in Maine Ballot Question Committee fired back Thursday, issuing a formal statement arguing that Bellows' proposed language is flawed.
First, the group notes that their proposed act does not "change civil rights" laws. In fact, the petition documents printed and distributed by Bellows' own office explicitly stated that the initiative "does not constitute unlawful discrimination under the Maine Human Rights Act" and that the MHRA "may not be construed to conflict with the provisions of the initiated bill." Bellows' question flips that on its head, framing the measure as a civil rights rollback -- language that doesn't appear anywhere in the actual legislation.
Second, the draft question mentions only "bathrooms," when the act covers all private spaces -- including locker rooms and showers. That omission isn't incidental. The breadth of the private facilities designation is central to what proponents say the legislation is designed to protect.
Third -- and this is perhaps the most glaring departure -- Bellows' question uses the word "gender," a term that does not appear anywhere in the proposed act. The legislation defines and relies on the word "sex," which it defines in accordance with biological status. Sex and gender are legally and scientifically distinct terms. Substituting one for the other is not a stylistic choice. It changes the meaning of the question.
Fourth, the question's description of civil enforcement -- "allow students to sue the schools" -- strips the statutory language of the specific standard that triggers a cause of action. The proposed act allows civil recourse for a student who "is deprived of an athletic opportunity or suffers direct injury because of a violation." That's a meaningfully higher bar than the characterization Bellows chose.
Principal Officer Leyland Streiff, the Brunswick father whose petition drive sparked the initiative, was measured but direct in his response. "We urge their reconsideration of the drafted question, to ensure it stays faithful to the proposed legislation, and even to the wonderful title assigned by the Secretary of State herself," Streiff said.
His own suggested language -- _" Do you want to change public school policies to designate private facilities (bathrooms, locker rooms, showers) and competitive sports participation by Sex (male, female, co-ed) as recorded on the person's original birth certificate?"_ -- tracks the actual bill far more faithfully than what Bellows produced.
* * *
#### Democratic lawmakers scheduled a surprise hearing on April 14 (next Tuesday) for LD 2239, the bill that accompanies that ballot referendum. You can check out their [Facebook page](https://substack.com/redirect/5063aa05-05a7-4951-b82c-af1ceb443b51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for more information on how to testify at the hearing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5063aa05-05a7-4951-b82c-af1ceb443b51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
**This Isn 't the First Time for Bellows...**
Maine voters and initiative organizers have seen this movie before.
Last year, the group behind the voter ID citizen initiative -- which gathered over 170,000 signatures, more than twice the required threshold -- filed a lawsuit in Cumberland County Superior Court [alleging](https://substack.com/redirect/382cd8b0-9330-450e-a029-3bcb3d2baef9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Bellows' final question "misrepresents" the proposal and "buries its core intent behind a string of technical and inflammatory clauses."
That lawsuit alleged that the wording "fails to meet the constitutional and statutory standards of clarity, accuracy, and impartiality" and mischaracterized the initiative's provisions to suggest it targeted elderly voters and people with disabilities. The legal challenge also argued that Bellows used "vague and confusing" language and "legal jargon" that didn't appear in the original proposal -- and that the question was the longest ballot question in Maine history, more than 30 percent longer than past initiatives.
Organizers also pointed to Bellows' prior public statements describing voter ID as rooted in "white supremacy" and constituting "voter suppression," arguing those remarks reflected an "entrenched bias that compromised her ability to act fairly."
The Maine Supreme Judicial Court ultimately declined to intervene, holding that "merely demonstrating that the question creates a misleading impression" was not enough to strike the wording, deferring to the Secretary's broad discretion.
In other words: the bar for judicial intervention is high, Bellows knows it, and she's abusing the power of the office for her own political gain.
Polling in Maine and nationally has shown that forcing high school girls to play sports against male athletes and share private spaces with male athletes is broadly unpopular.
Only a small fringe of left-wing voters actually believe that young men with sexual or gender dysphoria, or who simple claim to be girls, should be allowed in female sports or female-only facilities.
Yet, given Bellows current campaign in the Democratic gubernatorial primary, it's precisely this fringe and ideologically extreme section of the electorate that's determining how the Secretary of State's office is handling a process -- a process that used to be non-controversial under Bellows' predecessors.
**What Happens Next**
Bellows' office announced that public comments on the draft question will be accepted through 5 p.m. on May 7, 2026, with the final wording due by May 28.
Mainers who want to weigh in can [submit comments online](https://substack.com/redirect/0b33123b-54f3-4073-aec2-251349cab630?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), by email at [PublicComment.SOS@Maine.gov](https://substack.com/redirect/5ceb5709-ee28-42fc-9a06-c48212b063b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with the subject line "Public Comment - Referendum Question," or by mail to the Secretary of State, 148 State House Station, Augusta, ME 04333-0148.
Meanwhile, the Maine Constitution is unambiguous on what this process is supposed to look like. The question must be written in a "clear, concise and direct manner that describes the subject matter of the people's veto or direct initiative as simply as is possible."
What Bellows released this week is not that. And Mainers have every right to say so.
* * *
_The public comment period runs through May 7. Submit comments at maine.gov or email[PublicComment.SOS@Maine.gov](https://substack.com/redirect/5ceb5709-ee28-42fc-9a06-c48212b063b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)._

body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260411-61342&t=1001&akid=61342%2E1407376%2E_OLq9c ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260411-61342&t=1002&akid=61342%2E1407376%2E_OLq9c ]Demand Justice PAC

Trump filed
a case asking the Supreme Court to end birthright citizenship and let him
decide who counts as an American.

Then, at the oral arguments, he showed up.
He sat in the room while the justices heard arguments on whether he can
gut the 14th Amendment to the U.S. Constitution.

It’s intimidation — full stop.

A president with a direct stake in the outcome, sitting in the room while
the Court considers handing him sweeping power, is a blatant display of
pressure, and a clear sign of just how far he’s willing to go.

For over a century, birthright citizenship has been settled law. Lower
courts have already said Trump’s executive order stripping this right is
unconstitutional.

He doesn’t care. He wants the Court to override history and hand him the
authority to decide who belongs in this country.

If they succeed, once-guaranteed citizenship and rights would be ripped
from millions of people born in the U.S. — and signal that this Court is
willing to rubber stamp the most extreme abuses of power from a wannabe
authoritarian president.

That’s the reality we’re facing. Demand Justice PAC is taking on this
captured, far-right Court, exposing the corruption, and making clear
exactly what’s at stake for our rights and our democracy. But we can’t win
this fight without you.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260411.aRU5NZ&refcode=em20260411-61342&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61342%2E1407376%2E_OLq9c ]Chip in $5 to join the fight and stop Trump from
weaponizing the courts to target our freedoms and entrench his agenda.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260411.aRU5NZ&amount=5&refcode=em20260411-61342&t=1022&akid=61342%2E1407376%2E_OLq9c ]Donate $5 ››

More soon,

Demand Justice PAC

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign to demand Congress solve the Black maternal health crisis:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
I’ll keep fighting for health equity and racial and reproductive justice, but more of my colleagues must join this urgent fight. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWm1exUeTkpkyziA8hUURkqMLletfWwNy3aokyjYh89VRwHmUmyEec3FZ6oiyC5ZBlD4K_xW0nYtUaX9k_07ALeGNb4hKUaTqWA553raGcvHP4KzwhO8DbNddDQr8eWBj5YcrvwKjbH4tc1eBCJuhJUg9yQYY1ZxR6e8lth8279lMR88_PPg91PXu83wxR_j5oDpqyzlDeJL1PRlwIl50E9Y3-d8I4AxBjR41wc12kVD-9TnxPeUe5v09u5Yv1sLoo/4pp/vpqEy_osSt66y9WyvD20aw/h0/h001.Bh8AkeWYHIgWT78R55M2R2t6x1bmXk0ildNu5XF3kAk)
---
Friend, It’s Black Maternal Health Week, which means it’s time to demand equitable healthcare and push for solutions to our country’s growing maternal mortality crisis. Black Mamas Matter Alliance, Inc. founded this week of activism and awareness, writing: **“Black Mamas deserve equitable, culturally affirming care and community-driven solutions that drive lasting change.”** Due to systemic racism and misogynoir (which specifically targets Black women) in the United States, Black women are 3 to 4 times more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women. That’s why the Congressional Mamas Caucus recently joined Mothering Justice and the Ariah Foundation to unveil portraits of women of color who we have lost due to maternal health complications. Those portraits are now being displayed in the halls of Congress. Most of these deaths are preventable—and we already know many of the solutions that we must implement in order to save lives. [**Please sign our petition to demand Congress end racist health disparities by passing policies such as the**** _Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act_ and ****the**** _WELLS Act_****.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9jzJnep0tjRIZRggydvVqTCUWWJJPoyPcZEaFdYUg-yFZBUWd1ueW27B9RiXy5-Q3PJF9N0H_YhYcF6n1QCUasc0qxLJe0LItUCSw0yZzlkiujkXfhhRZziLfhpFs7gBOHLeL6qZNg96oZwV-0cPEwkAuSgPJkgOMkXonxF6QMbt8x9-_MbsvASKt2vZ9OFAKXlYV5IByXTBM35bRkpSw1au0y_E4gceJO8LJ5v4sI49nY7xGh1sRNzr9efAdCBSoBgWazzrA1QQHbEEI_K1GYSjJk7J4whKzJcpKbsFwKWOenJin6WCmpMQqgp_GbOp7WJ_egbNNZJYkc1qz3ziYyKV35YL7fx5GosvhR-jzMQcUB_-L-XZgHxU3Iwcx8kdYqJqI_FjGy5rtHzZP-rFle2oN9uaBSzvpcJEesnSdnsg/4pp/vpqEy_osSt66y9WyvD20aw/h1/h001.33QWj91SwYyVZOOkOA3PlX6nse2kIYamKchNQ6kBvYQ) | [SIGN FOR HEALTH EQUITY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9jzJnep0tjRIZRggydvVqTCUWWJJPoyPcZEaFdYUg-yFZBUWd1ueW27B9RiXy5-Q3PJF9N0H_YhYcF6n1QCUasc0qxLJe0LItUCSw0yZzlkgRCMfELPmtnjXc_kntln5DTDQORXGfN4fifN1DMklHSAoDovXLwVPONabP7jo6rg0g37gTrTMkJ2g7lS8X5ZzK_nrYriGGSjm0YRpVjNOx5F-oaEJso1EKLUDsBrcksCQNYTz1qbA4Xg5PlrjvDp6_hZCG0aEIsbopXBKNUxfGotVwjiztJBqg_c8zHsrjuZG71qEPlAHHHxCAjadGHUAGPFcNw1flk1U6KUrBfXZftKK4ve-dYHENhpsSlXd4-SNYdv0mTJBde4YVUdCfATjAv2hTbA-iIw1WTBhKKXdt5WgdRGp-uPjhfLRcHf_Y3iM/4pp/vpqEy_osSt66y9WyvD20aw/h2/h001.ZagdLSALKfTqBHSXNQFrRelYqy169yDdFuYw48VQgIY)
---
As a Co-Chair of the Mamas Caucus, I’ve helped lead fights for reproductive justice and pushed to bring Black women’s stories of pregnancy and childbirth into Congress.
I joined Congresswoman Robin Kelly, who serves as Co-Chair of the Congressional Caucus on Black Women and Girls and Chair of the Bipartisan Maternity Care Caucus, to lead our colleagues in demanding the Department of Health and Human Services take action for Black women’s health.
And I’ve cosponsored vital policies, including:
* The _Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act_ , a package of 14 bills that expand access to maternal mental health care, financial assistance for parents and young children, culturally affirming care from Black birth workers, social determinants of health such as housing, and more.
* The _WELLS Ac_ _t_ —named in honor of Mercedes Wells who was forced to give birth in her truck after a hospital discharged her—would fund racial bias training for healthcare professionals while urging hospitals and birthing centers to develop and implement safe discharge plans.
* The House of Representatives resolution for Congress to officially designate this week as Black Maternal Health Week, to bring national attention to the maternal and reproductive health crisis among Black women and birthing people.

I’m committed to implementing solutions to improve Black maternal health, eradicating racial disparities in maternal and infant health, and bringing about health equity and reproductive justice.
But in order to win these needed changes, more of my colleagues must join this urgent fight.
[**Please sign on to demand Congress take swift action to pass policies that will solve the Black maternal mortality crisis.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9jzJnep0tjRIZRggydvVqTCUWWJJPoyPcZEaFdYUg-yFZBUWd1ueW27B9RiXy5-Q3PJF9N0H_YhYcF6n1QCUasc0qxLJe0LItUCSw0yZzlki7aeIoz8vWdRm05YDll2ECB7CN9Q0dulhPlUgJkhDH4LV_qCDXFM67r6X7Hu7yiQi2lvBHWV-rIPm9iTolBOaCzwlELt1QCDme5a7QIbCK4-A907gpys22gq1gRJ4lTjDzw-zwExaOsAM3XbiMJ4D8HoyeD1QW5ib5OeYBsGqhYi_HuxwPBzX_0LO-xk7T4I1jWTySnL8MsNqoW7qxTOvbf52Agu3wiPGGR29xfvVEejJwXuvz6aNp2AFAy_MvbDTZ4O3LzT1skIRqdE6fNhsWVQe5z2oI1ln3IcBx84yvyji9B2SIWLll67JHZP7_E0E/4pp/vpqEy_osSt66y9WyvD20aw/h3/h001._9opk0V0teJrEExkVk3gxnmLplOZQbdBhvzXxKpMpuk)
Thank you. Together, we’ll keep working to dismantle systemic racism and build a multiracial democracy with bodily autonomy and equity for all.
In solidarity,
Rashida

Here’s why we’re asking:
We’re focused on building the next generation of leaders. These are people who actually understand their communities and show up for them.
And we’ve seen firsthand that when the right people run, they can win, even in tough races. Just ask Governor Whitmer!
**Your answer helps us better understand what people are feeling right now and how we can keep building a stronger bench.**
Thanks for taking a second to weigh in,
Team Fight Like Hell PAC
