name: Yen Bailey
subject: Help us flip Congress blue!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YEN BAILEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Right now, Republican campaigns are ahead of us when it comes to signage and visibility. Let's change that!

| | | | |
---
[|
---](https://yenbaileyforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=642870bb478010796c7288d8f&id=c19ac74c78&e=58216231a8)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |

Friends,

Right now, Republican campaigns are ahead of us when it comes to signage and visibility. We’re working hard to grow our visibility across the district, and you can help make that happen in a few simple, high-impact ways.That means we have ground to make up, and a real opportunity to close the gap quickly with your help.
📌 **Put up a yard sign**
Display one at your home or business and help us reach your neighbors. Just reply to this email and we’ll get one to you.
📍 **Share location ideas**
Know a high-traffic spot where a larger sign would turn heads? Or any businesses that may be interested in a sign? We’d love to hear it.
🪧 [**Fund a billboard**](https://yenbaileyforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=642870bb478010796c7288d8f&id=8befd3a0e9&e=58216231a8)
Billboards are one of the most effective ways to reach voters, especially in our rural counties. A contribution of $500 helps fund one rural billboard placement and helps us connect with communities across the district. Every dollar toward signage helps us catch up and stay competitive.
---
| [DONATE HERE](https://yenbaileyforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=642870bb478010796c7288d8f&id=b3c3c49415&e=58216231a8)
---
| |

If you’d like a yard sign, have a location in mind, or want to get involved,**just reply to this email!** We can close this gap, and win, but only if we do it together.
With gratitude,
**Yen Bailey**
---
| [JOIN YEN BAILEY TODAY](https://yenbaileyforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=642870bb478010796c7288d8f&id=1d5261845e&e=58216231a8)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | Yen Bailey’s journey began with her parents, who fled war-torn Vietnam. Her father, a South Vietnamese Air Force pilot, bravely escaped the fall of Saigon by flying with his crew and dozens of Vietnamese refugees. They settled in Destin, Florida, where Yen and her brother were born and raised. Witnessing her parents' sacrifices and resilience deeply influenced Yen, inspiring her to pursue a career in law and public service.

[ ](https://yenbaileyforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=642870bb478010796c7288d8f&id=5f304c4cc6&e=58216231a8)

A Tallahassee-based attorney and Tulane University and Florida State University Law School graduate, Yen has dedicated her career to public service. She served as a Senior Attorney for the Guardian ad Litem Program and spent over 13 years as an ethics attorney at The Florida Bar. Committed to her family, Yen stepped away from her law career at the Bar to care for her elderly father.

Yen is a proud wife and mother. She cherishes time with her husband, Steve Bailey, a lawyer and professor at Florida State University and former Army Green Beret, and their two teenage sons.

Yen’s dedication to civic engagement led her to co-found Every Vote Florida, a nonprofit voter outreach organization, where she served as Vice President. She also served on the board of Friends of the LeRoy Collins Public Library System, promoting literacy and supporting public libraries in Leon County.

Yen is running for office to address the needs and challenges of the average Floridian in North Florida. For years, many in the district have felt neglected and left behind by their Representatives, and Yen wants to be a voice for all in Washington D.C.

With her extensive background in public service and dedication to the community, Yen Bailey offers a fresh perspective for District 2. Her journey from the daughter of immigrants to a congressional candidate embodies the American dream and the power of perseverance.

****
---
| | PAID FOR BY YEN BAILEY FOR CONGRESS
---
| | | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/yenbaileyforcongress/help-us-flip-congress-blue?e=58216231a8)
Yen Bailey for Congress * PO Box 12699 * Tallahassee, FL 32312 * USA
[update your preferences](https://yenbaileyforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/profile?u=642870bb478010796c7288d8f&id=7f5618c668&e=58216231a8&c=27e91d897e) or [unsubscribe](https://yenbaileyforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=642870bb478010796c7288d8f&id=7f5618c668&t=b&e=58216231a8&c=27e91d897e)
---
|
---

| **About the Republican Party of Florida**
* * *
The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. We will seek to be the most effective state party in the nation and serve as a model for other party organizations.

clean_body: We cannot let the man who tried to sabotage President Trump’s agenda do the same to the Sunshine State. | Fellow American, You remember Alex Vindman. He was the "star witness" the Radical Left used to lead the first sham impeachment against President Trump. Now, he’s back—and he’s coming for Florida. The latest reports show Vindman just raised a staggering He isn’t just running a campaign; he’s leading a national Democrat assault to flip Florida Blue and bring the DC circus to our backyard. We cannot let the man who tried to sabotage President Trump’s agenda do the same to the Sunshine State. Vindman has the liberal elite and out-of-state donors in his pocket. Florida is Trump Country, and we need to keep it that way. name: SDC HQ
subject: Democrats aren't just playing defense this cycle.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Our path to a Democratic Senate majority has completely transformed
#
Our path to a Democratic Senate majority has completely transformed, Peter.
**A year ago, we were bracing for a tough cycle.** We knew we needed to defend seats already held by Democrats in Georgia, Michigan, and New Hampshire. We thought maybe, just maybe, we would have a path to flip Maine or North Carolina.
**But now, we’re not just playing defense – we’re going on offense.** Ohio is winnable. Alaska is closer than anyone expected. Iowa is seriously competitive. And Texas? Republicans are actually worried about their chances in Texas this year.
**We have a real path to flip the Senate this year, Peter – but only if we have the resources to compete everywhere.[Will you rush $5 or more right now to help elect Democrats in competitive elections across the country?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102446?refcode=em20260411-10297&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10297%2E614464%2ExQ5S93)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102447?refcode=em20260411-10297&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=10297%2E614464%2ExQ5S93) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102447?refcode=em20260411-10297&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=3&akid=10297%2E614464%2ExQ5S93) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102446?refcode=em20260411-10297&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=10297%2E614464%2ExQ5S93)
---
Here’s what happened: As soon as Donald Trump + the spineless GOP politicians who support him were sworn into office, voters started REJECTING their extremism everywhere it appeared on the ballot.
**Democratic candidates have flipped seats that Trump won by double digits in 2024... over and over and over again!** The momentum is real, and it’s continuing to build.
But here's the reality – expanding the map means expanding our budget. We need to:
→ Support strong Democratic candidates in every competitive race
→ Mobilize voters in states Republicans thought were safe
→ Counter the millions GOP megadonors will spend to protect their majority
**We can flip the Senate, Peter. But we need to invest in these races NOW, before Republicans consolidate their resources and go all-in on defense.**
**[Please, rush $5, $15, or whatever you can to help us seize this opportunity.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102446?refcode=em20260411-10297&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=10297%2E614464%2ExQ5S93)**

[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102447?refcode=em20260411-10297&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=6&akid=10297%2E614464%2ExQ5S93) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102447?refcode=em20260411-10297&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=7&akid=10297%2E614464%2ExQ5S93) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102447?refcode=em20260411-10297&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=10297%2E614464%2ExQ5S93) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102447?refcode=em20260411-10297&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=10297%2E614464%2ExQ5S93) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102447?refcode=em20260411-10297&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=10297%2E614464%2ExQ5S93) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102447?refcode=em20260411-10297&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=10297%2E614464%2ExQ5S93) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102446?refcode=em20260411-10297&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=10297%2E614464%2ExQ5S93)

[_**Would you stand with us today by chipping in any amount today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129276208/613799363/383765187?refcode=260411math&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDdiY2QwMC1jNTM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nDIFwRSRBkf-YXcqTdtxyJEw99FOULGDNDURsKG5Xsw=)
Mike Braun’s dangerous math is supporting new forever wars, allowing electricity companies to raise rates, and increasing oil company profits while hundreds of Hoosier oil workers are out of a job due to the illegal lockout by BP in Whiting.
Governor Braun could’ve suspended the gas tax weeks ago as prices rose when the war broke out. His actions now are just too little, too late. Please review and respond before the Patriot Census closes.

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: Hello, Most Americans don’t realize they’re making quiet tax mistakes until the IRS sends a bill.| | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | Hello, Most Americans don’t realize they’re making quiet tax mistakes until the IRS sends a bill. body:
Here’s the deal:
| Here’s the deal, friend, I’ve got good news and bad news. I’ll start with the bad news:

| Wisconsin is one of the only gubernatorial races that is a true toss-up in 2026, which means this race really could go either way. There is a very real chance that we could lose this race. Donald Trump won Wisconsin in 2024 and he and his MAGA allies are focused on our state again. His candidate, Tom Tiffany is already raking in millions of dollars from Trump’s buddies, and will be ready to spend every penny attacking me.

---
But there's good news:
Folks in every corner of Wisconsin are showing up and demanding change from the failed politics of hate and division that we’re seeing from Donald Trump and Republicans across the country. Just this week, Republicans lost up and down the ballot by 20 points. The momentum is on our side. I’m running to bring real, generational change to our state, but this work doesn’t happen overnight. If we’re going to win this race, we have to invest NOW and be ready to fight back against Tom Tiffany and his MAGA donors.

---

Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

body:
You have the power to shape the outcome of this race

Derek, I want you to hear me on this: **Elections aren’t a spectator sport.** You have the power to shape the outcome of this race — to tell your friends, neighbors, and loved ones about our campaign. To put up a sign ([_**available here!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129276712/613800278/-1986934997?refcode=email_041126_sport&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTEwM2JmZi1jNjM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W9Pwg3VDTnH8E3riSohxY1sfYpe1tS4Ur2DjxhNM5rI=&emci=1b103bff-c635-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=21103bff-c635-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=21962291)) in your window and show your community you’re on board. To chip in a few bucks at a time, and power our campaign to victory. Derek, I know a lot of us are watching golf this weekend. But polite golf claps aren’t going to win an election as competitive and hard-fought as this one is shaping up to be. [_**I need you to step off the sidelines, Derek, get in the game, and do whatever you can to power our team to victory. If that’s a donation, great. | Hi, it's Justin from Team Scalise.
Vice President JD Vance has been trying to reach you but hasn't heard back from you. He's asked us to pass along his message to as many Patriots as possible, and you've made the cut!
After you read his final memo, you can call it a day.
\- Justin Team Scalise

My fellow Americans - this is your Vice President.
[I hope this email finds you well. Admittedly, it’s a bit longer than my typical message to you, but I’m betting it’ll be worth your time if you can spare a minute or two.](http://links.maga-conservatives.com/u/click?_t=da215d85003f407c964bf56cae76557f&_m=c98afe4914964790ac0fc5bd810280d1&_e=DlFi70w6uNhqkWIIRe7Ex2c0lCSI5THM6-S-mFxMrZa-BRSEFIZSs5Jw2kUnG7wtjt6zuzfeHHyFFWrKutx1FBxW0REt5mRS2f4r_rfEAo93I_RBULJ46WMGJur3_-1hW-euROEbzL12szbwhfBE-N2ANwnrYUSZ-asIYRdCTqpju3psV5gXBo_x52gBLOh5keXXEv8kJZ32ZYgZwMD2H5siA2r3_7v24qbCVbxgILpKEADItJKgiJdJe4WH6gqk7umObwDcdL-g4JmeeZDlaGWDHBfZ65MO4y0fUv6BdHZXaeOc9VsigEuBIWF6HiuHAsp3SkTmVawbI-DsQtFRKP8rAx63MHOaZBtsRPibN1qINpfHLEDkdysl-0FmjseGA3n9AIcRrOj0PqKkKw_qxfFQzFQq07bjfwJhXZehlUonxyh_07hPy3o9u9Z-Iy1JFybNGP1KSv7kqE-uvqWrfUCN4EWOUVjxRDrHWR2kSQie7tgK5I6bOChVeQRSLKd44hvfQRCCRITppwyDmPbN5H595uKSMJ0giZkrcIu1AGrWlbyTuhBrAE7BuFUfmGqw2dfJ7PLfMST6OOEmqLCeGBbV9sUmEX7TUd0B0llY0BhyTwJu7YNpda2tJxNYWdCmLA3U1R-7qEdvjtxsM84B1Z4YsiJQseJNg4PJLPamz9xh1L5B3wGgaK3p9qewBE2nzESGr9ehRnjwu2tAorrSTfViXWK-bq0gTr8CA9FXbtSumudglo548oZSfBPBxBcQ)
Where else on the planet can a big-city real estate guy and a small-town hillbilly team up to bring down a political machine to become the leader of the free world and his right hand?
The answer is nowhere but the Shining City on a Hill.
But just like President Reagan, I believe in my heart of hearts that freedom is always a generation away from extinction.
So while I'll never forget Election Night 2024, my sights are set squarely on Election Night 2026.
That's because EVERYTHING comes down to the midterm elections. If the Democrats win back control of Congress, everything we've worked so hard for comes to a SCREECHING HALT!
That's why the Democrat Machine is mobilizing earlier, faster, and more powerfully than anyone thought possible. And we're in for a shellacking if we don't get our act together. Why? Because the Democrats are...
- Unleashing swarms of attack ads in every swing district - just like 2024 - Plastering the media with anti-Trump propaganda - just like all last year - Weaponizing the Deep State to undermine us - just par for the course - Suing us in court to hamstring our agenda - just like Joe Biden did - Tracking to rake in a billion (with a "b") dollars - just like Kamala Harris
They're throwing the kitchen sink at us because everyone knows they can't win on the issues. The American People rejected their agenda of open borders, hostility toward cops, divisive DEI programming, transgender activism, and hating the freest country on Earth.
It's a losing message. I know it. You know it. And they know it too.
That's why the Democrats resort to the ugly, gutter-level politics that pits Americans against each other. They divide so they can conquer.
And the only way they win is if too many Conservatives in our movement rest on our laurels.
The so-called "experts" say that the Democrat Party is fired up and MAGA will sit out this election without Donald Trump on the ballot.
I say they're full of it (as usual).
I believe in this movement. Even though it's early, I have faith that Conservatives who really get it will rise to the challenge and stand with us. The folks who remember when the Democrats impeached our President, kicked him off the ballot, and indicted him in court WILL step up when we need them the most.
I'm hoping you fit that bill.
[That’s why I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FINAL TIME this month to ask for your help in our greatest hour of need.](http://links.maga-conservatives.com/u/click?_t=da215d85003f407c964bf56cae76557f&_m=c98afe4914964790ac0fc5bd810280d1&_e=DlFi70w6uNhqkWIIRe7Ex2c0lCSI5THM6-S-mFxMrZa-BRSEFIZSs5Jw2kUnG7wtjt6zuzfeHHyFFWrKutx1FBxW0REt5mRS2f4r_rfEAo93I_RBULJ46WMGJur3_-1hW-euROEbzL12szbwhfBE-N2ANwnrYUSZ-asIYRdCTqpju3psV5gXBo_x52gBLOh5keXXEv8kJZ32ZYgZwMD2H5siA2r3_7v24qbCVbxgILpKEADItJKgiJdJe4WH6gqkOzuSEXXUZrlYd4IEQLbM5yLxkuE7aRwAMOk7yu-hiZEyYJ1vng6Ip5KB3sLPKjgmpX4ohLjbmkCBwRfQm_-ndSSMljVnxR1EI_xQ2MHsOBVhHgIaqn5PvdVJcBv_SLVHDM0z_9C2aA4VcRWMEUgxhZHfW0SEraexGKoQlPZ1XrINIcBC9reYBix_6k46b519HI27qFoTq7Ap5F6BFyRg9iMJbP4SKwptjmV9C5k-80Ll_7DmFA_VxqV7o8BhQ2oU91PukQek_GIg6iN5Nvotsc7EjGauaimzWe3vhi1JtdfXaYYK-6u2IAAjinuZQK6M2FWN52af3jJA8SRsGOBoX9X1DgWQyn4zYOVvF6ogn8DTRBdifwLHhB6_G_Msv9-TuaS3yZldZg0sek7wy9S-UesMyt-Fs5VxqFnPfmm7xdGaJlVhCoSWU2b12t5EQxr1bVQ5BL0gMeloJ0ge-rRKfdPn6Vl42vqraAlmAc6FnRBz2tPRL5sw35zCFsjAt1Ap)
We set a goal of raising one million bucks this month from every zip code in America. That's how we can beat the Democrats at their own game, go on offense in every key race on the map, and ensure President Trump has a Conservative House and a Conservative Senate to Make America Great Again.
Do you think you can help us get there?
Whether it's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:

When we humiliate the Democrat Party in back-to-back elections AND cement Republican Majorities in Congress for the President's entire second term - I promise it'll all be worth it.
Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.
God bless America, Vice President JD Vance

clean_body: His message will expire at midnight | Hi, it's Justin from Team Scalise. Vice President JD Vance has been trying to reach you but hasn't heard back from you. He's asked us to pass along his message to as many Patriots as possible, and you've made the cut! After you read his final memo, you can call it a day. \- Justin Team Scalise View Forwarded Message Below: My fellow Americans - this is your Vice President. Where else on the planet can a big-city real estate guy and a small-town hillbilly team up to bring down a political machine to become the leader of the free world and his right hand? The answer is nowhere but the Shining City on a Hill. But just like President Reagan, I believe in my heart of hearts that freedom is always a generation away from extinction. So while I'll never forget Election Night 2024, my sights are set squarely on Election Night 2026. That's because EVERYTHING comes down to the midterm elections. If the Democrats win back control of Congress, everything we've worked so hard for comes to a SCREECHING HALT! That's why the Democrat Machine is mobilizing earlier, faster, and more powerfully than anyone thought possible. And we're in for a shellacking if we don't get our act together. Why? Because the Democrats are... - Unleashing swarms of attack ads in every swing district - just like 2024 - Plastering the media with anti-Trump propaganda - just like all last year - Weaponizing the Deep State to undermine us - just par for the course - Suing us in court to hamstring our agenda - just like Joe Biden did - Tracking to rake in a billion (with a "b") dollars - just like Kamala Harris They're throwing the kitchen sink at us because everyone knows they can't win on the issues. The American People rejected their agenda of open borders, hostility toward cops, divisive DEI programming, transgender activism, and hating the freest country on Earth. It's a losing message. I know it. You know it. And they know it too. That's why the Democrats resort to the ugly, gutter-level politics that pits Americans against each other. They divide so they can conquer. And the only way they win is if too many Conservatives in our movement rest on our laurels. The so-called "experts" say that the Democrat Party is fired up and MAGA will sit out this election without Donald Trump on the ballot. I say they're full of it (as usual). I believe in this movement. Even though it's early, I have faith that Conservatives who really get it will rise to the challenge and stand with us. The folks who remember when the Democrats impeached our President, kicked him off the ballot, and indicted him in court WILL step up when we need them the most. I'm hoping you fit that bill. We set a goal of raising one million bucks this month from every zip code in America. That's how we can beat the Democrats at their own game, go on offense in every key race on the map, and ensure President Trump has a Conservative House and a Conservative Senate to Make America Great Again. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | When we humiliate the Democrat Party in back-to-back elections AND cement Republican Majorities in Congress for the President's entire second term - I promise it'll all be worth it. Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance 19+ top Conservative leaders at the heart of our MAGA Movement have reached out with GRAVE WARNINGS on the state of the Midterms like NEVER BEFORE... A Democrat controlled House would be the worst-case scenario for the MAGA Movement. We're pleading with you to take this seriously. | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. body:
My record speaks for itself. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129277109/613801890/-744584339?refcode=AU_XBCA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_202604011_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDYyNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTgyNWU3ZjAtYzczNS1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-yjb4Dk245dW-yCF6mMOpLWLlOxwxZhMJPsGEC3opoY=&emci=726e9f9a-9533-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=a825e7f0-c735-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=8078851)

Hi team, Every politician running for office will tell you they'll fight for you. They'll stand up for what's right. They'll take on the special interests, the big money, and the powerful forces trying to hold Californians back. _But they don’t have the experience or track record to back it up._ **Being California’s governor isn’t a learn-on-the-job role. Hardworking families are depending on you to know how to do the job on day _one_.** **[That's why, before I ask you to make a contribution to our campaign,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129277112/613801893/-1978189107?refcode=AU_XBCA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_202604011_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDYyNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTgyNWU3ZjAtYzczNS1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-yjb4Dk245dW-yCF6mMOpLWLlOxwxZhMJPsGEC3opoY=) I'm going to show you — I'm not making vague campaign promises. I have an unmatched record to prove I’m committed to serving every Californian as your next governor.** Let me take you back — not to a campaign rally, but to the real moments that define who I am and what I'll do as your governor. \--- 🏥 MEDICARE FOR ALL — BEFORE IT WAS A MOVEMENT In 2005, when universal health care was considered a fringe idea, I co-sponsored the _Medicare for All Act_ in Congress. I did it again in 2007. Again in 2009. Again in 2011. Four times I stood up and said: no American should go without a doctor because they can't afford one. While others waited to see which way the wind would blow, I already knew which way I was going to vote. The Trump administration is gutting Medicaid by a trillion dollars — money that Californians depend on to access care. As your governor, I will fight that with everything I have. Not because it polls well. Because it's right. \--- ✋ THE IRAQ WAR — I VOTED NO Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are on the verge of dragging us into another forever war that will cost billions more dollars and put California's servicemen and women in harm's way. California needs a leader who'll lead the fight to keep us out of another quagmire that will destroy countless lives here at home and siphon money away from urgently needed programs. Unfortunately, this is a situation I'm all too familiar with. **On October 10, 2002, the House of Representatives voted 296 to 133 to authorize the Iraq War. I voted NO.** History proved us right. I said it in 2002, and I believe it still: _Before we put an American in harm's way, tell us why. No one wants to see the region descend into further chaos. There's a lot of concern about getting embroiled in another Vietnam ... about sending American troops once again to fight someone else's war._ California needs a governor who asks hard questions before making consequential decisions — not one who follows the crowd. \--- 🏳️🌈 MARRIAGE EQUALITY — WHEN 368 COLLEAGUES VOTED THE OTHER WAY We have a Supreme Court that has made it clear that they'll throw away years of precedence and jurisprudence in the name of serving the right’s extremist agenda. From defending billionaire elites to ending abortion rights to scrapping the Voting Rights Act. Recent decisions have made it clear — rights we thought were fundamental and here to stay are no longer safe. **_That puts marriage equality directly in their crosshairs._** Californians need to know their next governor won't blink when their right to marry who they love is threatened. In 1996, Congress voted on the _Defense of Marriage Act_ — a bill that would define marriage as between a man and a woman and deny equal rights to gay and lesbian Americans. It passed 342 to 67. _**I was one of just 67 members who voted NO.**_ I stood up for Marriage Equality when it had just a 15% approval rating in Congress. I was standing up for those rights long before it was popular. I'll keep standing up for them as your governor. \--- Three votes. Three moments when the easy thing and the right thing pointed in opposite directions — **_and I didn't hesitate._** That's not a stump speech. That's 30 years of showing up and doing the right thing, withstanding the pressure from special interest groups, D.C. elites, and even my own party. As California's Attorney General, I sued the Trump administration over 120 times to defend health care rights, hardworking Californians, and Dreamers. As U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services, I fought to expand coverage for millions of Americans. And long before any of that, I was casting the hard votes in Congress when almost no one else would. Now I'm asking you to fight alongside me in our fight to be California's next governor. **[Chip in whatever you can today — $5, $25, $100 — and let's send a message that California is ready for a governor who doesn't need to learn the job. One who's already been doing it their whole career.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129277115/613801898/-1978189107?refcode=AU_XBCA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_202604011_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDYyNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTgyNWU3ZjAtYzczNS1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-yjb4Dk245dW-yCF6mMOpLWLlOxwxZhMJPsGEC3opoY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129277117/613801900/-1978189107?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_XBCA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_202604011_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDYyNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTgyNWU3ZjAtYzczNS1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-yjb4Dk245dW-yCF6mMOpLWLlOxwxZhMJPsGEC3opoY=)

clean_body: My record speaks for itself. | Hi team, Every politician running for office will tell you they'll fight for you. They'll stand up for what's right. They'll take on the special interests, the big money, and the powerful forces trying to hold Californians back. But they don’t have the experience or track record to back it up. Being California’s governor isn’t a learn-on-the-job role. Hardworking families are depending on you to know how to do the job on day one. = I'm going to show you — I'm not making vague campaign promises. I have an unmatched record to prove I’m committed to serving every Californian as your next governor. Let me take you back — not to a campaign rally, but to the real moments that define who I am and what I'll do as your governor. \--- 🏥 MEDICARE FOR ALL — BEFORE IT WAS A MOVEMENT In 2005, when universal health care was considered a fringe idea, I co-sponsored the Medicare for All Act in Congress. I did it again in 2007. Again in 2009. Again in 2011. Four times I stood up and said: no American should go without a doctor because they can't afford one. While others waited to see which way the wind would blow, I already knew which way I was going to vote. The Trump administration is gutting Medicaid by a trillion dollars — money that Californians depend on to access care. As your governor, I will fight that with everything I have. Not because it polls well. Because it's right. \--- ✋ THE IRAQ WAR — I VOTED NO Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are on the verge of dragging us into another forever war that will cost billions more dollars and put California's servicemen and women in harm's way. California needs a leader who'll lead the fight to keep us out of another quagmire that will destroy countless lives here at home and siphon money away from urgently needed programs. Unfortunately, this is a situation I'm all too familiar with. On October 10, 2002, the House of Representatives voted 296 to 133 to authorize the Iraq War. I voted NO. History proved us right. I said it in 2002, and I believe it still: Before we put an American in harm's way, tell us why. No one wants to see the region descend into further chaos. There's a lot of concern about getting embroiled in another Vietnam ... about sending American troops once again to fight someone else's war. California needs a governor who asks hard questions before making consequential decisions — not one who follows the crowd. \--- 🏳️🌈 MARRIAGE EQUALITY — WHEN 368 COLLEAGUES VOTED THE OTHER WAY We have a Supreme Court that has made it clear that they'll throw away years of precedence and jurisprudence in the name of serving the right’s extremist agenda. From defending billionaire elites to ending abortion rights to scrapping the Voting Rights Act. Recent decisions have made it clear — rights we thought were fundamental and here to stay are no longer safe. That puts marriage equality directly in their crosshairs. Californians need to know their next governor won't blink when their right to marry who they love is threatened. In 1996, Congress voted on the Defense of Marriage Act — a bill that would define marriage as between a man and a woman and deny equal rights to gay and lesbian Americans. It passed 342 to 67. I was one of just 67 members who voted NO. I stood up for Marriage Equality when it had just a 15% approval rating in Congress. I was standing up for those rights long before it was popular. I'll keep standing up for them as your governor. \--- Three votes. Three moments when the easy thing and the right thing pointed in opposite directions — and I didn't hesitate. That's not a stump speech. That's 30 years of showing up and doing the right thing, withstanding the pressure from special interest groups, D.C. elites, and even my own party. As California's Attorney General, I sued the Trump administration over 120 times to defend health care rights, hardworking Californians, and Dreamers. As U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services, I fought to expand coverage for millions of Americans. And long before any of that, I was casting the hard votes in Congress when almost no one else would. Now I'm asking you to fight alongside me in our fight to be California's next governor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Xavier Becerra for Governor 2026 330 N Brand Blvd Suite 700 Glendale, CA 91203 United States mailto:info@xavierbecerra2026.com | Paid for by Becerra for Governor 2026

subject: POLL: Arrest more criminals?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIANCO FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC # 1479095
body:
I have a very particular set of skills — catching and arresting bad guys. But I want to know where you stand. Should our state be locking up more criminals? Take my poll right now to record your response. [ ](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/R9RoocEJMkP2Kcrcaqey6NwqmiSKFAKQ1fXWW2xk1hH6nG89QeRzjweD5V2_tNw_s6s1t4KLtDqHCMW54li72rWM1c-Vq3EiPiYpm6kKchNQ2LHUwJ1rT0TZw40XjbRXzOz9IEKJhZVwLkJU-N7F3N9szho3IWk7KxrxwBvE_FJgr-ZCfkqeCGBCwtQk65VF3VTFcHA6WHuRnzRcGsMUbRGFzztJEINWOYtxMeYXvHsOA8wb5YLoVN44tGU8CBBx56Fpv5vcOCnPko14ouUGsiD-LwW4ptnigP2IT4lD1sFrq_IUQgnHLNSbin6WDDs0pQ4Fg961XtPOUxGtDJtdbiAQSal4LZKXeJA7msSFRMTkKvrTGfhntBnoljkAvWH-X9KUgA6Ebc35kVV2xpfozeqEqrGA-FiFzdsf5V5lenMQe7KcpgvfvHrTp13dGem5GumRGLXrnjkgjZA-8HQw3lzmQBDY4bBfbZCB8FhRd8LLCUiciROuAqnnlGXimkg6zF1cYOAVyyAVxbLDKdtZTa_8wYfwhrlWtpcU4svVOw/sI-Hv1OBCWCApIhDbY4tj-NCBqkyhskh/19)
---
Peter, We all have skills. I'm really good at arresting bad guys. Right now, I can't think of anything California needs more. I have spent my entire life protecting California from criminals. But if you look at Sacramento today, between the radical pro-crime policies, the open borders, and the total lack of accountability -- crooks and crazies are running the state!
[ ](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/RL31kHUlYqdmdo69NnCup4uaTk9dg85C6sYV44DanYzTDLLGlVooxbpY96myFXlKePfR2RxsAMSpblgH6GQiWP8IGfIXYULevwRyf911RrNG9ADnN6qLb1zX7H450GyemJG8y7SOaTB26NGYiTzaj9Z_ru_gG0_HPAM4-L6DAqS6qeJcXslZYuTxewnqA7eXxWQqmmQC7Ia8DXFF60q_7Olw98fM3RzXvT8npiRnQHRxrdDiiG0QC8GMY17UKnRNxTUqArWXCHka6GeCJzspGDkNWzu8XFajoSHU6AlWlhjNGwjU2FSWQ0f9-cmI9XlSVawwzZobgQZzTA6MgUyOrLLPFAcEsLyWMoUa-3nvGc2Rdg0D56TW-rz0sSVE87-G8qvyP5qM7HxKB_LERQrS9PJwxX2fqKGk4odBgz79xGQxqOzM7nlgQKL4UTz5rO35Wx-PjK5q7lUrWUhvkUR3fxavKkXBw59Ec6AWjep1kbdiBTTzymoI9kQgLPd19R71AUFtoo5Y41K_rqXnAU3PUieCC5HtXsgIDa05wkvxAg/efFZZkurpIr2i0Axd5-7MRhNjvEsxX8Z/19)
No more. It is time to kick them out of office, **support law enforcement and tough-on-crime prosecutors** , and put the criminals behind bars where they belong so we can enjoy safe streets again. Do you have my back on this? What do you think? **Should California be locking up more criminals?** You know where I stand. I want to know where YOU stand. Click below to let me know.
[ YES — BREAK THE LAW, GO TO JAIL ](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/CJNfnSb7rngKPMnDXSXp9ac2frgQTa7c6lpNql2ld4hIUid9l-ItFJNZPC2McHMIiHE3WSARYGE9lTCwucthSPugyB6r-jXM5Y2nk4vvytulhysnYrRVCyvFyE7lBZuCF8Z1Qrhe5bX5U7PM240WiCt3C8zNVu96QJXslG79t-kNElgMH6aSDyH6Okm-hmh9MfzPFfJMKAp9_isQWLgH9lcdPXk6kQAb58BSCy8BHS-BObn_pkcRzH80-nf2UswTkTN4WnFM4BmTsnPLAKNVWV1krYcVGn2tt9G78jGIXVE2yF0ooHlxRWSA5B7yFQfhmjSfpmP65fCe56bYMTPo8cpNC2fduHqvJiBbWTGFbnc4X4aMqgKO6HLZyHjlu3DFPLC3Y-Z___CJFqo3pft_jXG-JZT9PP8Sa6AjNW75AWFx0gD8g6TrgU6oLctiWrN7Hfnn-BqIhu2Ms_XWmFOp-jnyli7Ea2moIL59Wrt3lr081j8xxKuL7Wr-rg_hvFh3-6ekXBA-kEmyAy0oyUcFw5Hi8X81kkNonz9UP6dEUQ/ADq0yogkphBJqC5rXkfbwqqHJkLZ7TcF/19)
OR
[ NO — CRIMINALS DESERVE MORE CHANCES ](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/VlbEGzTPyncEXD-GTj9euIUIT5z-FU2YAqX6X4GXjscEfJBelNYNX0OVcZZWDg9MNnu4de2kti25z6JQ_mL5DppTIrKev_PM5BxVT__nbkCAz4ZzyzUFpz7xW5KWNq1GifV4thZUyUDZiCtgu8qBRU5MidFlDQEMa-y1J4DbTn16xDx5kwrPuO8GslI2R2728DE6OlXJI0ACblI0Jj62ELfhsnnZXw_w8XcCgi3A5J82z5yflLRzEYmuPwlMgSd-G6Qw4h-29rQTR6MzgRc7iVCOcbXZoujGcopHewCLI7hvIuhbJ4m0hiaiG9yYO6WdRZx-DOva3HlUDHZBaIATctg8KxQWk6-niF3BgFXVI3y8faDLRUFCnWcbRORr4aEee3S6x9Mo4RBgUusSpUL-vk-Y74HpaGRrfh6JNWOKihjHB6mfavfzO6ZopyygYc_K7RbE5eY_mtTgVBwIArLghdn1KjWg3Dl86pO35eiJqH47moZJOOPXoNHO57FMIM5GSCp_2DErtsq1QhWFpzkHFKJjVaSreb5Vufc5cOFiKA/GQdSPwkx2ce8Z_2Wwm2vZjG1mdMUQ2hr/19)

name: Emily, Team Saikat
subject: We need more volunteers to win this seat. Can we convince you to pick up a shift?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Saikat For Congress
body:
There are only a few weeks left before ballots drop, which means we have our work cut out for us. | | |
---
| Hi team, If you've been following this race, you've probably seen the headlines: A billionaire-backed Super PAC is pulling out all the stops to attack Saikat. Deceptive mailers are flooding voters' mailboxes in the hopes of muddying the water. But despite it all, Saikat's support continues to grow. That's because **money alone doesn't win elections. Organizing does.** **_[We're within striking distance of the lead. Will you sign up for a volunteer shift to help put him over the top?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMe9suWVqtFb-BWoi2l0CARTdYXuqUdtPtsCMuSB9Q0rn-hSuXoLQbcN3cq24XNRpeJjVCmiqIqKj4_7EkZfUKolknWAodIIMiIVwLKYC_FcWWdL_VRxtSLGj2iXs6jmhHGKDb2173nv5KZ0hBjNX6lRQ8YfisH779kpN9OG9dWiswxEbdnJoPOzpUAYabqoHAclcBX8mdTDZkjpfdvAwj2FfGp29QRvO-cXTHvuJDCp4QIfODg0BlpT6_JzxgCpxiZ2kjcfWw3Xq-RvLDQFb4F2aJD_6qT7vJ0v-ywzwEWJ79FFouI3f7A7mDYGVbSM2sE_lFOseeROg-xhPgGY60hyh6qsmiEmiVuphyG0hZ4qfTZOYi2wKrxhtNWJeksOEFw/4pp/2w9_mtB5RYePfEE-U4EByA/h0/h001.hhZcIQa7fseXvO0iw2Cw95Pngee5xL1VsFfxsioiwcE)_** [Yes, I'll volunteer »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMe9suWVqtFb-BWoi2l0CARTdYXuqUdtPtsCMuSB9Q0rn-hSuXoLQbcN3cq24XNRpeJjVCmiqIqKj4_7EkZfUKolknWAodIIMiIVwLKYC_FcWWdL_VRxtSLGj2iXs6jmhHGKDb2173nv5KZ0hBjNX6lQD2vMca97dnyJns4pybOKusImAGxHxtoA7PXJIzcBKayqYoll_Ygr20d1VTtTb-Pp6cbvwDqtS4k288JLUb366rviHxpXMVuMqciZ7l92kRK5s8Spv2VW6L7yzPCbEm0zeqBa0GG8b2C0rftP10ixBUuSpSTkYTPFzyjDn4HsYiyC0EBKiasqILgYMXMkUOyAhnvg0_tDTHXhfzBTtdy9XKeZaqxuYW7drwXoHm3Ytdw/4pp/2w9_mtB5RYePfEE-U4EByA/h1/h001.qrjN_jX0soxnxb3M1fvvGYfWvcmmHwBdxrGemc_PB64) We've already knocked almost 300,000 doors. We've had tens of thousands of conversations with voters — at farmers markets, town halls, and on doorsteps and sidewalks in every corner of San Francisco. **And I can tell you from firsthand experience: When voters hear Saikat's message, they support him!** But this is where the rubber meets the road: **Voters will start receiving their ballots in just under 4 weeks****— which means we need to scale our operation _today_ to reach voters before they cast their vote.** If you've been waiting for an opportunity to support Saikat — or only just learned about his campaign — the _most_ important thing you can do for the campaign is **_[sign up for a volunteer shift and help us talk to voters.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMe9suWVqtFb-BWoi2l0CARTdYXuqUdtPtsCMuSB9Q0rn-hSuXoLQbcN3cq24XNRpeJjVCmiqIqKj4_7EkZfUKolknWAodIIMiIVwLKYC_FcWWdL_VRxtSLGj2iXs6jmhHGKDb2173nv5KZ0hBjNX6lTJmpHkFFqNbYEQ53fBJ7ggnFX7JxA-Ae1eXE8rue2tqVPFP8fw1WTxvQy16Xu_4RRGXJ4BqavpChrGkXtQcJWjs7ExTHos4AT2EsXQkuu970VrTaJHA6k2pTrq_oiDkOyVNDqektdz9Xn_A-AJTyFyfSsvek_Vig36RjNfr2eB1IGhMoBg1EiE8uqicKBmyJGA3KtiORJBHsP-5Vj4Frxzacgy0k4ej485G1Cx30TE9g/4pp/2w9_mtB5RYePfEE-U4EByA/h2/h001.6ZBih0UDOIT6Rgh7XudqBrdn9YURvJn4eme4BnnPPMU)_** [Sign up for a shift »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMe9suWVqtFb-BWoi2l0CARTdYXuqUdtPtsCMuSB9Q0rn-hSuXoLQbcN3cq24XNRpeJjVCmiqIqKj4_7EkZfUKolknWAodIIMiIVwLKYC_FcWWdL_VRxtSLGj2iXs6jmhHGKDb2173nv5KZ0hBjNX6lRygIZFchMSvFEBFk8wE-ZwoYSPftXjYIw0VtyKSiYMqj2QbL6KiNJBqcYpZA9P1LtTbBZDRIhI6gAdAU8JtLUn66nw3HqBds3H_Z9rP7e53BAYOXNzyXoIDiPJDYJ9dx4ZHtGCL7TaS4hbBR-73eYa1tXVeWb95fJ7aBWhjJZ3pt7y59lwFcVhVt3iyyYXJ9b3KQ5jZ7s88nWi2MTH7v9nAFWgwv663mqUE7isH9iBPg/4pp/2w9_mtB5RYePfEE-U4EByA/h3/h001.iyQCBFn5EsocDy1SgWgikh-7dX8G8IOR3MCyDZ0yUQM) Can't attend an in-person event? Saikat Chakrabarti was Bernie’s Tech Director, AOC’s first chief of staff, founded Justice Democrats, and helped bring the Green New Deal to life. clean_body: There are only a few weeks left before ballots drop, which means we have our work cut out for us. | | | | Hi team, If you've been following this race, you've probably seen the headlines: A billionaire-backed Super PAC is pulling out all the stops to attack Saikat. Deceptive mailers are flooding voters' mailboxes in the hopes of muddying the water. But despite it all, Saikat's support continues to grow. That's because money alone doesn't win elections. Organizing does. We've already knocked almost 300,000 doors. We've had tens of thousands of conversations with voters — at farmers markets, town halls, and on doorsteps and sidewalks in every corner of San Francisco. And I can tell you from firsthand experience: When voters hear Saikat's message, they support him! But this is where the rubber meets the road: Voters will start receiving their ballots in just under 4 weeks— which means we need to scale our operation today to reach voters before they cast their vote. If you've been waiting for an opportunity to support Saikat — or only just learned about his campaign — the most important thing you can do for the campaign is Can't attend an in-person event? No problem! We host phonebanks multiple times per week, and would love for you to join us virtually. Since day 1, Saikat has been taking on the establishment and fighting to push the bounds of what is possible. We've got to put endless wars and bloated military budgets behind us and use that money to make life more affordable at home, fight for universal healthcare and childcare, fully fund Muni and BART, build more housing and lower rents, and so much more. San Francisco deserves nothing less from its next representative. Now, making that vision a reality is within reach. Let's do this. — Emily Emily Hyden Campaign Manager Saikat for Congress | | | | Saikat Chakrabarti was Bernie’s Tech Director, AOC’s first chief of staff, founded Justice Democrats, and helped bring the Green New Deal to life. He’s running for Congress to build a San Francisco that works for everyone—teachers, immigrants, service workers, and everyone else who makes this city the best in the world. If you believe San Franciscans deserve affordable housing, universal healthcare, climate resilience, and public power: and learn more about our campaign . **It was YOUR tireless support that put the White House back into President Trump’s hands and made history on November 5th.**

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Will you please make your first contribution to our campaign?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR]
body:
[ stdin# ]Jocelyn Benson for Governor
It’s
Jocelyn Benson.

We’re coming up on our mid-month fundraising deadline, and I could use
your help. [ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3976?t=1001&akid=1590%2E181023%2E6fXseI ]Will you step up
today and make your first contribution to our campaign before our
mid-month deadline?

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3977?t=1002&akid=1590%2E181023%2E6fXseI ]Donate →

I’m in this race because I believe everyone deserves a fair shot in life.
It’s why I started my career in Alabama working on civil rights, then as a
law clerk to a federal civil rights judge in Detroit, and now, as
Secretary of State of Michigan, where I fight every day to protect and
expand voting rights.

And it’s why I’m committed to building this campaign for governor from the
ground up, from thousands of individual contributors – not billionaires or
corporate PACs.

While my Republican counterpart has already accepted $5 million from the
DeVos family funneled into a shady super PAC, I am running to represent
YOU. I won’t be beholden to any corporation or billionaire donor.

But, I
can’t do it alone. After Trump won Michigan in 2024, all eyes are on this
race to see if we can keep the governor’s office blue in November.

The latest polls show what we’ve known for a while: this race is going to
be extremely close. We can’t take any deadline or vote for granted.

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3976?t=1003&akid=1590%2E181023%2E6fXseI ]So while I really hate reaching out and asking for money, I have to
ask: will you please make your first
contribution to our campaign today to ensure we have what
it takes to go up against the GOP war chest:

clean_body: [ stdin# ]Jocelyn Benson for Governor It’s Jocelyn Benson. We’re coming up on our mid-month fundraising deadline, and I could use your help. [ ]Will you step up today and make your first contribution to our campaign before our mid-month deadline? [ ]Donate → I’m in this race because I believe everyone deserves a fair shot in life. It’s why I started my career in Alabama working on civil rights, then as a law clerk to a federal civil rights judge in Detroit, and now, as Secretary of State of Michigan, where I fight every day to protect and expand voting rights. And it’s why I’m committed to building this campaign for governor from the ground up, from thousands of individual contributors – not billionaires or corporate PACs. While my Republican counterpart has already accepted $5 million from the DeVos family funneled into a shady super PAC, I am running to represent YOU. I won’t be beholden to any corporation or billionaire donor. But, I can’t do it alone. After Trump won Michigan in 2024, all eyes are on this race to see if we can keep the governor’s office blue in November. The latest polls show what we’ve known for a while: this race is going to be extremely close. We can’t take any deadline or vote for granted. [ ]So while I really hate reaching out and asking for money, I have to ask: will you please make your first contribution to our campaign today to ensure we have what it takes to go up against the GOP war chest: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]Donate $5 → [ ]Donate $25 → [ ]Donate $50 → [ ]Donate $100 → [ ]Donate $250 → [ ]Other → Thank you, Jocelyn Benson

name: Andrew Sypher, Turning Point USA
subject: If you’ve been losing hope — read this
body:
| | | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=9414644996a14c9aba6aa7d5f3dcefb6&_e=pr74qE7RBsLdZZHJeQGzCydJMes1X7U-JrK1xqxPScaG8Aj_1lI-9gRUuNtIi0qAC6taX9ypmhgNTl2LU3bBpA_K9t45z6w8wzTUFb3i2H8Go7bhEO-RW40fMIXghonBsTCRlQYCM7nQapOX0Pv3cgMxvzg73QhQinwhKAxgGbtwLeA-pRihHriWD7p-Xbgi7wXlpa5xYMamx9rsIAzjOP_6DY3sqi6w_E8z9-YNntz7fh2bw81rglkDglM-8PnhMd8Kffb0xgREZQ41n90vxwSTbnTuCrrd8u0qNMCXA-wTgG8MQkKaisyuKzpnZKnUeh35YFKesI7FnCAXFfZlRZJV2XJOq7MWXsxwaqs_TCwObzAtbPdlPif4G22L7qln6eAqGmxDZm0RJjvivrhB4TaH454mu47WovXV2vB3nMFuZ5Cg4BWaEVVTMiVWIOo4i-hgZXWBKjTsfnCG_0yokVFmJAViZHP1nH-3q9gw9Kfe_mVHJr74t1fcV-DpsN3CGyqXtB9fBKRwvStQcIYjJ4oSvTdyFGRn_gmS0A9pUsKT0IDjzzjlK4EGJlgZpeV1zBUpW1pzCIg62eFM-F9XAOQFZxV2SGzO_vytqIcnhqmnkUru7M_QGuTWCOhsrJi6vu5I0GYHnXuEg6fkd2ZJPYtTxV3Ja6mkJ-KC-ccNxBF3cDaLX1cKlq1qmgPuiDM4Rg-Fs8LHwRalGFGaFp4wXQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Patriot,
---
If you ever doubted we could win America's youth back from the Left...

If you ever wondered whether we'd lost the next generation for good...

If you ever sat up at night -- watching the news, seeing what's happening in our schools, our culture, our country -- and thought, _" Is it already too late?" _

You're not alone.

A lot of good people have been asking the same question.

**But I want to tell you something that might just change how you feel about the future of this country... **

Just one year ago, Turning Point USA's high school program -- which is now called "Club America" -- was in about 1,200 schools.

That was no small feat.

Starting a single chapter today takes serious courage. Students get mocked. Threatened. Investigated. Sometimes even physically attacked.

So reaching 1,200 chapters already felt like a miracle.

_Then Charlie called me... _

He said: "Andrew, I love what we're doing with our high school program -- but we've got to move faster."

I told him, "We are."

Charlie replied, "No you're not thinking what I'm thinking... I want to be in 35,000 high schools."

I laughed. I told him, "Charlie, there aren't even 35,000 high schools in America."

"Okay," he said, "How many are there?"

"About 27,000."

Without skipping a beat, Charlie said, "Okay, great. Let's do 27,000!"
I'll be honest -- I froze.

We didn't have the numbers. We didn't have the staff. We didn't have the roadmap yet.

But he wasn't fazed.

He said, "Don't worry. We'll figure it out. We'll do it together."

That was Charlie.

He didn't think small. He didn't move slow. He didn't settle for "maybe someday."

He believed in going now.

And he believed that if the mission was right, the path would reveal itself.

He chased what others only dreamed about... and turned what others thought impossible into reality.

That's why he built Turning Point USA in the first place.

That's why tens of thousands of students were inspired by Charlie to start chapters of their own -- _many in schools where they were explicitly told not to. _

**And that 's why today -- less than a year later -- we're not in 1,200 schools anymore: **
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=9414644996a14c9aba6aa7d5f3dcefb6&_e=pr74qE7RBsLdZZHJeQGzCydJMes1X7U-JrK1xqxPScaG8Aj_1lI-9gRUuNtIi0qAC6taX9ypmhgNTl2LU3bBpA_K9t45z6w8wzTUFb3i2H8Go7bhEO-RW40fMIXghonBsTCRlQYCM7nQapOX0Pv3cgMxvzg73QhQinwhKAxgGbtwLeA-pRihHriWD7p-Xbgi7wXlpa5xYMamx9rsIAzjOP_6DY3sqi6w_E8z9-YNntz7fh2bw81rglkDglM-8Pnh0qINot1GExuBIdgUxqTLn_p8ZAUewvf9WyPeWNWPX9wcnirSGQk30rqlXAm7mat2st5xWve3VmbWfHtSFI_Reuj02KTeX2fvHMNESTXCkxe4ER_RwAWYFTIWC-djabpAQ5Tk8N640TEqFCU0xHjJyksuZP_84bESDEQXkola9beURqbHgAH6tPtzwSeKuf4u6QwT6afTSUqXumF9mJuGvbEo2SlFzfY517QXcwYVCJkD1641OV_w91QPqKUYieXEbYMvr4E8jZ7lc4ilTmDqfY23znFm3SbAF9FGTYCJNRG7SplVY3TMlLlsoCKUGQ87eAB8zRjenwqNhkEDiHKXbPzy0Nk_xftpTC5pkIRYRXgzp8_iMwCKuqkGyVNg5whVyfPcYbMhWWJ03sJdXedv3NPh_VM0K3u8E1U_bh8ZAjWn_jPHmSKes4OuF5CzJz6W4fthLlmi6wIbZj_JG5dqnA%3D%3D)
---
We're in 3,300.

That's roughly 13% of all high schools in America.

Eight states have officially partnered with Club America to bring our chapters into every school statewide.

✅ Florida
✅ Texas
✅ Tennessee
✅ Oklahoma
✅ Montana
✅ Nebraska
✅ Arkansas
✅ Indiana

And we're just getting started.

Think about that: 13% of America's youth now have a place at school where they can say it's okay to love this country...

That it's okay to be bold. That it's okay to believe in God, in family, and in freedom.

_That 's what Club America is about... _

**Giving the next generation a place where they can find their courage, develop grit, and learn how to lead the fight for their country. **
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=9414644996a14c9aba6aa7d5f3dcefb6&_e=pr74qE7RBsLdZZHJeQGzCydJMes1X7U-JrK1xqxPScaG8Aj_1lI-9gRUuNtIi0qAC6taX9ypmhgNTl2LU3bBpA_K9t45z6w8wzTUFb3i2H8Go7bhEO-RW40fMIXghonBsTCRlQYCM7nQapOX0Pv3cgMxvzg73QhQinwhKAxgGbtwLeA-pRihHriWD7p-Xbgi7wXlpa5xYMamx9rsIAzjOP_6DY3sqi6w_E8z9-YNntz7fh2bw81rglkDglM-8PnhxbYifFa5C0LHKV1G7mXSjzwSmigjia8JAhRpQlcplnjs_8pDJs5Fcy070NMOhSgwwZSHBKLxndjUvDnPOkj5s8KeDD5VzyawP4VjmHK4rV4_IInl4DecMwZI2D7QJlDsRBAbR7EIWwd6zZJrpwMkAKjI1HE_VK02a_G3hV9Yr7GqIo6TkXroKaE-fWns-HgQOLD_3AmfPPP_bBxex7klnfIVQwZ5PeQtE7weq0OvvoGIzIgq9svkJkoXMh1FUCLcgNapLnQdqjgJ3XZPQbJj9PDz3tgkZK9ejR2cqUHEN0tpv-6ZAvI_WCaGiIjpBgX74Fl-Gkm-xePDTkGa5dfXe_MGRtFqepb7WLGafGJekPOCNsx3ItxiaZ23-id0y8BsY2Xu-DqDPl9vWfx5f9g7uvwTE7z9MGCOiFoKLHJmRGJ3aYk3UfhtL6iJs5tGMLITIzqtMjBxWbKenZgZHwMQXA%3D%3D)
---
_But now, Patriot, the question is... _

**What will it take to bring Club America to the next 3,300 schools? What will it take to bring it to all 27,000? **

Because here's the truth:

These students aren't just signing up. _They 're stepping up. _

They're leading chapters in schools where America is attacked... where they're often targeted for daring to say what they believe... and where speaking the truth is dangerous.

But that isn't stopping them.

They're still showing up. They're speaking out. And they're growing stronger than ever.

They're becoming exactly the kind of young patriots Charlie believed in -- not just bold, _but brave_. Not just loud, but _principled_.

**Every time a student starts a new chapter, we make sure they 're not standing alone. **

**We send them an activism kit -- American flags, pocket Constitutions, chapter materials, and leadership tools. **

These kits give student leaders everything they need to rally their peers and stand strong on their campuses.

Each one costs just $25 to pack and ship.

**[If you’re able to, I hope you’ll help send a kit to the next student who raises their hand to lead by making your gift to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=9414644996a14c9aba6aa7d5f3dcefb6&_e=pr74qE7RBsLdZZHJeQGzCydJMes1X7U-JrK1xqxPScaG8Aj_1lI-9gRUuNtIi0qAC6taX9ypmhgNTl2LU3bBpA_K9t45z6w8wzTUFb3i2H8Go7bhEO-RW40fMIXghonBsTCRlQYCM7nQapOX0Pv3cgMxvzg73QhQinwhKAxgGbtwLeA-pRihHriWD7p-Xbgi7wXlpa5xYMamx9rsIAzjOP_6DY3sqi6w_E8z9-YNntz7fh2bw81rglkDglM-8Pnh_0vwwkDYkL1VCTRSU927I-FgrL9AWlKJ2qepp6DCx1mHqm60LliPyNNKhWebPGUa384lSlEh6Bnei8ERLMWCQJgLYo_I90I7dfndPhjXlgGThXT_yaMsdX6OQVAcc5Uj-3tzPOLWH1ycfi3nwWKcrkwr2DOowsFlWm0YSv54V6KdKVyqMfxVbRcqOisRZA5ucUAVNen9RS5AYy-aV7czAl-K1hqLGN-3yhjIYpmMZ3LWS-CsJ4eL7quHdPBhEf63mEUW1xcA4A4A9i5oOqboVkErMbCiaatSiIwLZs_Y0xT9AvlER6ZrJ3stseKG1PCALfzkJoz_RKyyrtxS-N8CY293Wa0JAkkOmeYGbxfihAHVOOd3QdmUlEQM19XqIAwzFwxbCa8P6ZSoohPAy9wzUYfoxAfKXTgiwsq5FGFGl5uh7yy6V5StJUOaQiZ_VQDPT4sCKPhR88Ap9hDkAMGh-A%3D%3D)**

Charlie wanted a Club America chapter in every high school so no student would ever feel alone for loving God, defending their country, or believing in truth.

And so the next generation wouldn't be handed over to the Left by default.

Let's make Charlie's dream real -- 27,000 high schools. And a generation that doesn't apologize for loving this country.

It's up to us to finish what he started.

One chapter. One student. One school at a time.

Let's move faster. Let's push further. Let's get this done -- for Charlie, and for the country we all love.
---
| | **For Charlie,** **Andrew Sypher** Chief Field OfficerTurning Point USA
---

**P.S.** There's one part of that phone call with Charlie I was going to leave out...

He wasn't just dreaming big -- he was issuing a warning.

When he told me we needed to move faster, he added: "The enemy is moving younger. They're coming after students earlier. _**We don 't have time to wait.**_**" **

And he was right.

The Left has deeply embedded themselves in our schools -- rewriting history, poisoning young minds, and raising their next generation of radical foot soldiers.

We may be in 13% of our schools now...

_But in the other 87%? _

The Left has free rein. Zero resistance. No voice to challenge them.

And if we don't flood those schools with truth -- fast -- we'll have a generation that thinks loving America is "fascist," that faith is "hateful," and that freedom and free speech is "dangerous."

You know it. I know it. Charlie knew it.

He knew the fight for America's future would be won or lost in high school classrooms and on college campuses.

And that fight has never been more urgent than it is right now.

**Patriot, if you 've ever wondered whether one small act could change the direction of our country -- _this is it._ **

You may not be able to step into a hostile high school and stand for truth like these students do.

But you can send them the tools to do it.

These students are ready. They've raised their hands. They chose courage and decided to lead.

All they're waiting on... is us.

**Every $25 helps send an activism kit to a young patriot and gives them everything they need to win hearts and minds. **

You're gift reminds them they're not alone. It gives them the confidence to stand and fight back.

And you'll be saving our country -- one future freedom fighter at a time.

**[Help sponsor an activism kit today. Get it into their hands. And let’s win this fight while we still have a country to fight for.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=9414644996a14c9aba6aa7d5f3dcefb6&_e=pr74qE7RBsLdZZHJeQGzCydJMes1X7U-JrK1xqxPScaG8Aj_1lI-9gRUuNtIi0qAC6taX9ypmhgNTl2LU3bBpA_K9t45z6w8wzTUFb3i2H8Go7bhEO-RW40fMIXghonBsTCRlQYCM7nQapOX0Pv3cgMxvzg73QhQinwhKAxgGbtwLeA-pRihHriWD7p-Xbgi7wXlpa5xYMamx9rsIAzjOP_6DY3sqi6w_E8z9-YNntz7fh2bw81rglkDglM-8PnhxDrMRQTNElppZePXSVkrf7g6wQVj6IvQbB2OtPkKh4eQnHyoYcPF8WrzXKv9PhQ-kptms0Zic7GIFP5ibq7lyexvHAoa3lvC2kSmi0RNNafhYxC94Ux81fObyv2UBoMFV6b6hwckX0MdXKngB2zVpx6aPIFW51lpfLgHlX8gSCLzykhqbH_YvV9kiYPtD8Fb4BEfzHCblmud4XL4FoatA0SWHUB2wp8cHM3ReqLkX1xqjOYz8jGJNbl4nHcrBQdQPf9n70XxByrPhB7Xo1bYyU2Dc__cxRQ2CZuSjyijoNEKOOQj5tVzhWt1QAa9YRXdZOZ7BP2vdIzcWu-RenSjsQ0I1BxOE2UpwgMRPaZXha4VnSsWa93Xd_G-t3wCQP-k7Cs3Y-hfIbRM03ZoeHRk8MhSmNSE18F81-b35Iy5GByLQafNJM9hnW2meknhUHxS9MMoPdLpb3vddmR_4asVdA%3D%3D)**
