Then Charlie called me... He said: "Andrew, I love what we're doing with our high school program -- but we've got to move faster." I told him, "We are." Charlie replied, "No you're not thinking what I'm thinking... I want to be in 35,000 high schools." I laughed. I told him, "Charlie, there aren't even 35,000 high schools in America." "Okay," he said, "How many are there?" "About 27,000." Without skipping a beat, Charlie said, "Okay, great. Let's do 27,000!" I'll be honest -- I froze. We didn't have the numbers. We didn't have the staff. We didn't have the roadmap yet. But he wasn't fazed. He said, "Don't worry. We'll figure it out. We'll do it together." That was Charlie. He didn't think small. He didn't move slow. He didn't settle for "maybe someday." He believed in going now. And he believed that if the mission was right, the path would reveal itself. He chased what others only dreamed about... and turned what others thought impossible into reality. That's why he built Turning Point USA in the first place. That's why tens of thousands of students were inspired by Charlie to start chapters of their own -- many in schools where they were explicitly told not to. And that 's why today -- less than a year later -- we're not in 1,200 schools anymore: We're in 3,300. That's roughly 13% of all high schools in America. Eight states have officially partnered with Club America to bring our chapters into every school statewide. ✅ Florida ✅ Texas ✅ Tennessee ✅ Oklahoma ✅ Montana ✅ Nebraska ✅ Arkansas ✅ Indiana And we're just getting started. Think about that: 13% of America's youth now have a place at school where they can say it's okay to love this country... That it's okay to be bold. That it's okay to believe in God, in family, and in freedom. That 's what Club America is about... Giving the next generation a place where they can find their courage, develop grit, and learn how to lead the fight for their country. But now, Patriot, the question is... What will it take to bring Club America to the next 3,300 schools? What will it take to bring it to all 27,000? Because here's the truth: These students aren't just signing up. They 're stepping up. They're leading chapters in schools where America is attacked... where they're often targeted for daring to say what they believe... and where speaking the truth is dangerous. But that isn't stopping them. They're still showing up. They're speaking out. And they're growing stronger than ever. They're becoming exactly the kind of young patriots Charlie believed in -- not just bold, but brave. Not just loud, but principled. Every time a student starts a new chapter, we make sure they 're not standing alone. We send them an activism kit -- American flags, pocket Constitutions, chapter materials, and leadership tools. These kits give student leaders everything they need to rally their peers and stand strong on their campuses. Each one costs just $25 to pack and ship. Charlie wanted a Club America chapter in every high school so no student would ever feel alone for loving God, defending their country, or believing in truth. And so the next generation wouldn't be handed over to the Left by default. Let's make Charlie's dream real -- 27,000 high schools. And a generation that doesn't apologize for loving this country. It's up to us to finish what he started. One chapter. One student. One school at a time. Let's move faster. Let's push further. Let's get this done -- for Charlie, and for the country we all love. | | For Charlie, Andrew Sypher Chief Field OfficerTurning Point USA P.S. There's one part of that phone call with Charlie I was going to leave out... He wasn't just dreaming big -- he was issuing a warning. When he told me we needed to move faster, he added: "The enemy is moving younger. They're coming after students earlier. We don 't have time to wait." And he was right. The Left has deeply embedded themselves in our schools -- rewriting history, poisoning young minds, and raising their next generation of radical foot soldiers. We may be in 13% of our schools now... But in the other 87%? The Left has free rein. Zero resistance. No voice to challenge them. And if we don't flood those schools with truth -- fast -- we'll have a generation that thinks loving America is "fascist," that faith is "hateful," and that freedom and free speech is "dangerous." You know it. I know it. Charlie knew it. He knew the fight for America's future would be won or lost in high school classrooms and on college campuses. And that fight has never been more urgent than it is right now. Patriot, if you 've ever wondered whether one small act could change the direction of our country -- this is it. You may not be able to step into a hostile high school and stand for truth like these students do. But you can send them the tools to do it. These students are ready. They've raised their hands. They chose courage and decided to lead. All they're waiting on... is us. Every $25 helps send an activism kit to a young patriot and gives them everything they need to win hearts and minds. You're gift reminds them they're not alone. It gives them the confidence to stand and fight back. And you'll be saving our country -- one future freedom fighter at a time. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Wes Moore
subject: “Make sure it mattered”
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1266%2E1086043%2EXFrrfx)
Peter,
I want to tell you **[a story I shared on Super Soul Sessions a while back.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/1343?t=2&akid=1266%2E1086043%2EXFrrfx)**
When I was in military school we had a colonel named Billy G. Murphy as Commandant of Cadets. We only saw him smile once -- and I think it was an accident. But we loved him, because he loved us.
One night he gathered all of us together at 8 o’clock on a Sunday. We had noticed he was losing weight really quickly. The uniform he was wearing was starting to fit more like it was his father’s uniform. **He told us he was diagnosed with cancer, and he had to leave the school.**
This was, in essence, his farewell address. But he said something to us that day that I will never forget.
He said, “When it’s time for you to leave here -- whether it’s time for you to leave this school, whether it’s time for you to leave your job, whether it’s time for you to leave your neighborhood, whether it’s time for you to leave this planet -- **make sure it mattered that you were ever even here.** ”
None of us are promised anything -- more days, more weeks, or more years.
That’s why, when I was elected Governor, I placed a countdown clock on my desk that enumerates the number of days left in my term.
In the military, we don’t count time forward. We count it backward, toward mission completion. We know that the clock is always running.
I didn’t put this clock on my desk to create pressure for pressure’s sake. It reminds me that no one is promised a certain number of days or weeks or even years -- in office or in life. The only thing we know is that with the time we have, we have to actually do something with it.
I hope that that resonates with you as it did with me, Peter, and does to this day.
Elevate,
Wes

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1266%2E1086043%2EXFrrfx)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1266%2E1086043%2EXFrrfx)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: April Christenson
subject: Glamp under the stars at the Grand Canyon – enter to win!
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ldXeaK1CK2I [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ldXeaK1CK2I]
Tickets for OLCV's Annual Celebration for the Environment are on sale now. Get yours before it's too late! [https://event.auctria.com/9bac5df8-723f-4cab-b467-c43ae5d9b9df/aa6cd270-8751-11e9-a741-3fcfcb35cbb0]
Hi Peter,
Have you ever dreamt of star gazing at night in the Grand Canyon? Now’s your chance to experience that and more!
OLCV’s Annual Celebration for the Environment is Friday, April 24th, and we’re giving away an epic Grand Canyon Glamping trip! For $100, you can support OLCV’s work to protect Oregon’s environment and enter for an opportunity to win this awesome adventure. [https://event.auctria.com/9bac5df8-723f-4cab-b467-c43ae5d9b9df/2ced078932954976aa791014bb7f88a3] You don’t have to be present at the event to win, just purchase a ticket now for your chance!
One lucky winner will have an opportunity to choose from three incredible experiences. Here’s more about one of the options:
Grand Canyon Glamping (back by popular demand!)
Stay just 20 minutes from the Grand Canyon’s South Entrance in a stunning Sky Dome: a modern, eco-friendly oasis designed for comfort, scenery, and a little bit of magic. This three-night stay for two includes:
* A private Sky Dome with a queen bed, panoramic viewing window, A/C, private modern bathroom with rain shower, and Wi-Fi for your own desert sanctuary under the stars
* Access to the Welcome Sky Dome lounge and on-site food truck for meals
* Epic stargazing with telescopes, thanks to the region’s extraordinary dark skies
* Live music and nightly s’mores, because no glamping trip is complete without them
* Sunrises and sunsets over the canyon that you’ll remember forever
It’s the perfect mix of adventure, peace, and awe-inspiring natural beauty, ideal for anyone craving a truly unique getaway.
Buy your raffle ticket [https://event.auctria.com/9bac5df8-723f-4cab-b467-c43ae5d9b9df/2ced078932954976aa791014bb7f88a3]
The raffle winner gets to choose from three incredible trips! Here are the other choices:
🌴 Coastal Cabo Oceanfront Escape
🏔️ Jackson Hole Winter Ski Adventure
✨ Grand Canyon Luxury Sky Dome Glamping (this one!)
Every ticket helps fund OLCV’s work to protect Oregon’s lands, waters, climate, and wildlife. Your $100 isn’t just a chance to win an extraordinary vacation, it’s an investment in Oregon’s future.
Tickets are $100 and limited. Get yours now! [https://event.auctria.com/9bac5df8-723f-4cab-b467-c43ae5d9b9df/2ced078932954976aa791014bb7f88a3]
Thank you for supporting OLCV, and good luck!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/April%27s%20Signature.png]
April Christenson (she/her)
OLCV Development Director
P.S.: The winner will be announced at OLCV’s Annual Celebration for the Environment on Friday, April 24th. Get your tickets here so that you celebrate with us when you win! [https://event.auctria.com/9bac5df8-723f-4cab-b467-c43ae5d9b9df/a809178051b511ea91bae14d12592328]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/63784F716E2B2B477144525067766C6C61794E6C7A6355736C6B4E6B4243724F6C36365666446A75386D6570595755556548443734792B44574A4C6161447074/editor_images/Screen%20Shot%202026-04-10%20at%2010.24.13%20AM.png]
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

name: Mel Tull (D-VA)
subject: His net worth tripled. Your bills went up.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MEL TULL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP62/1/119007/images/mel%20website%20pic.jpg]
Team, my MAGA opponent, Rob Wittman, has tripled his net worth since he got to Congress.
Let that sink in.
While you were struggling with rising costs. While families in our district were choosing between groceries and medicine. While working people were falling further behind – Rob Wittman was getting rich in Washington.
I'm a veteran. I took an oath to serve my country and put others before myself. Rob Wittman took that same oath. But somewhere along the way, he decided his bank account mattered more than your family's future.
That's not just wrong. That's a betrayal of everything we're supposed to stand for.
But here's what gives me inspiration: This race is WINNABLE. This district is FLIPPABLE.
Cook Political Report rates VA-01 as just R+3. Governor Abigail Spanberger WON this district in 2025. Trump is unpopular, costs are crushing families, and voters are fed up with MAGA politicians who only care about enriching themselves and their wealthy buddies.
We can win this. But only if we fight like hell.
I'm Mel Tull. I'm not a career politician looking to cash in. I'm a dad, a veteran, and a business lawyer who's sick of watching people like Rob Wittman line their pockets while our neighbors suffer. I put myself through college working multiple jobs and using the Army College Fund. I know what it means to struggle. I know what it means to serve.
And I know we deserve better than a congressman who's spent years voting to cut food assistance for struggling families, strip healthcare from the sick, and explode the debt our kids will inherit – all while padding his own wallet.
This is our shot. Right now. This moment.
We can flip this seat. We can send Rob Wittman packing. We can show every corrupt career politician in Washington that veterans who actually honor their oath can beat self-serving MAGA sellouts.
But I need you with me. Today.
Chip in $10, $25, or $50 right now. Every single dollar gets us closer to ending Rob Wittman's corrupt career and winning this fight for Virginia's working families. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress]
DONATE TODAY TO FLIP THIS SEAT AND TAKE BACK THE HOUSE! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress]
I took an oath to put service before self. Rob Wittman forgot what that means the minute he saw a chance to get rich.
Let's remind him.
Mel Tull
Candidate for Congress, VA-01
U.S. Army Veteran
P.S. – Rob Wittman TRIPLED his net worth while families in our district fell behind. That's not leadership. That's corruption. If you're as angry as I am, chip in $10, $25, or $50 right now and let's end his career this November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress]
HELP ME FLIP VA-01! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress]
PAID FOR BY MEL TULL FOR CONGRESS
Mell Tull for Congress
PO Box 56
Midlothian, VA 23114
United States

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: We’re falling behind, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
California’s June primary will decide everything—only the top two candidates make it onto November’s ballot, and right now, polls show Katie behind.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41131%2E3422442%2EaIECRI)
Peter, a new poll just dropped—and **Katie is falling behind.**
**[Can you rush a $5 donation to get Katie into the top-two cutoff to advance to the general election?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260411_1_ak.tJ9U7U&refcode=em20260411-41131&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41131%2E3422442%2EaIECRI)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260411_1_ak.tJ9U7U&refcode=em20260411-41131&t=4&akid=41131%2E3422442%2EaIECRI)
Corporate-backed opponents and billionaires are outspending us on ads and drowning out this race with money.
Here’s what’s at stake:
California’s June primary will decide _everything_ —only the top two candidates make it onto November’s ballot, and right now, polls show Katie behind.
If our campaign doesn’t break through soon, she won’t make the cut. **And we only have 52 days to close the gap.**
We’re up against immense pressure:
* Donald Trump’s endorsement of leading Republican candidate Steve Hilton has thrust him to the top of the polls;
* Billionaire Tom Steyer has already poured _over $121 million_ into his campaign;
* If nothing changes, Republicans could lock Democrats out of the general election entirely.

Katie’s taking on billionaires, corporate cash, and national political forces by building a grassroots campaign, but she needs a surge of support if she’s going to win.
**[Can you rush $5 or more today to help Katie catch up, break into the top two, and secure a spot on November’s ballot?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260411_1_ak.tJ9U7U&refcode=em20260411-41131&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=41131%2E3422442%2EaIECRI)**

Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260411-41131&amounts=&t=25&refcode2=41131_3422442_aIECRI&akid=41131%2E3422442%2EaIECRI)**

Katie’s taking on billionaires, corporate cash, and national political forces by building a grassroots campaign, but she needs a surge of support if she’s going to win. Thank you, Team Katie Porter Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m the #1 Target of Senate Republicans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| That’s more than any other state in the country. Peter, I need to fill you in. **National Republicans just released their targets for the midterms, and Ohio was #1 on their list. They’re planning to flood our state with $79 MILLION worth of attack ads to defeat me.** That means we’ll need more resources to fight back earlier than we thought. So I sat down with my finance team, and we set a **$100,000 emergency** **goal** so we can launch our own TV and digital ads sooner and reach voters before the GOP’s spending spree starts. [**So I’m personally asking: Will you split $10 between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin to help us get there?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/5429?t=3&akid=5330%2E35263%2EkGdNFl) I don’t make requests like this lightly, Peter. But this may be the biggest moment of our campaign so far. Thousands of people have joined this grassroots team, and I am so humbled to have you on board, too. We’re building historic momentum, and it’s terrifying to the corporate special interests and billionaires who want to keep my opponent in power. **But we can’t slow down now. Because if we don’t have the resources to fend off their ad blitz, the GOP could tip the balance of this race and completely drown us out.** This team has never let me down before, which is why I’m coming to you now. [**Please, if you have a few dollars to spare, I really need you to chip in to my campaign and Tammy Baldwin so we can handle whatever comes next.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/5429?t=4&akid=5330%2E35263%2EkGdNFl) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/5436?t=5&akid=5330%2E35263%2EkGdNFl)

Sherrod

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129280206/613812614/-349382464?refcode=em-4.11.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDFkODk3Zi1kMDM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kSPiSySJFzrLIch1ymXyydt_Iv5S95n4Zz1snOlQa9c=)

Peter,

These days, we’re hearing a lot about what we’re fighting _against_. With the chaos from the Trump Administration affecting millions of working families, that matters, but right now I want to explain what I’m fighting for:

I’m fighting _for_ affordable and accessible healthcare.
I’m fighting _for_ a lower cost of housing and groceries.
I’m fighting _for_ space, science, and wildfire research.
And in everything I do, I’m fighting _for_ the people of California’s 27th District.

While I’ve made progress in Washington – from spearheading legislation that tackles these issues, to bringing back over $15 million in federal funding – the outcome of November’s midterm elections will have a major impact on our results.

**[So I’m asking: If you believe in what we’re fighting for, will you chip in $3 to protect this seat in Congress and move Democrats closer to the House majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129280207/613812618/-349382464?refcode=em-4.11.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDFkODk3Zi1kMDM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kSPiSySJFzrLIch1ymXyydt_Iv5S95n4Zz1snOlQa9c=)**

name: James Talarico for Senate
subject: No denying it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
**TX-Sen Polling:**
**James Talarico: 43%
John Cornyn: 41%**
**James Talarico: 44%
Ken Paxton: 43%**
**[Make a donation to elect James Talarico to the U.S. Senate.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q2.t_pReT&refcode=em260410-1-ak&t=1&akid=569%2E1347274%2EmDY6T9)**
Peter —
The latest public polling is clear: James can win.
He has a small lead, but it’s within the margin of error. Whether it is Ken Paxton or John Cornyn, we can defeat them and take back Texas’ U.S. Senate seat for the people.
But there’s no denying that this will be difficult.
This is an extremely small lead in a state Democrats haven’t won in decades, and there is no limit to what Republicans’ billionaire and corporate mega-donors are willing to spend to take us down.
So we need to be ready for anything.
**[Can you please contribute any amount to win Texas and send James to the U.S. Senate? Every dollar will be put to work immediately to lay the groundwork for November — when this race could be decided by a small handful of votes.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q2.t_pReT&refcode=em260410-1-ak&t=2&akid=569%2E1347274%2EmDY6T9)**

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: Re: endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McMorrow for Michigan
body:
You can help us build “McMentum.”
# [](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/685?refcode=&t=1&akid=4437%2E898137%2ExsfzH2)
Hey,
Leaders across Michigan and beyond have backed this campaign because they believe in our concrete plans to make an ACTUAL difference.
People like State Senate Majority Leader Winnie Brinks, commissioners in Berrien, Macomb, and Kent counties, U.S. Senators Elizabeth Warren and Chris Murphy, and so many other proven leaders have put their support behind our campaign.
The team jokes about “McMentum,” but honestly, it’s real.
**[But the endorsement I care about most today is yours. Please add your name to endorse my campaign for Senate.](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/signup/MAM-202604-Endorse?refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260411_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=4437%2E898137%2ExsfzH2)**
[ENDORSE](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/signup/MAM-202604-Endorse?refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260411_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=4437%2E898137%2ExsfzH2)
---
Your endorsement matters because this campaign is built by and for real people. Together, we outpaced the field in terms of grassroots fundraising support — all without a dime of corporate PAC money. This kind of support makes it possible for us to meet people where they are and to talk about everything that’s at stake in this election.
It won’t be easy, but I have to tell you — the polling that shows we’ve surged into the lead, the fundraising, the turnout at our events — the momentum is real and I feel it on the ground every single day. I also know how to turn a win into real results, just like I’ve done on the state level over the past 8 years.
I’m running for Senate to build on the progress we’ve achieved for Michiganders, but I can’t do that without you.
**[I’d be honored to earn your endorsement today. If you believe in what we’re building and my vision for Michigan, please use this link to officially endorse my campaign for Senate:](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/signup/MAM-202604-Endorse?refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260411_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4437%2E898137%2ExsfzH2)**
[ENDORSE](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/signup/MAM-202604-Endorse?refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260411_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4437%2E898137%2ExsfzH2)
---
Thank you so much,
Mallory

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: The Hickenlooper Curve
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
Folks, When I was little, I was just about the worst hitter Little League had ever seen. I was small, skinny, and younger than most of the other kids. By the time I turned 12, I accepted the hard truth: I would never be able to hit a curveball. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129280514/613813809/-584038332?amounts=5,10,15,25,50,100&refcode=email_041126_hickenloopercurve&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDIzNGU1MC1kMDM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SE-p4Oil36WCEhVE_zFusomYT9uoaxwyMLsBzGWhSUc=)
_The Wynnewood Warriors_ But I loved baseball, and I was determined to keep playing come what may. So every day, my best friend Henry and I would work on my pitches. For hours at a time, I’d throw and throw and throw. After two years of backyard throwing, my curveballs finally started to...well... curve. **The Hickenlooper Curve, we called it.** Then, the guys who used to laugh at the small, skinny kid on the pitching mound started striking out — and I learned some great lessons about determination, hard work, and perseverance. This was also my first lesson in the power of believing. We put in a lot of hard work. With more and more practice, we began to see results. We began to believe in ourselves. This same lesson applies to politics. Amid all the chaos and dysfunction, we need people who will roll up their sleeves and keep working hard to get things right. That’s what we’ve done in the Senate: fight to lower health care costs, make housing more affordable, protect our public lands, and much more. **But MAGA Republicans are hellbent on defeating us and growing their Senate majority. They are ready to spend millions to replace me with a rubber stamp for President Trump’s extreme agenda.** **_[I’ve dealt with my fair share of obstacles. With everything the President is throwing at Colorado, we’ve got to keep fighting back. I know we can do that with you on our team. We did it once before, and we’re counting on it now. So please, will you pitch in now to help us strike MAGA out this November? Anything you can spare will go a long way:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129280515/613813810/-584038332?amounts=5,10,15,25,50,100&refcode=email_041126_hickenloopercurve&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDIzNGU1MC1kMDM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SE-p4Oil36WCEhVE_zFusomYT9uoaxwyMLsBzGWhSUc=)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129280516/613813811/-584038332?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_041126_hickenloopercurve&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDIzNGU1MC1kMDM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SE-p4Oil36WCEhVE_zFusomYT9uoaxwyMLsBzGWhSUc=)

name: Nico, United We Dream
subject: Our collective strength can restore what was lost.
body:
How 11,000 DACA recipients lost health care access with the stroke of a pen. | | | Peter,
In our ongoing series this month, we’ll explain, point by point, the threats DACA recipients are currently facing. Let’s start with health care, specifically the Affordable Care Act. Last year, before the open enrollment period for ACA plans, a new federal rule took effect, barring DACA recipients from enrolling in ACA plans and in Basic Health Plans that the states of Minnesota, Oregon, and New York set up under the ACA.1 The result: **11,000 DACA recipients were kicked out of the ACA.** The change was immediate because the rule didn’t just stop people from enrolling, it _disenrolled_ people who were already covered. Over 500,000 DACA recipients rely on job-based health insurance, so losing a job means immediate loss of coverage. With widespread renewal delays causing lapses in status, many are losing their jobs and their only access to care, at a time when families are already facing legal and economic uncertainty. This is yet another challenge DACA recipients face, but we know that the power to initiate real change rests with us — the people. **We know that the strength and resilience of our communities can create a future where we can all thrive.** Health care is a fundamental human right, and everyone should have access to it, _regardless of their immigration status._ Through collective action, advocacy, and community support, we have the strength to push back against policies that undermine our shared values and to fight for the rights of all immigrants. [**We will continue working to protect not only DACA recipients, but all immigrant youth who have not been able to take advantage of the policy, Peter. Will you stand with us with a contribution today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeRSb6UyzukpYsZgexseLha1n3hAbO_p8Utnp75qrFZNqtzp5KQlxOdCo6DAhn4dkkW8gSsBC6ds0cdzNU4rjvBpUzIoc0-oBuzag1m0YKfbAh5RwkDo9enNN75gT5WRYLbjqB30L8KSC2kJmFqIGX4T65z68umxzPli0kyo5w5X5Zcg1SIcyyCU9O_dfTXt4dOcVnf0Fqs53Np0aQs7uj8FacIJ-XT6-K8fByscSWbrH8i9liK4Ml7_bXBEylNzUH2KeHgNClwPWem5JkOeAky9ZbFNO1NepRL351SsvO_fYMh_IWur-vUlzaNBoOHfWzrE4McPHF7SAJvIcVpegP41JOKB6bU-MN0SWMyGy4KIPlvjcHGjM6bogvLK5QQLmd15KxA3yMGmhXTtKALrUqAQ/4pp/kurGtGKARu6uuAgBY4A-Fw/h0/h001.qnhRgs_YBC9mxuFDEWqJF5ne68Vzn15wtNN7X8sRU30) [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeRSb6UyzukpYsZgexseLha1n3hAbO_p8Utnp75qrFZNqtzp5KQlxOdCo6DAhn4dkkW8gSsBC6ds0cdzNU4rjvBpUzIoc0-oBuzag1m0YKfbC2WnYv8VJHkrmUhh1q-J-CmnmLVZakqKJjTLa5Oh2fUjpl4jr1iovmOfMD45kklEIfy8DJqFOnFiZCf3UrnxHv7afxIb7_IdCvyxktHm2Ba32l5rmt1qshynYx0ibwz_jaB9f_PsJVcSOF0ITWaPVV5dqifgeTwpPRZTllXjVcfYkEir7SLioXDPLNUGPZN6CrhU9twWACFAFzWDwy8mIBWQoeuTG0XmfYhMO_yY2cyjdg0e--1gauXwA5X-BwknsUyH-X7XqxylBTenzngBGCBQfv9_nDD2zvEgWZSk2ubA/4pp/kurGtGKARu6uuAgBY4A-Fw/h1/h001.O6E5XZeojrs3YktI9Xs1-MT5jZyVYCVOAlXsCDHadWQ) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeRSb6UyzukpYsZgexseLha1n3hAbO_p8Utnp75qrFZNqtzp5KQlxOdCo6DAhn4dkkW8gSsBC6ds0cdzNU4rjvBm52q4tJr3TXWNUZgcCdSktIuJ4ZnbGvVHq_lakIEYTheO-rX4SfBRgR9hC213sTbiS8JT1AaWt8AlJDPO31AgJrinIVR3vWqCc-zT2pYQfjnzteCVdKSx07N2h1VIpp-BoxMgTkoTuxkz5ZxV9XyjiVsLl7wx7TLWbTeGU3fDOtqfz39G7tX0AeHhiXYh9RWEMLzblTXp4oVp5XmCe7b705job-lXt2klvPwQRYOCgf0g546zN2z1QtrIwPJCe6yJDzdkIO760_4n9UdSER3b6dv3xCFxailI-qhnCM6-0rj10hrResbJg7LX6jVr87vR0ki-tlQVQu_afbKllqHWU/4pp/kurGtGKARu6uuAgBY4A-Fw/h2/h001.AANGRXT4EfVqGH3dg56OsnYR_4M3rLAZVBaUSXsI8bs)

clean_body: How 11,000 DACA recipients lost health care access with the stroke of a pen. | | | Peter, In our ongoing series this month, we’ll explain, point by point, the threats DACA recipients are currently facing. Let’s start with health care, specifically the Affordable Care Act. Last year, before the open enrollment period for ACA plans, a new federal rule took effect, barring DACA recipients from enrolling in ACA plans and in Basic Health Plans that the states of Minnesota, Oregon, and New York set up under the ACA.1 The result: 11,000 DACA recipients were kicked out of the ACA. The change was immediate because the rule didn’t just stop people from enrolling, it disenrolled people who were already covered. Over 500,000 DACA recipients rely on job-based health insurance, so losing a job means immediate loss of coverage. With widespread renewal delays causing lapses in status, many are losing their jobs and their only access to care, at a time when families are already facing legal and economic uncertainty. This is yet another challenge DACA recipients face, but we know that the power to initiate real change rests with us — the people. We know that the strength and resilience of our communities can create a future where we can all thrive. Health care is a fundamental human right, and everyone should have access to it, regardless of their immigration status. Through collective action, advocacy, and community support, we have the strength to push back against policies that undermine our shared values and to fight for the rights of all immigrants. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for stepping up and joining us at such a crucial time. We’re here, we’re organizing, and we’re facing this moment together. — Nico, United We Dream * 1\. “DACA recipients no longer eligible for Marketplace health insurance and subsidies.” healthinsurance.org. September 12, 2025. Follow us on: | | | | |

Hey friend, Polymarket and Kalshi have been in the hot seat in the news lately, and for good reason. These platforms are encouraging people to place bets on wars, elections, government actions, and even human casualties. The industry has become massive practically overnight, and the people profiting off it have ties all the way to the White House. And almost nobody in Congress is talking about it. Not because they don't care, but because they don't know. These platforms didn't exist when most of Washington was building their careers, and you can't regulate something you've never heard of. That's not a knock, it's just reality. And it's exactly why it matters who we send to the Senate next. When all of this popped, Seth immediately pushed to ban betting on wars, elections, government actions, and human casualties, because it is clearly the right thing to do. ---
Hi, friend — Deb here.

I know you receive a lot of emails and texts from my team, but I wanted to let you know why this one matters so much to me and our movement.
I'm building a strong grassroots campaign in every way I can — from personally traveling to meet and connect with each and every voter all across the state to mobilizing volunteers on the ground.
I know that people want elected leaders who will listen, fight fiercely for them, and understand what they are going through. That's why it's so important to me to hear from _everyone_ so that, as governor of New Mexico, I can deliver meaningful change for working families and move us toward a future where everyone can thrive.
**Reaching every single person across New Mexico is _absolutely_ _critical_ to this campaign, but it requires a lot of resources, friend, so I simply can't get there without your support. _[Will you please chip in $5, or whatever you can spare now, to help me win and keep New Mexico blue?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7926?refcode=jtk556-fr-nd-nat&t=2&akid=8890%2E400544%2EhKgTD0)_**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Republicans need to pay a steep price at the polls for this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
MAGA Republicans who ran on a so-called “America First” agenda are ready to do a complete 180 on that.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260411-6124-footer&t=1&akid=6124%2E420207%2EQL8bV0)
This is _infuriating_ , Peter.
MAGA Republicans, who ran on a so-called “America First” agenda, are ready to do a complete 180 to fund Donald Trump’s illegal, unconstitutional war with Iran:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260411.KzeMiM&refcode=em20260411-6124&t=2&akid=6124%2E420207%2EQL8bV0)
You read that right.
Not only do they claim we can’t afford childcare or Medicare For All because we have to pay for endless wars, they’re now considering ripping away _existing_ health care benefits to pay for it.
Don’t forget this moment, Peter.
**Let’s be clear: the funds are _already_ in the budget — they would simply rather give it to military contractors and weapons manufacturers. They would rather send our service members to war and blow up schools full of innocent civilians than spend it on health care for poor and working people.**
We cannot let this slide — every Republican who supports it must be held accountable at the polls this November. I’m working every day to build our progressive movement, but I need your help.
[**If you’re ready to build a government that puts working people first, will you chip in $3 to fuel our movement today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260411.KzeMiM&refcode=em20260411-6124&amount=3&t=3&akid=6124%2E420207%2EQL8bV0)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260411.KzeMiM&amount=3&refcode=em20260411-6124&t=22&akid=6124%2E420207%2EQL8bV0)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

name: Andie Levien
subject: we have a narrow window to act
body:
---
Derek, Trump signed an executive order last week to restrict mail-in voting and give the Department of Homeland Security direct oversight over who can vote. The DNC is filing a new lawsuit to stop him immediately, and [**you can chip in here to help power our fight to protect mail-in voting.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260411_6647_fr&refcode2=6647_22930333_I4dI_T&akid=6647%2E22930333%2EI4dI_T) **[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260411_6647_fr&refcode2=6647_22930333_I4dI_T&akid=6647%2E22930333%2EI4dI_T)** Derek, the unfortunate truth here is that we have a narrow window to act, which is why we need your help right now. Your donation will be put to work immediately to help us shape the future of voting rights in America. If you’re skeptical about how your donation can do this, please let me explain:
* **Last year,** Trump signed an executive order that could have disenfranchised married women who changed their names and members of our armed services. We sued, this grassroots team rallied behind us, _and we won in court._
* **Since then,** Trump has sought to “take over” state-run elections, he’s used the FBI to seize ballots from election offices in Georgia, and he’s tried to coerce states into giving him access to their voter rolls.
* **Now, he’s taking it to a new level:** His new executive order directs the federal government to build a voter list for each state to decide who can and cannot vote — and he’s told the Postal Service to refuse to carry ballots for anyone not on its new list of eligible voters.

This isn’t the time for fear, though, Derek, it’s the time for action. I want to tell you directly that the DNC won’t let this happen. [**With the help of grassroots supporters like you,**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260411_6647_fr&refcode2=6647_22930333_I4dI_T&akid=6647%2E22930333%2EI4dI_T) we’ll block his order from going into effect. We’ll defend your right to vote. We’ll protect your right to a free and fair election. And, when November rolls around, we’ll make sure Democrats can kick these right-wing authoritarians out of office. [**I hope you’re with me, Derek, and I hope you’ll consider chipping in $7 or any amount you can spare right now to help us fight back.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260411_6647_fr&refcode2=6647_22930333_I4dI_T&akid=6647%2E22930333%2EI4dI_T) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260411_6647_fr&refcode2=6647_22930333_I4dI_T&akid=6647%2E22930333%2EI4dI_T)**
---
****
| **[Donate $32](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?express_lane=true&amount=32&refcode=em_20260411_6647_fr&refcode2=6647_22930333_I4dI_T&akid=6647%2E22930333%2EI4dI_T)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20260411_6647_fr&refcode2=6647_22930333_I4dI_T&akid=6647%2E22930333%2EI4dI_T)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20260411_6647_fr&refcode2=6647_22930333_I4dI_T&akid=6647%2E22930333%2EI4dI_T)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20260411_6647_fr&refcode2=6647_22930333_I4dI_T&akid=6647%2E22930333%2EI4dI_T)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?refcode=em_20260411_6647_fr&refcode2=6647_22930333_I4dI_T&akid=6647%2E22930333%2EI4dI_T)**
---
****
Thank you, and I’ll have more updates to share soon.
Andie
Andrea Levien
General Counsel
Democratic National Committee

subject: Guess who was just in AZ-01?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
We’ll give you a hint: MAHA

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129281173/613816227/497319470?refcode=em_header&ms=260411_tm_rfk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmY4NmQ4ZTgtZDUzNS1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=whEEVV38AqUhynNrOAh3wNfrKbSZ9sX1UD_5dFt7SF8=)
---
Team, Jay Feely, the only Trump-backed Republican running in AZ-01, recently held a fundraiser right here in Phoenix with RFK Jr. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129281174/613816228/497319470?refcode=260411_tm_rfk_img&ms=260411_tm_rfk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmY4NmQ4ZTgtZDUzNS1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=whEEVV38AqUhynNrOAh3wNfrKbSZ9sX1UD_5dFt7SF8=) RFK Jr. has spent years spreading vaccine misinformation, sowing doubt in trusted scientific institutions, and promoting conspiracy theories that put real people's health at risk. And Jay Feely chose to stand next to him, raise money with him, and align himself with that record. Americans are already struggling to access healthcare, afford it, and trust that the information they're getting is accurate. And right now, the consequences of that misinformation are impossible to ignore: Measles is back, tens of thousands of sick patients lost access to life-saving clinical trials, and billions in frozen research grants mean breakthroughs for Alzheimer's, cancer, and addiction have been pushed back by decades. **[The last thing AZ-01 needs is a leader who misleads constituents with falsehoods that compromise their health. name: Aimee Prudhomme
subject: Help us finish the spring semester strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240790%2E444211%2EcrreoQ)
In just a few short weeks, students across Texas will be heads-down in finals, packing up their dorms, and heading home for the summer. For Powered by People, that means our window to reach them where they live and study is closing fast.
Summer is a natural lull in the academic calendar, so we’re doing everything we can to leave it all on the field before the semester ends.
Beto is on the road every single week in April to keep that momentum going. We just wrapped up an incredible week in the Rio Grande Valley, and next week we’re heading to Houston and College Station. From there, we’ll be in Dallas before closing out the month in Central Texas.
Our goal is simple but ambitious: reach every student and make sure they are registered and ready for the midterms before they leave campus.
**This work is only possible because of you.** Keeping organizers on the ground and Beto on the road every week takes significant resources. Your donations are the fuel for these trips–covering the gas, the supplies, and the technology that allows our volunteers to turn a quick conversation with a student into a lifelong voter.
[**Will you pitch in $3 today to help us close out the spring semester strong?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260411.vfh1aZ&refcode=ema20260411-240790&t=3&akid=240790%2E444211%2EcrreoQ)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260411.vfh1aZ&refcode=ema20260411-240790&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=240790%2E444211%2EcrreoQ)**
We are a people-powered movement! If you’re ready to get involved, we’d love to see you on campus with us. It doesn't matter if you're a seasoned pro or a total beginner—all are welcome. We’ll train you and get you interacting with voters in no time. Join us to help make sure no Texas student gets left behind this year.
**[Sign up to volunteer](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67647?t=23&akid=240790%2E444211%2EcrreoQ)**
Let’s make these final weeks of the spring semester count!
See you out there,
Aimee Prudhomme
Executive Director, Powered by People

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20260411-240790-footer&t=24&refcode2=240790_444211_crreoQ&akid=240790%2E444211%2EcrreoQ)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/update-contact-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=240790%2E444211%2EcrreoQ)

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: They’re trying to silence 21 MILLION voices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129281938/613819346/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20260411_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGQxZGFkNy1kODM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KjbpRGJn1jIHqzH5kqn-L_9tYvg5Iklom4KnM_2YjCs=&emci=93d1dad7-d835-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=9dd1dad7-d835-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=252045)
---
I’ve said it before and I’m saying it again now, folks: **Donald Trump’s so-called SAVE Act is Jim Crow 2.0.** It’s not about “protecting elections”, it’s about control and exclusion. It’s a modern-day poll tax designed to make it harder for everyday Americans — married women, veterans, Native Americans, and low-income voters — to cast a ballot. If we let it pass, the SAVE Act would silence the voices of _**21**_ ___**million**_ _Americans_. It would force you to show a passport or birth certificate just to register to vote. It would require notarized affidavits for women who changed their last names. It would even ban veterans from using their military IDs. **This is unacceptable. I refuse to stand by while Republicans try to strip away our voices because they know they can’t win a fair fight.** [_**Sign your name right now to let me know you're with me as we keep fighting to stop the SAVE Act in its tracks.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129281939/613819348/-734618818?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20260411_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGQxZGFkNy1kODM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KjbpRGJn1jIHqzH5kqn-L_9tYvg5Iklom4KnM_2YjCs=&emci=93d1dad7-d835-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=9dd1dad7-d835-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=252045) | [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129281941/613819349/-734618818?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20260411_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGQxZGFkNy1kODM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KjbpRGJn1jIHqzH5kqn-L_9tYvg5Iklom4KnM_2YjCs=&emci=93d1dad7-d835-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=9dd1dad7-d835-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=252045)
---
Let me be clear: _our right to vote is foundational to our democracy and I will not allow it to be stripped away._ I have fought for years to protect your right to vote, and I’m not going to stop now — but this requires a sustained effort from all of us.
[_**Please, add your name to our petition today. clean_body: I’ve said it before and I’m saying it again now, folks: Donald Trump’s so-called SAVE Act is Jim Crow 2.0. It’s not about “protecting elections”, it’s about control and exclusion. It’s a modern-day poll tax designed to make it harder for everyday Americans — married women, veterans, Native Americans, and low-income voters — to cast a ballot. If we let it pass, the SAVE Act would silence the voices of 21 million Americans. It would force you to show a passport or birth certificate just to register to vote. It would require notarized affidavits for women who changed their last names. It would even ban veterans from using their military IDs. This is unacceptable. I refuse to stand by while Republicans try to strip away our voices because they know they can’t win a fair fight. | Let me be clear: our right to vote is foundational to our democracy and I will not allow it to be stripped away. I have fought for years to protect your right to vote, and I’m not going to stop now — but this requires a sustained effort from all of us. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. subject: We’re asking for your thoughts →
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20260411-2145-foote&t=1001&akid=2145%2E342411%2EmQ1m5T ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter, our
movement doesn’t exist without you.

At the Squad Victory Fund, everything we do is powered by supporters like
you — people who believe in bold progressive change and justice on all
fronts: social, racial, economic, and more. You’re the reason we’ve been
able to fight for progressive change, and your voice is what guides us
forward.

Right now, we want to hear from you. Our April Priorities Survey is your
chance to help decide the fights we take on next.

Every response shapes the direction of our movement and ensures that our
work reflects the priorities of the people who make it possible — our
grassroots community — not corporate interests.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-april-202604/?source=em20260411-2145&akid=2145%2E342411%2EmQ1m5T ]Will you take our April priorities survey and help drive our movement
forward? It only takes a few minutes, but your input will have a lasting
impact.

Your voice matters. Your vision matters. Together, we can continue to
fight for justice and push bold, progressive change forward.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-april-202604/?source=em20260411-2145&akid=2145%2E342411%2EmQ1m5T ]TAKE THE SURVEY

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2145%2E342411%2EmQ1m5T

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

body:
Arizona is the key to a House majority — we need organizers, ads, and boots on the ground now. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129282222/613820311/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20260411_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzM4MmEwZmItZDgzNS1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VUn6ASAffV3ekxXI3-prMs3ePiQWuDavUKzaOKOSkqQ=)
---
As we prepare for the critical months ahead, the Arizona Democratic Party isn't just looking at the data — we want to hear from you, team. Our strength comes from our grassroots supporters, and our platform is built on the values and concerns of everyday Arizonans. body:
| | | Friend, I'm Steve Hilton, Republican candidate for Governor of California. I’m running to end a one-party rule and Make California Golden Again. **But today, I'm not just writing to you about California.** I'm writing to you about Michigan because what's happening there is identical to what's happening in my state. Same failed policies. Same radical agenda. Same destruction of working families. [CLICK HERE: Gavin Newsom’s poisonous playbook didn't stay in California.](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=88b05cef18774053a65a6db4b121753e&_e=8Ve63vcsxO2kv4mwyf-uAfhpDP_SPlNNnab2acAUgBDb2_4drsEO9u7zpRAvmFPgaLpZIn7wGQaYOTMt3km0miMDDHbrlvCeFmpwMOW1HsGice-fzjX2tQ4H1JL0FuvFdIJN94JtSoQ7AMAO3uYNOxdk8vRennLxpv5ZKrVW3tum5_DZuW12SVNcwPzzSnWyQRXQYR5lCYWWS5SO_oWaMhouFzJBu79GexZrCXMzcb7G-EnODSw6TUz96I3X7_SC0_wD368E5PltXXEfkwXo5PCds5QvHPtCPnkriXW0isQ6PyfO31BnoJQhb5vnt4_-4IiENcIfo4Yj4Eu3zePRfiSwu9RT3pHUGnwMtGKo-wdn4jbFBXN0pG8JqOgiWy2hBu2M-aj8EcVRN_ipkK15UN8ZqDxo_a5UHGBkHEd7V_U%3D) Current Governor, Gretchen Whitmer, has imported Newsom’s liberal policies straight to Michigan. In California, I'm running to end failed radical policies, and in Michigan, there is one man ready to do the same: **Combat Veteran John James**.

---
[ **CLICK HERE: FUEL JOHN’S FIGHT IN MICHIGAN** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=88b05cef18774053a65a6db4b121753e&_e=8Ve63vcsxO2kv4mwyf-uAfhpDP_SPlNNnab2acAUgBDb2_4drsEO9u7zpRAvmFPgaLpZIn7wGQaYOTMt3km0miMDDHbrlvCeFmpwMOW1HsFbuqawwOxdFJpTO9XdNJ1vbJxFCfvF-dhou60zF7LqMcyziMwRs6KYd0w-mkx1kTWtDGGsOWpqMeTLJERo28UBnTgMdeT883RCg9MC0Meb7WGqiRgvAGRlvi8i72xgNIv5J4aqh0wpplmJGDMylFFfiGSucJT3X6S00_OW0_qLl6OCIg4dmXYa8nhBWPB6pkls0Lney3p-SSYvPrcqXwysGXGAjp6Vn6GHq1X4-BZxl1yF0TELlggqH59OWaYMrkVv8asABN_b_7_k0pWe0YlWkv43OaD-1U49gveBW1KddWaXqL1o8Waaaw9ugMI136A%3D)
---
Michigan and California are two critical states to our country’s success, and for too long, they’ve been ran into the ground by failed politicians **Two states, same fight. ** One chance to prove that the Newsom-Whitmer agenda ends with them and doesn't get handed off to the next radical in line. Together, we will bury this failed agenda — in Sacramento and in Lansing.
---
[ **CLICK HERE: JOIN THE COALITION** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=88b05cef18774053a65a6db4b121753e&_e=8Ve63vcsxO2kv4mwyf-uAfhpDP_SPlNNnab2acAUgBDb2_4drsEO9u7zpRAvmFPgaLpZIn7wGQaYOTMt3km0miMDDHbrlvCeFmpwMOW1HsE9ZCv97Q76evjSJoOCRw2cbiAuLGSVuxWdXfHpWzPxLoKrYIAqQbJYo6H82eguWOG-nFsxQTUYTSDVputVAix_c7c3UWiRQALS8mf3q85ZSfLK4PkYKusd4-oUOiIdX6PC6n3Nz7diBKMfcaVYKNfwJHRoRjhNhkx5ZK_Xy57XkrIwTEwpiGpEN5n3keB4bS_8_md47SCmvrgMKc6Ap_8IoRgf6iyFCUX4pPmAdgA2vNQ_qrCTApZTErsUtdUDdVt9DGfvctpN7pUKli8EYqdjCXMDCzRCL9lRxuZ4NifJUmRN5AX0kXe2Dk-0s196ths%3D)

body:

In Los Angeles, a proposal backed by several City Council members is moving through the city’s charter reform process. At its core, the plan would shift more authority over the LAPD from the current structure—where the mayor and an appointed Board of Police Commissioners play central roles—to the elected City Council. name: Team Shapiro
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Apologies for the blunt subject line

Apologies for that blunt subject line, Derek — but in a state as competitive as Pennsylvania, there’s really no room for subtlety. [_**We need your $25 donation to put our campaign in the best possible position on Election Day.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129282562/613821461/-1368017556?amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=25&refcode=email_041126_25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTlhZTcxNy1kYTM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JH1pS_WrGndh_jViYdYk84qkPCA_c0Q8Zcc2j2QR5Q4=) | $25 to reach millions of Pennsylvanians before they head to the polls on November 3rd.
---
$25 to mount an effective response to every negative ad and every false attack the far-right throws our way.
---
**$25 to join the thousands of Pennsylvanians — and Americans — who understand the stakes of this election.**

Friend, Rep. Valadao can’t be trusted to be our representative.

When he ran for re-election, he promised to fight for affordability and to lower costs for Californians.

**But instead, he’s been in lockstep with Donald Trump — _even if it means breaking the very promises he ran on._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129282610/613821656/-1252702269?amount=10&refcode=JBFC_20260411_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWY3MzcwY2MtZGEzNS1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TGYJ6I2olWUoplH1dFYx8sKUCW82thwHh_uWHb17Nmk=) Time and time again, he has _refused_ to stand up to Trump and House Republicans’ extremist agenda.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Break Hollywood’s monopoly on children’s entertainment
body:
We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture.

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckc2K2zAcxJ9GvinoW9bBhwTHodCUEpaUnoQs_ZOYyJaR5F327UtK9wV6_TEzMDO_zvbspjgt9x9uhi7Xm83Fjhnc85Fi_PxIKZQ5LWlN8TMtlhGmMBGYUrvmVFbw1dImdMEHR30DHdVaGi5bRppHx6U2intHtVEAzAnVBiqUHFsTTKtvzdS9AomglBpOqNlJqZkxkoCUnATukCAuQq67DOs2xsm7pbryvKXsYefT3MTuUetaEN8jNiA2FPBbhp1bIKT6UiA2jNm9Ax5TehbEBqapZJ61OEhQWIxC4JaqFoMctVKgb62hiA9bnW1JW_aAeH_oT_hyvCKmXniGMG0z4v3x_I94N69uui-I94wwSQQl9tCf7OGyvx7tt9PpN5Pf7eV4tT_3-PI2fNnSUmGpiPeXtwF_TdHkLqwfU4xTURoJcp_dFP-Wrf970HvH_gQAAP__5zabJQ)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckc2K2zAcxJ9GvinoW9bBhwTHodCUEpaUnoQs_ZOYyJaR5F327UtK9wV6_TEzMDO_zvbspjgt9x9uhi7Xm83Fjhnc85Fi_PxIKZQ5LWlN8TMtlhGmMBGYUrvmVFbw1dImdMEHR30DHdVaGi5bRppHx6U2intHtVEAzAnVBiqUHFsTTKtvzdS9AomglBpOqNlJqZkxkoCUnATukCAuQq67DOs2xsm7pbryvKXsYefT3MTuUetaEN8jNiA2FPBbhp1bIKT6UiA2jNm9Ax5TehbEBqapZJ61OEhQWIxC4JaqFoMctVKgb62hiA9bnW1JW_aAeH_oT_hyvCKmXniGMG0z4v3x_I94N69uui-I94wwSQQl9tCf7OGyvx7tt9PpN5Pf7eV4tT_3-PI2fNnSUmGpiPeXtwF_TdHkLqwfU4xTURoJcp_dFP-Wrf970HvH_gQAAP__5zabJQ)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckc2K2zAcxJ9GvinoW9bBhwTHodCUEpaUnoQs_ZOYyJaR5F327UtK9wV6_TEzMDO_zvbspjgt9x9uhi7Xm83Fjhnc85Fi_PxIKZQ5LWlN8TMtlhGmMBGYUrvmVFbw1dImdMEHR30DHdVaGi5bRppHx6U2intHtVEAzAnVBiqUHFsTTKtvzdS9AomglBpOqNlJqZkxkoCUnATukCAuQq67DOs2xsm7pbryvKXsYefT3MTuUetaEN8jNiA2FPBbhp1bIKT6UiA2jNm9Ax5TehbEBqapZJ61OEhQWIxC4JaqFoMctVKgb62hiA9bnW1JW_aAeH_oT_hyvCKmXniGMG0z4v3x_I94N69uui-I94wwSQQl9tCf7OGyvx7tt9PpN5Pf7eV4tT_3-PI2fNnSUmGpiPeXtwF_TdHkLqwfU4xTURoJcp_dFP-Wrf970HvH_gQAAP__5zabJQ) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckc2K2zAcxJ9GvinoW9bBhwTHodCUEpaUnoQs_ZOYyJaR5F327UtK9wV6_TEzMDO_zvbspjgt9x9uhi7Xm83Fjhnc85Fi_PxIKZQ5LWlN8TMtlhGmMBGYUrvmVFbw1dImdMEHR30DHdVaGi5bRppHx6U2intHtVEAzAnVBiqUHFsTTKtvzdS9AomglBpOqNlJqZkxkoCUnATukCAuQq67DOs2xsm7pbryvKXsYefT3MTuUetaEN8jNiA2FPBbhp1bIKT6UiA2jNm9Ax5TehbEBqapZJ61OEhQWIxC4JaqFoMctVKgb62hiA9bnW1JW_aAeH_oT_hyvCKmXniGMG0z4v3x_I94N69uui-I94wwSQQl9tCf7OGyvx7tt9PpN5Pf7eV4tT_3-PI2fNnSUmGpiPeXtwF_TdHkLqwfU4xTURoJcp_dFP-Wrf970HvH_gQAAP__5zabJQ)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckc2K2zAcxJ9GvinoW9bBhwTHodCUEpaUnoQs_ZOYyJaR5F327UtK9wV6_TEzMDO_zvbspjgt9x9uhi7Xm83Fjhnc85Fi_PxIKZQ5LWlN8TMtlhGmMBGYUrvmVFbw1dImdMEHR30DHdVaGi5bRppHx6U2intHtVEAzAnVBiqUHFsTTKtvzdS9AomglBpOqNlJqZkxkoCUnATukCAuQq67DOs2xsm7pbryvKXsYefT3MTuUetaEN8jNiA2FPBbhp1bIKT6UiA2jNm9Ax5TehbEBqapZJ61OEhQWIxC4JaqFoMctVKgb62hiA9bnW1JW_aAeH_oT_hyvCKmXniGMG0z4v3x_I94N69uui-I94wwSQQl9tCf7OGyvx7tt9PpN5Pf7eV4tT_3-PI2fNnSUmGpiPeXtwF_TdHkLqwfU4xTURoJcp_dFP-Wrf970HvH_gQAAP__5zabJQ)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father

**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|

| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckc2K2zAcxJ9GvinoW9bBhwTHodCUEpaUnoQs_ZOYyJaR5F327UtK9wV6_TEzMDO_zvbspjgt9x9uhi7Xm83Fjhnc85Fi_PxIKZQ5LWlN8TMtlhGmMBGYUrvmVFbw1dImdMEHR30DHdVaGi5bRppHx6U2intHtVEAzAnVBiqUHFsTTKtvzdS9AomglBpOqNlJqZkxkoCUnATukCAuQq67DOs2xsm7pbryvKXsYefT3MTuUetaEN8jNiA2FPBbhp1bIKT6UiA2jNm9Ax5TehbEBqapZJ61OEhQWIxC4JaqFoMctVKgb62hiA9bnW1JW_aAeH_oT_hyvCKmXniGMG0z4v3x_I94N69uui-I94wwSQQl9tCf7OGyvx7tt9PpN5Pf7eV4tT_3-PI2fNnSUmGpiPeXtwF_TdHkLqwfU4xTURoJcp_dFP-Wrf970HvH_gQAAP__5zabJQ)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

clean_body: We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue’s Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you’ve seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. Pop Acta Media | Republican Task Force PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |
