Fellow Conservative,

As we approach the 250th anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence, I’ve been thinking a lot about the courage of our Founding Fathers.

250 years ago, 56 patriots risked everything — their lives, their fortunes, and their sacred honor — to create the greatest country the world has ever seen. A nation founded on liberty, opportunity, and the God-given rights we still cherish today.

That same spirit of patriotism is what called me to service. **On my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after 9/11, I joined the Marine Corps and later became a Navy SEAL.** I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to defend the Constitution and the American way of life my parents taught me to love.

Today, as a proud Minnesotan running for the U.S. Senate, I’m fighting to protect that same legacy. But while Republicans continue standing for the core values that built Minnesota and America — strong families, secure borders, safe streets, free enterprise, and real opportunity — _**the Democratic Party has been overtaken by something completely unrecognizable.**_
**_
Just take a look at the photo below: _**

_[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=bdfa85cb097c4628af93a0a1ef6bd3d2&_e=hDfyk3UqFD5KAVjU5-IkSlfLgssVOf8S5NVYH_5PGEeY1Q2s4b-UblGsk9qvm0MFXy63gtCtmYTRGoNCS5D5cC2DwMtnB7g-RqQ-68SeVjDUsoRxE_FPpNZGOIF3dnqpuPpg-ixWCy2w1oLdbAsVHLEl0X_7WH8ux_MgtLqsyt9fPER_A32rX1YnRtdft_2RFztNJAwYl-eDMitNu9T1-4gt3BqeKOswcyn4F28kEP1042L5SH57sGjTMmXAuohYKMriSgyA4-RxUwGWXdf-CLslVDSvjEWxq5YompReog4k7RC23xnQVpmnHpFuOVtNg5NgjLszgFm7BF5LF2-RO_OTtRPZsBIDMQ_HjdcwYH6JXFuYSawRRmw5dPf1WVO-4PTq_itURI-sYRNstL_C96_qhJzHaNd5kDSNnAKMyzwc0Sbd9wlXM91x0UFx_ST_azcYnQ1DUwl6TPKtyFCg4jOzN_UhInzTYWEVw5gDx-zfHzBfEhRCwgtMF0jzF4-am-hkvJ8WEUKHYTaVBAgDuqUM6vjGs3TD-3mHLD5PA5kcDEFa4uv8CHfWNF5h-OdHDRNQQE4azQIxzzQzU8epPd5lGLoMCTqwt_aJ9WFdBV6VPKrgvV47udTyUThjEyZ98orzx34ZzRlvsk42Zgp2ETiJO7aPlGbcaCErzhKiWlnZq9OAW9DiPhRqgskzEiC0mMJ0fUf7M-hdXKPJPbKHj7Nypnh6gOjmDg-4DOlLBwTyc8WJeqkH-CIUNCqTKQOU)_
This is Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan, she’s my main opponent in this race. You can see here she is cosplaying as a Somali Muslim. It smells exactly like another Elizabeth Warren — cultural appropriation at its most cynical, and we don’t need another radical like that representing Minnesota in the United States Senate.

That is not the Minnesota I grew up in — playing hockey in a working-class family and learning to love this country. **It’s not the America I risked my life to defend across nine deployments. And it’s not the future any of us want for our children as we head toward America’s 250th birthday.**

My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular Minnesotan with a Master’s from Harvard, a Johns Hopkins certificate in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA — but my proudest achievement is serving our nation as a Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran to make my parents, especially my mom, proud.

[**STOP THE FAR LEFT AGENDA
**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=bdfa85cb097c4628af93a0a1ef6bd3d2&_e=hDfyk3UqFD5KAVjU5-IkSlfLgssVOf8S5NVYH_5PGEeY1Q2s4b-UblGsk9qvm0MFXy63gtCtmYTRGoNCS5D5cC2DwMtnB7g-RqQ-68SeVjDUsoRxE_FPpNZGOIF3dnqpuPpg-ixWCy2w1oLdbAsVHLEl0X_7WH8ux_MgtLqsyt9fPER_A32rX1YnRtdft_2RFztNJAwYl-eDMitNu9T1-4gt3BqeKOswcyn4F28kEP1042L5SH57sGjTMmXAuohYKMriSgyA4-RxUwGWXdf-CDmKK3KwJZ040CdYlOvz1cldHhpE0o7jl8rWtV5mcZ6pAL5IkHNOo3U-BvAahgzPK6aNTlnex7BHEekOXf5ySvdOMTtdfUiflBxkez6i1HanRnbyGrgJpAxXi9GfD7YT1DzTmajecI7zgYdRlURc6L2R6ow1OEJfe3lQQlvEbsQsFcgWtBiQ3U3tMCukSnO8m5yZNgO0Llngu1hsZ_i6iBiwRFFIrPE2LOHfbzi44e3xk65buO1vm2loTULBAogrxSjvVx972BFDvAAYjFwUw_mdj7_OG2lrq_MJ797qM_MaTKqFlAYFKGD_lEueI3TI_JfORfP1Bu4XfNGbrNIBrSBpkQvTwmBG8NIChcXxKAj_TKg15eURTzj27UJg1DEvNzWoBKhToZFsNrQ488ajv4IKyuRjsQ0lNZ7Mme3ueqWaaWGEm6nqOLUBgpdSvmUGStkrKUdqpkJoK9qE8IZqP9Jr-AbOhiArNpuwF8ap75pS)
This is just one glaring symptom of how far the Democrats have fallen. Under Walz and Flanagan, Minnesota has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent 2020 unrest in Minneapolis, defunded our police, and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and crushing inflation. While our streets burned, she pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the very officers keeping us safe.

If these radicals aren’t stopped here in Minnesota, they’ll gain unstoppable momentum to push their extreme national agenda across the country: open borders, abolishing ICE and the police, boys in girls’ sports, attacks on free enterprise, and even a growing pro-Hamas wing that rejects the very principles our Founding Fathers fought and risked everything for.

_**I’m running to stop the radical left and restore common-sense conservative values before it’s too late.**_

You can **[help me win this critical Senate seat with a gift of $25, $50, or even $100 today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=bdfa85cb097c4628af93a0a1ef6bd3d2&_e=hDfyk3UqFD5KAVjU5-IkSlfLgssVOf8S5NVYH_5PGEeY1Q2s4b-UblGsk9qvm0MFXy63gtCtmYTRGoNCS5D5cC2DwMtnB7g-RqQ-68SeVjDUsoRxE_FPpNZGOIF3dnqpuPpg-ixWCy2w1oLdbAsVHLEl0X_7WH8ux_MgtLqsyt9fPER_A32rX1YnRtdft_2RFztNJAwYl-eDMitNu9T1-4gt3BqeKOswcyn4F28kEP1042L5SH57sGjTMmXAuohYKMriSgyA4-RxUwGWXdf-COLbJM1_xC4iSxCkMYqK2BAnEahmANO9T3wt1pw-iDRIgGGutZqqzCsjFO9DJGPlevOBn394Ehk-bfRWxphfFMGjhb02II6i-HhiCfw1Scv-s7ZSrrV39EcTHxYlyyqy6vhli-qacjSARDF1z9T5FBiGwm6wnmMd6wE-giLrS-YjUREA0wJopEEE48IgxntaLVJXye8Cq_-joYjPy9cSWTg5lrdX4FETMdNqwoe0uVXkZuntvzq0_YIsQ7-SLqQ5W5LPHjbzWS1F9PN9QxL_lli60vE77d2uZCqHTOsXB7X6nOjVSp8ipL2otFnLCafzFxHjQO27HUT0CWEZBXE6pncm4PjYzCgFYpjMd9UocbZGZuwZ6ePrA9X76gMn6ARc6L0YfhHaMWbqGhN2sF35yMo_rZCWXGePjohAriKLKP4qx3vOG1ukhBpaVKdiVzafnFznTxBRk5UigsD1WO104Ps0-X6dz7dw2PZQcf11LJ91)** Every dollar goes directly into defending the principles our founders gave us and keeping Minnesota red.

Today, as a proud Minnesotan running for the U.S. Senate, I’m fighting to protect that same legacy. But while Republicans continue standing for the core values that built Minnesota and America — strong families, secure borders, safe streets, free enterprise, and real opportunity — the Democratic Party has been overtaken by something completely unrecognizable. Just take a look at the photo below: This is Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan, she’s my main opponent in this race. You can see here she is cosplaying as a Somali Muslim. It smells exactly like another Elizabeth Warren — cultural appropriation at its most cynical, and we don’t need another radical like that representing Minnesota in the United States Senate. That is not the Minnesota I grew up in — playing hockey in a working-class family and learning to love this country. It’s not the America I risked my life to defend across nine deployments. And it’s not the future any of us want for our children as we head toward America’s 250th birthday. My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular Minnesotan with a Master’s from Harvard, a Johns Hopkins certificate in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA — but my proudest achievement is serving our nation as a Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. This is just one glaring symptom of how far the Democrats have fallen. Under Walz and Flanagan, Minnesota has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent 2020 unrest in Minneapolis, defunded our police, and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and crushing inflation. While our streets burned, she pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the very officers keeping us safe. If these radicals aren’t stopped here in Minnesota, they’ll gain unstoppable momentum to push their extreme national agenda across the country: open borders, abolishing ICE and the police, boys in girls’ sports, attacks on free enterprise, and even a growing pro-Hamas wing that rejects the very principles our Founding Fathers fought and risked everything for. I’m running to stop the radical left and restore common-sense conservative values before it’s too late. You can Every dollar goes directly into defending the principles our founders gave us and keeping Minnesota red. For love of country, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. clean_body: Patriot, I'm going to say something that the mainstream media won't. And I need you to read every single word. Because at this point, Under Joe Biden, millions of illegal aliens poured across our border like water through a busted dam. They didn't just cross. They were SET UP. ✅ Fattened up with YOUR taxpayer dollars; ✅ Handed Social Security numbers like they were party favors ✅ Given driver's licenses in state after state ✅ Registered. Organized. Activated. And when Chuck Schumer gives the command? They show up to the polls like clockwork and vote for the very people who imported them. Don't take my word for it. Take TOP Trump Advisor Stephen Miller's: He's right. And the proof is already staring us in the face. The MAGA war machine launched a full-scale effort to purge illegal aliens from voter rolls across this country. And what happened? A Biden-appointed judge, Mustafa T. Kasubhai, SLAMMED THE DOOR and BLOCKED the federal government from accessing Oregon's voter data. Think about that. They import the voters. They harvest the ballots. Then they put on robes and block anyone who tries to stop them. This is the machine Chuck Schumer built. And Jon Ossoff is the man he planted in Georgia to make sure it keeps running. Georgia is ground zero. Ossoff has voted with Schumer's agenda more than 96% of the time. He's never met an open-border policy he didn't love or a voter integrity bill he didn't gut. Because clean elections are the one thing that terrifies them most. If we purge the illegal aliens from these rolls -- If we expose the fraud hiding in plain sight -- If we dig down to the bedrock of what they've built -- That's why we're not backing down. That's why I'm running for the United States Senate. And that's why I need YOU right now. We're asking patriots in every precinct across America to verify their GOP profile before 11:59 PM tonight. It shows us where our elections are secure. It shows us where we need to expand our patriot presence. And it shows the Radical Left that Georgia's firewall is alive, awake, and ready to fight. Don't be the one who throws a wrench in the gears of this machine. Verify your profile. Stand up. Be counted. Thank you, Mike Collins (R-GA) Candidate for United States Senate PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE PO BOX 6491 ATHENS, GA 30604 Hey, if you're still reading this, don't forget to follow Mike Collins for Senate on and and TEXT MIKE TO 70622 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this, please .

name: Mary Peltola
subject: [BREAKING] New poll
body:
I need you
to look at this:

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260411_2.phrdYN&refcode=em20260411-2&t=1001&akid=6048%2E582294%2ERCiBcr ]Mary Peltola: 52% Dan Sullivan: 48%

The fight for fish, family, freedom is clearly a fight worth having.
Alaskans want someone who will put Alaska first — and I will always do
that.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260411_2.phrdYN&refcode=em20260411-2&t=1002&akid=6048%2E582294%2ERCiBcr ]If you’re ready to flip Alaska, I am humbly asking you to split a
donation between Chris Pappas and my campaign for U.S. Senate today.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260411_2.phrdYN&refcode=em20260411-2&t=1003&akid=6048%2E582294%2ERCiBcr ]Contribute »

Here’s the truth:

Timing is everything, especially in a close race like this.

Everyone is watching to see if we have the resources we’ll need to turn
these polls into power — especially in a state as expensive and difficult
to campaign in as Alaska.

And when my opponent and his dark money backers see these polls and
realize that we have what it takes to win this Senate seat and take on the
rigged DC system, they’re going to spend big to try and stop us.

That’s why we need a huge number of donations today to show everyone
watching that we can and will win this fight for our future.

We only have one shot at this, so I’m counting on those of you who
understand the importance of this moment to make a donation today before
it’s too late. So I’m personally asking:

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260411_2.phrdYN&refcode=em20260411-2&t=1004&akid=6048%2E582294%2ERCiBcr ]Will you split a donation between Chris Pappas and my campaign for U.S.
Senate? No matter how much you can afford to chip in today, it all adds up
when lots of us are chipping in.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260411_2.phrdYN&amount=5&refcode=em20260411-2&t=1023&akid=6048%2E582294%2ERCiBcr ]Donate $5 »

As long as we all work together, we will win Alaska’s U.S. Senate seat.

The strength of this campaign has always come from regular people stepping
up when it counted. And it means a lot to me that so many of you have
faith in our ability to win. Together, we’re building a movement.

Thanks for being a part of it.

— Mary

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260411_2.phrdYN&refcode=em20260411-2&t=1024&akid=6048%2E582294%2ERCiBcr ]Mary Peltola

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.chrispappas.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=6048%2E582294%2ERCiBcr

| | Because you’re such a strong supporter of our pro-democracy movement, we promise to keep you posted on the latest fights where this team can make an outsized impact. Now there’s one brewing in Florida. Ron DeSantis is so confident that the Supreme Court will clear the path for states to pass new rigged voting maps that he’s already called a special state legislative session for gerrymandering. And the effects could be sweeping: new congressional district lines in Florida might hand up to five U.S. House seats to the GOP, more than enough to decide the balance of power. But this isn’t a done deal. Ron DeSantis’s scheme is a brazen attempt to cheat as far-right politicians fear huge losses at the ballot box this November.
But we’re pushing back against their dirty tactics in the Sunshine State and beyond.
Throughout the South, we’ve laid the groundwork for a new fight for fair maps. If, as expected, the Supreme Court further weakens the Voting Rights Act, an upcoming wave of racially discriminatory redistricting could swing up to 19 House seats across the South to the GOP.
But if we hold the line in Florida, we’ll send a strong message that our movement is ready to fight and win — for voting maps that reflect the will of the people.
**Every donation helps deliver victories for our democracy. In Florida right now, we’re racing to make sure people contact their lawmakers in opposition to new rigged maps, and you can help power this movement for the long haul.**
**[Will you fuel our work and defend the freedom to vote with a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129283045/613823016/-1934436445?refcode=emm_ffa_20260411_T1_FLmapsfund_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmE0ZDZmZC1kZTM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wKKBY3uxOi3a_8u1WAspsn5KwEi4c0SGNU5m3Op_Ilk=)**

Friend,

**_Woof!_ It’s me, Meatloaf. **Yes, that Meatloaf. Rescue pup, professional tail-wagger, and very proud campaign doggy for my mom, Jerri Green. Since it’s National Pet Day, I begged Mom to let me take over her email just this once. I wanted to tell you a little about how I found my forever home and why her work matters to pups like me. I was adopted from the Memphis Humane Society, where I got a second chance at life. My mom didn’t just bring me home though. She helped make sure more animals could find loving families, too. In her role on the Memphis City Council, she helped secure grant funding for the Humane Society so more dogs like me could get the care and support we need before finding our humans. And well... she couldn’t stop at just me. That’s how my cat sister Junebug joined the family. (I’m still deciding how I feel about that.) I guess that’s just who my mom is. She shows up for people and for animals. She believes every Tennessean deserves care, compassion, and a fair shot. I may be a little biased, but I think that’s exactly the kind of leadership we need. If you believe in second chances, strong communities, and leaders who care, I hope you’ll join us next week for** one of two Pups, Pints, and Postcards **events:

**Memphis-****Saturday, April 18th at 7 PM** at**Crosstown Brewery** **Nashville-****Sunday, April 19th in at 3 PM at East Nashville Beer Works** **** We’ll be writing postcards to voters, enjoying a few pints, and celebrating pups! Mom, I mean, Jerri also has a ton of other exciting events coming up that [you can find here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129283088/613823122/497682335?refcode=4.11_petday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGY4MmY1Zi1kZjM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lpt0UW07nNww-zbh0Qr9bDDyuIEBvfaFpAn5cjlcBd4=&emci=644e2c4d-a335-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=b0f82f5f-df35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=53531271). **Thanks for being part of this pack.**
Tail wags and gratitude,

Proud Pup
Jerri Green For Tennessee Governor

name: Jasmine Singh
subject: One conversation changed my mind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Molder for Congress
body:
And I haven't looked back.

| | | | |
---
Hey Peter, I want to tell you why I'm here. When I took this job as Chaz's campaign manager, people asked me why this race, why TN-5. And the answer was pretty simple. Because I've seen what Andy Ogles does: the Twitter rants, the inflammatory comments, the constant need to make himself the story instead of doing the job.**And then I met Chaz, and I knew we could flip this seat.** Not because of national attention, although we have that now, too, but because the contrast speaks for itself. On one side, you have a congressman who treats the job like a platform for getting attention. On the other, you have a mayor who's spent years doing the work quietly, balancing budgets, listening to his neighbors, and leading without the theatrics. People in TN-5 know the difference. They live it every day. That's why this race was named red-to-blue, that's why more people are paying attention, and that's why I'm confident about where this is headed. But confidence doesn't win elections: resources do. ### About Chaz Molder
Chaz Molder is the Mayor of Columbia, Tennessee, serving since 2019 and re-elected in 2022. A Columbia native and graduate of the University of Tennessee and the University of Memphis Law School, he returned home to build a career in law and public service. clean_body: And I haven't looked back. | | | | | Hey Peter, I want to tell you why I'm here. When I took this job as Chaz's campaign manager, people asked me why this race, why TN-5. And the answer was pretty simple. Because I've seen what Andy Ogles does: the Twitter rants, the inflammatory comments, the constant need to make himself the story instead of doing the job.And then I met Chaz, and I knew we could flip this seat. Not because of national attention, although we have that now, too, but because the contrast speaks for itself. On one side, you have a congressman who treats the job like a platform for getting attention. On the other, you have a mayor who's spent years doing the work quietly, balancing budgets, listening to his neighbors, and leading without the theatrics. People in TN-5 know the difference. They live it every day. That's why this race was named red-to-blue, that's why more people are paying attention, and that's why I'm confident about where this is headed. But confidence doesn't win elections: resources do. ~~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | ~~ I came here because I believe in this campaign. I hope you do, too. — Jasmine Singh Campaign Manager, Molder for Congress | | ---|---|--- About Chaz Molder Chaz Molder is the Mayor of Columbia, Tennessee, serving since 2019 and re-elected in 2022. A Columbia native and graduate of the University of Tennessee and the University of Memphis Law School, he returned home to build a career in law and public service. As mayor, he founded the Columbia Mayor’s Youth Council to promote civic engagement among young people and emphasizes the importance of being present and responsive to the community. | | | ~~ Click~~ to receive fewer emails. Follow Chaz | ~ | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Molder for Congress Molder for CongressPO Box 1468Columbia, TN 38402United States www.chazmolder.com "Website"

| | Peter,
---
| | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...

Peter, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth.

He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth...

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal.

Peter, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage.

These are the very things Charlie gave his life for.

May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God...

A stronger love for your family...

And a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. Peter, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Peter, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Jen Kiggans
subject: Blossom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
People often ask...how did I get that name?

| | | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| | That's a picture of me from when I flew H-46 and H-3 helicopters in the U.S. Navy. If you look to my left, you can see my call sign...**Blossom**.

People often ask...how did I get that name?

Well, my roommate in flight school and I went on a bit of a "girl power" kick one day and bought old bathtub non-skid flower stickers from the store, cut out that flower shape in reflective tape from our squadron, and stuck those reflective flowers on our helmets.

There is very little room for making a Navy flight suit more "feminine," but on cruise we were able to be a little more creative and came to love those girly flowers on our helmets.

Although the helicopter community doesn't use call signs as much as some of the fixed wing squadrons, the "Blossom" stuck and was painted on the side of a CH-46 for part of my first cruise. Made for a great photo and story!

It was my experience in the Navy that helped instill in me the importance of service.

Far too often, our elected officials today forget that their job is to SERVE. They think it is their job to tell everyone what to do and why everyone else is wrong....but that's not service.

As a Navy veteran and nurse practitioner, I got so frustrated and decided to run for Congress because I wanted to actually SERVE my country and my community.

**While for some it is all about power, for me it is all about _service_.**

Sadly, this has made me some enemies in Washington.

No one is going to buy me off or tell me what to do...I'm going to keep serving the people I represent, not serve some "master" in Washington, D.C.

If you are also tired of leaders who care more about power than service, [**I 'm asking you to send me some help today.**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)

Because I'm a veteran and not a career politician, I need all the help I can get to support my fight against the Democrats.
---
| | [ RUSH SUPPORT TO JEN](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._S7Ie4A)
---
| | I know this was a longer message than you are probably used to getting, but I want you to know where I'm coming from and why I need your help. Whether it's $100 or just $10, anything you can contribute will help this Navy veteran keep fighting back business as usual in D.C.

It's time we support leaders who truly want to serve our country, and that's what I promise to always do...are you with me, Peter?

With the courage to fight,
---
| | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| | -Jen

---
| | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
I would not be where I am today without the help of my incredible and faithful supporters like you. Because of your support, I can keep fighting to make our country stronger.

Together we will get our country back on the right track and secure America's success!
---
[ SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-Sw)
---
| |
---
| | Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
---

USE OF MILITARY IMAGES OR RANK DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE U.S. DEPT. OF DEFENSE OR THE U.S. NAVY

Virginia Beach, VA 23471

---

name: Tobias Read
subject: We can’t let President Trump get away with this
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260411em-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260411em-rs]
We’re now hearing reports that President Donald Trump is considering an executive order declaring a so-called “emergency” to seize greater federal authority over elections.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260411em-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260411em-rs]
FIGHT BACK [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260411em-rs]
This is deeply alarming to say the least.
But you don’t have to take my word for it: Our founders were explicit about this. They had just fought a king. They understood that concentrating too much power in one person was dangerous. That’s why the Constitution divides authority and states administer elections.
That’s why no president — no matter how loud or how desperate — gets to override the system because he’s afraid of losing.
As Oregon’s Secretary of State, I oversee our elections. I take an oath to the Constitution — not to any president. And I will stand up to any administration that tries to abuse emergency powers to interfere with Oregon’s voting systems or intimidate our election workers.
But I need your help to keep up the fight in light of Trump’s illegal actions, which is why I’m reaching out today. Can I count on you to join me in this fight against President Trump’s lawlessness by chipping in $5, $10, or more right away? Communicating this threat to Oregonians statewide requires resources. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260411em-rs]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260411em-rs]
We’ve already beaten back federal overreach in court before. When attempts were made to stretch authority beyond its limits, Oregon pushed back — and won.
If we have to do it again, we will.
But defending democracy requires a strong grassroots team prepared to meet the fight head-on — and that’s where you come in.
If you believe, as I do, that no president should be able to manufacture an emergency to grab control over elections, I’m asking you to stand with me. Please contribute today to help us protect Oregon’s elections and hold President Trump accountable before it’s too late. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260411em-rs]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260411em-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260411em-rs]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: =?utf-8?B?V2lubmllIEJlc2hlYXIgKG9mZmljaWFsIGdvb2Rlc3QgcHVwIG9mIEtl?= =?utf-8?B?bnR1Y2t54oSi77iPKQ==?=
subject: It's my day but I'm sharing the spotlight (brave)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
BREAKING: Winnie approves of this human
Hi Peter, it's Winnie! 🐾 [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129283924/613825751/57398372?refcode=em26_260411_winnie_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260411_winnie_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a92e3d72-e335-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTkyZTNkNzItZTMzNS1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=W6oFN1sqx6UAGCNNCSPtY9_qF9Q6ONQP_Mpc_Xv3aHQ=) Yes, _that Winnie._

First Pup of Kentucky, professional Good Girl, and official judge of human character (unpaid, but highly accurate). And yes, in case you were wondering, I actually am writing this myself (my dad is probably going to have to get a new keyboard after this one, I can only do so much with paws and no fingers).

Anyways — **today is National Pet Day, which means I should _technically_ be focused on myself.** My naps. My walks. My treats. And I am doing all of those things, don't worry. But I also felt it was important to share something I've learned in my line of work: dogs are the best judges of character. We don't care about speeches or headlines. We care about who shows up, who's kind, and who remembers where the treat drawer is. And I can confirm: **Andy Beshear is a very good dad.**

I've been observing him closely from my important office position (his chair), and I've reached a firm conclusion. He works hard for Kentucky families, and not just in the "looks good in photos" way — in the real, everyday way that actually matters. He's focused on helping people across the state and beyond, bringing good jobs and opportunities home, and trying to make things a little steadier for families who need it most. Honestly, it's impressive (almost as impressive as my ability to hear a treat bag open from a different zip code).

So even though today is supposed to be about me _(and I would like to reiterate that point for the record),_ I want to do something for him. Because good humans deserve support—and because I have decided he is worth sharing my National Pet Day attention with. **Which is saying a lot.** [**If you can, donate today to support Andy's group, In This Together PAC. They're working to support good candidates and causes that put people first—focusing on families, fairness, and making sure leadership actually helps the people it's supposed to serve.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129283925/613825752/57398372?refcode=em26_260411_winnie_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260411_winnie_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a92e3d72-e335-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTkyZTNkNzItZTMzNS1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=W6oFN1sqx6UAGCNNCSPtY9_qF9Q6ONQP_Mpc_Xv3aHQ=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129283926/613825753/57398372?refcode=em26_260411_winnie_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260411_winnie_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a92e3d72-e335-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTkyZTNkNzItZTMzNS1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=W6oFN1sqx6UAGCNNCSPtY9_qF9Q6ONQP_Mpc_Xv3aHQ=) I'm personally endorsing this message. clean_body: BREAKING: Winnie approves of this human Hi Peter, it's Winnie! 🐾 = Yes, that Winnie. First Pup of Kentucky, professional Good Girl, and official judge of human character (unpaid, but highly accurate). And yes, in case you were wondering, I actually am writing this myself (my dad is probably going to have to get a new keyboard after this one, I can only do so much with paws and no fingers). Anyways — today is National Pet Day, which means I should technically be focused on myself. My naps. My walks. My treats. And I am doing all of those things, don't worry. But I also felt it was important to share something I've learned in my line of work: dogs are the best judges of character. We don't care about speeches or headlines. We care about who shows up, who's kind, and who remembers where the treat drawer is. And I can confirm: Andy Beshear is a very good dad. I've been observing him closely from my important office position (his chair), and I've reached a firm conclusion. He works hard for Kentucky families, and not just in the "looks good in photos" way — in the real, everyday way that actually matters. He's focused on helping people across the state and beyond, bringing good jobs and opportunities home, and trying to make things a little steadier for families who need it most. Honestly, it's impressive (almost as impressive as my ability to hear a treat bag open from a different zip code). So even though today is supposed to be about me (and I would like to reiterate that point for the record), I want to do something for him. Because good humans deserve support—and because I have decided he is worth sharing my National Pet Day attention with. Which is saying a lot. = = I'm personally endorsing this message. I would use a stamp if I had thumbs. I do not. So this email will have to do. I know you're going to make my dad so proud! Winnie Beshear 🐾 First Dog of Kentucky | | Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. name: Robert Garcia
subject: Pete Hegseth thinks he can get away with this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129284036/613826079/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODY0NjRkOC1lNDM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGtx7zphh8jejVjhQW5QP0Y6c7f2MM9DvwOT_Ich0cg=)
New reports suggest that Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth may have tried to profit off the very war he helped oversee — **with attempts to invest in defense companies just *weeks* before military action in Iran began.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129284037/613826080/789508428?refcode=260411_RG_re-hegseth-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODY0NjRkOC1lNDM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGtx7zphh8jejVjhQW5QP0Y6c7f2MM9DvwOT_Ich0cg=)
Let that sink in: While American troops were being put in harm’s way and families braced for the consequences of another war, someone at the highest levels of government may have been trying to cash in.
If true, this isn’t just corruption — it’s a national security threat. Because decisions about war and peace should NEVER be influenced by personal financial gain.
That’s why I’m taking action.
Today, we’re launching a formal investigation into these reports. We will follow the facts, demand answers, and hold anyone accountable who thought they could profit off this moment.
But let me be clear: this won’t be easy. The same people who got us into this mess will try to shut down this investigation. They’ll deflect, deny, and hope the public moves on.
**[We can’t let that happen. If we’re going to uncover the truth and hold the powerful accountable, I need your support right now. So please, can you chip in today to help us demand accountability?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129284038/613826081/-309737922?refcode=260411_RG_re-hegseth-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODY0NjRkOC1lNDM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGtx7zphh8jejVjhQW5QP0Y6c7f2MM9DvwOT_Ich0cg=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129284039/613826082/-309737922?refcode=260411_RG_re-hegseth-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODY0NjRkOC1lNDM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGtx7zphh8jejVjhQW5QP0Y6c7f2MM9DvwOT_Ich0cg=)
Thank you,
Robert Garcia
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129284040/613826083/-309737922?refcode=260411_RG_re-hegseth-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODY0NjRkOC1lNDM1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGtx7zphh8jejVjhQW5QP0Y6c7f2MM9DvwOT_Ich0cg=)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: The GOP is spending $79 million to defeat me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend, I need to fill you in.

**National Republicans just released their targets for the midterms, and Ohio was #1 on their list. They’re planning to flood our state with $79 MILLION worth of attack ads to defeat me.**

That means we’ll need more resources to fight back earlier than we thought. So I sat down with my finance team, and we set a **$100,000 emergency goal** so we can launch our own TV and digital ads sooner and reach voters before the GOP’s spending spree starts.

[So I’m personally asking: Will you split $10 between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help us get there?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106782?t=6&akid=23605%2E878179%2E1PKRHo)

I don’t make requests like this lightly. But this may be the biggest moment of our campaign so far.

Thousands of people have joined this grassroots team, and I am so humbled to have you on board, too. We’re building historic momentum, and it’s terrifying to the corporate special interests and billionaires who want to keep my opponent in power.

**But we can’t slow down now. Because if we don’t have the resources to fend off their ad blitz, the GOP could tip the balance of this race and completely drown us out.**

This team has never let me down before, which is why I’m coming to you now. [Please, if you have a few dollars to spare, I really need you to chip in to my campaign and the Voter Protection Project so we can handle whatever comes next.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106782?t=7&akid=23605%2E878179%2E1PKRHo) If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106783?t=8&akid=23605%2E878179%2E1PKRHo)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106782?t=12&akid=23605%2E878179%2E1PKRHo)
Thank you so much – for everything.

Sherrod
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=23605%2E878179%2E1PKRHo). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=23605%2E878179%2E1PKRHo).**

They’re planning to flood our state with $79 MILLION worth of attack ads to defeat me. That means we’ll need more resources to fight back earlier than we thought. So I sat down with my finance team, and we set a $100,000 emergency goal so we can launch our own TV and digital ads sooner and reach voters before the GOP’s spending spree starts. I don’t make requests like this lightly. But this may be the biggest moment of our campaign so far. Thousands of people have joined this grassroots team, and I am so humbled to have you on board, too. We’re building historic momentum, and it’s terrifying to the corporate special interests and billionaires who want to keep my opponent in power. But we can’t slow down now. Because if we don’t have the resources to fend off their ad blitz, the GOP could tip the balance of this race and completely drown us out. This team has never let me down before, which is why I’m coming to you now. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately: | Thank you so much – for everything. Sherrod 878179 | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. Click here to . | |

* * *
****Did you know Amazon is so obsessed with its obscene profits that they’ve basically banned workers from calling 911? It’s true. Instead of letting a dying worker call actual paramedics, Amazon forces them to wait for “Amcare” - an internal wellness department that sounds like it was named by George Orwell himself. The Labor Force tells us these "wellness" experts can take 20+ minutes to arrive. In the time it takes Amazon to acknowledge a heart attack, Jeff Bezos has probably made another $5 million, but the worker? They’re out of time. Why the delay? Maybe because a Senate investigation found Amazon warehouses are _twice as dangerous_ as their competitors, and 911 calls are pesky things that show up in public records. _At Cedar Key Progress, we don't just ask for justice - we demand it, especially when a multi-billion-dollar corporate behemoth starts acting like a villain. We support candidates who actually give a damn about workers' rights._ **[Join Cedar Key Progress and sign our petition: Tell Amazon to stop playing doctor and let workers call 911. subject: Should DC be a state?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
WaPo Opinion: D.C. statehood is a voting rights issue [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/WaPo_DC_Statehood_VotingRights.png]
If Washington, D.C. was a state, the U.S. Senate would look different and the landscape for critical legislation would definitely be altered. While it doesn't have the square mileage of other states, D.C. would actually be ahead of Wyoming and Vermont in terms of population ( according to the 2020 census ).
We want to hear from 73 more voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: Your $5 donation vs. Greg Abbott’s $106 million warchest
body:
Your $5 will go a long way.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
**$5, Peter.**
$5 is the exact amount I’m asking you to [**chip in to my campaign**](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260411_2_hpc.qijW3-&refcode=em20260411-902&amount=5&t=1&akid=902%2E299639%2El8em5G). Let me explain why:
$5 will help power a campaign that can take on Greg Abbott and his $106 million warchest, and actually compete statewide.
$5 will help us build the grassroots infrastructure and hire the organizers we need to reach voters across Texas and make the case for new leadership.
And $5 will help us run our ads across the state about a different kind of politics — one focused on results, accountability, and real solutions for working families.
**[If you’re with me in this fight for Texas, I hope you’ll pitch in $5 right now.](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260411_2_hpc.qijW3-&refcode=em20260411-902&amount=5&t=2&akid=902%2E299639%2El8em5G)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260411_2_hpc.qijW3-&amount=5&refcode=em20260411-902&t=21&akid=902%2E299639%2El8em5G)
With gratitude,
Gina

| | **Ilhan Omar celebrates the deaths of slain Americans and Jews.** _**She’s a sick, racist, USA-hating RADICAL.**_ [**I want her OUT, and I need _YOUR_ HELP to make it happen.**](https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor//pkg0836-ag2357-email-eml-fls?xuna=v1%3AeyJhZ3kiOiIwMjkiLCJhc2siOiIwMDEiLCJjbGkiOiIwODciLCJpc3MiOiIwMDEiLCJtZWQiOiJlbWFpbCIsInBrZyI6IlBLRzA4MzYiLCJzdXIiOiIwMDAiLCJ3byI6IkFHMjM1NyJ9&recurring=true&amount=26&xuno=464c3238383435&utm_medium=email&utm_term=ionian&xunv=ionian&xutm=02015101) **Peter** , it’s Nancy Mace. I’m disgusted by Ilhan Omar. Instead of condemning the loss of innocent lives, _she** ****DEFENDS** **political violence** and **CHEERS** for the deaths of those she disagrees with.__ _ Time and time again, we’ve heard her **_disgusting, disrespectful_ rhetoric about Jewish Americans.** **We’ve seen her side with MENTALLY ILL TRANNIES and __stay silent__ when men in mini skirts shoot up Christian schools.** **It couldn’t be clearer: She HATES America, and she HATES patriots like you and me.** This isn’t just a matter of Left vs. Right anymore. **It’s a battle for _good vs. evil._** **_And I truly believe in my heart that Ilhan Omar wants to see our republic crumble._**
---
[ **REMOVE ILHAN OMAR FROM HER COMMITTEES** ](https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor//pkg0836-ag2357-email-eml-fls?xuna=v1%3AeyJhZ3kiOiIwMjkiLCJhc2siOiIwMDEiLCJjbGkiOiIwODciLCJpc3MiOiIwMDEiLCJtZWQiOiJlbWFpbCIsInBrZyI6IlBLRzA4MzYiLCJzdXIiOiIwMDAiLCJ3byI6IkFHMjM1NyJ9&recurring=true&amount=26&xuno=464c3238383435&utm_medium=email&utm_term=ionian&xunv=ionian&xutm=02015101)
---
Ilhan Omar doesn’t deserve a seat at the table in Congress. We know that. **But kicking her out is going to be an uphill battle that requires a _TON_ of Republican momentum.** **I need 50,000 signatures from patriots like YOU to help BOOT RADICAL Ilhan Omar off her committees ****_FOR GOOD._** [**Peter, if you agree with me, will you add your name before MIDNIGHT?**](https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor//pkg0836-ag2357-email-eml-fls?xuna=v1%3AeyJhZ3kiOiIwMjkiLCJhc2siOiIwMDEiLCJjbGkiOiIwODciLCJpc3MiOiIwMDEiLCJtZWQiOiJlbWFpbCIsInBrZyI6IlBLRzA4MzYiLCJzdXIiOiIwMDAiLCJ3byI6IkFHMjM1NyJ9&recurring=true&amount=26&xuno=464c3238383435&utm_medium=email&utm_term=ionian&xunv=ionian&xutm=02015101) _I only have **24 hours** to prove the American people are on board with Omar’s complete removal._
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION RIGHT NOW** ](https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor//pkg0836-ag2357-email-eml-fls?xuna=v1%3AeyJhZ3kiOiIwMjkiLCJhc2siOiIwMDEiLCJjbGkiOiIwODciLCJpc3MiOiIwMDEiLCJtZWQiOiJlbWFpbCIsInBrZyI6IlBLRzA4MzYiLCJzdXIiOiIwMDAiLCJ3byI6IkFHMjM1NyJ9&recurring=true&amount=26&xuno=464c3238383435&utm_medium=email&utm_term=ionian&xunv=ionian&xutm=02015101)

| | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.
---

name: Alex
subject: Why I’m in this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
Hello, [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
Like so many of you, I’ve been watching what’s happening in our country — and I keep coming back to one core belief that no one is above the law. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
Not politicians. Not the rich. Not anyone in power. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
Right now, it may feel like accountability is slipping away. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
You see people in Washington breaking rules, pushing the limits, and acting as if there will never be consequences. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
That’s one of the reasons I’m running for Congress — to help restore accountability, rebuild trust, and make sure our government works the way it’s supposed to. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
I’m asking you to stand with me today so we can make sure our future is built on accountability, in the rule of law, and in a government that answers to the people. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $20 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak?amount=20&express_lane=true] DONATE $50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak?amount=50&express_lane=true]
DONATE $75 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak?amount=75&express_lane=true] DONATE $100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak?amount=100&express_lane=true]
DONATE $250 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak?amount=250&express_lane=true] OTHER AMOUNT » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
And even if federal power is used to shield people today, that doesn’t mean they will be protected forever. State laws still apply. Future Congresses still have authority. And the truth has a way of catching up.
But we don’t get there unless we win.
Alex

name: Team Cooper
subject: President Trump is attacking your ability to vote by mail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund and authorized by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Do you agree that we need to protect vote by mail?
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=1008%2E124072%2ERFndZN)
| | | |
---
Peter, as President Trump attacks your ability to vote by mail, check out this enraging headline:
| | **NBC NEWS:**
**Trump explains why he cast a mail ballot in Florida's election: 'Because I'm president'**
---
President Trump has called mail-in voting "mail-in cheating" and just signed an executive order making it harder for Americans to vote by mail.
It's no wonder why the president and his allies are attacking voting rights: They want to stop you from holding them accountable at the ballot box for their disastrous agenda.
**Now more than ever, we need leaders like Roy Cooper in the Senate who aren't afraid to stand up to President Trump and protect our fundamental right to vote. But he needs to know if you're with him in this fight, Peter.**
**[Please, will you sign our new petition to OPPOSE President Trump's relentless attacks on vote-by-mail?](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/vbm-petition-2026-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=jtk257-su-nd&t=8&akid=1008%2E124072%2ERFndZN)**

Team Cooper

Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m the #1 Target of Senate Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Here’s the latest.
Peter, I need to fill you in.
**National Republicans just released their targets for the midterms, and Ohio was #1 on their list. They’re planning to flood our state with $79 MILLION worth of attack ads to defeat me.**
That means we’ll need more resources to fight back earlier than we thought. So I sat down with my finance team, and we set a **$100,000 emergency goal** so we can launch our own TV and digital ads sooner and reach voters before the GOP’s spending spree starts.
**[So I’m personally asking: Will you split $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us get there?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102690?refcode=em20260411-10293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=10&t=1&akid=10293%2E614464%2EnT_qvT)**
I don’t make requests like this lightly, Peter. But this may be the biggest moment of our campaign so far.
Thousands of people have joined this grassroots team, and I am so humbled to have you on board, too. We’re building historic momentum, and it’s terrifying to the corporate special interests and billionaires who want to keep my opponent in power.
**But we can’t slow down now. Because if we don’t have the resources to fend off their ad blitz, the GOP could tip the balance of this race and completely drown us out.**
This team has never let me down before, which is why I’m coming to you now. **[Please, if you have a few dollars to spare, I really need you to chip in to my campaign and Heartland Patriots so we can handle whatever comes next.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102690?refcode=em20260411-10293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10293%2E614464%2EnT_qvT)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102691?refcode=em20260411-10293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=10293%2E614464%2EnT_qvT) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102691?refcode=em20260411-10293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=10293%2E614464%2EnT_qvT) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102691?refcode=em20260411-10293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=10293%2E614464%2EnT_qvT) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102691?refcode=em20260411-10293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=10293%2E614464%2EnT_qvT) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102691?refcode=em20260411-10293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=10293%2E614464%2EnT_qvT) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102691?refcode=em20260411-10293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=10293%2E614464%2EnT_qvT) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102690?refcode=em20260411-10293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=10293%2E614464%2EnT_qvT)

name: Sarah McBride
subject: I am sick and tired of Republican politicians telling us not to believe our “lying” eyes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I’m fighting like hell to protect Delawareans, defend this seat, and support Democrats in red-to-blue congressional races across the country.
# [](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1269?t=1&akid=3092%2E21716%2EN_JAIB)
I am sick and tired of Republican politicians telling us not to believe our “lying” eyes.
I am sick and tired of Republican politicians telling us we should take Donald Trump figuratively, not literally.
I am sick and tired of Republican politicians telling us just to suck it up and get over it every single time this president does something that is unprecedented, harmful, insulting, and dangerous.
**We _need_ to pull the emergency brake on Donald Trump and his Republican enablers, and it’ll only happen if Democrats take back the U.S. House this November.**
That’s why I’m fighting like hell to protect Delawareans, defend this seat, and support Democrats in red-to-blue congressional races across the country.
I don’t rely on right-wing billionaires to fund our campaign. I count on your support.
[**With less than 7 months until Election Day, will you chip in $5 to help defeat Trump’s Republican cronies in the U.S. House and win back the majority?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260411-1.z7Avus&refcode=em20260411-3092&amount=5&t=2&akid=3092%2E21716%2EN_JAIB)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260411-1.z7Avus&amount=5&refcode=em20260411-3092&t=21&akid=3092%2E21716%2EN_JAIB)**
Thank you,
Sarah

clean_body: I’m fighting like hell to protect Delawareans, defend this seat, and support Democrats in red-to-blue congressional races across the country. I am sick and tired of Republican politicians telling us not to believe our “lying” eyes. I am sick and tired of Republican politicians telling us we should take Donald Trump figuratively, not literally. I am sick and tired of Republican politicians telling us just to suck it up and get over it every single time this president does something that is unprecedented, harmful, insulting, and dangerous. We need to pull the emergency brake on Donald Trump and his Republican enablers, and it’ll only happen if Democrats take back the U.S. House this November. That’s why I’m fighting like hell to protect Delawareans, defend this seat, and support Democrats in red-to-blue congressional races across the country. I don’t rely on right-wing billionaires to fund our campaign. I count on your support. Thank you, Sarah

The Dallas sports landscape officially welcomed a new chapter this week as the Dallas Pulse captured the first home win in franchise history. On the surface, it was a single victory early in a young season. In reality, it felt much bigger than that.
This win marked a foundational moment not just for the Pulse as an organization but for the continued rise of women's volleyball at the professional level.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.f2UWzangB4J0Qzp8aBNQeYXMhqef-FPjiBDY6mqpfco?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=193920925)
Women's sports are in the middle of a measurable shift. Viewership numbers are climbing, sponsorship dollars are following, and media coverage is expanding beyond novelty into sustained investment. Volleyball, in particular, is emerging as one of the fastest-growing sports in the country.
At the high school level, the growth is undeniable. Gymnasiums are packed. Club programs are expanding rapidly. College recruiters are more visible than ever. The talent pipeline is deep, competitive, and national in scope. From what I am seeing firsthand, volleyball is not only growing. It is accelerating.
That trajectory is beginning to translate at the professional level.
While the WNBA continues to benefit from strategic support and visibility through the NBA, volleyball is building momentum from the ground up. Its grassroots participation, regional loyalty, and consistent yearlong engagement give it a unique advantage. Based on current trends in youth participation, attendance, and fan engagement, it is reasonable to believe that professional volleyball could surpass the WNBA in viewership in the near future.
The Dallas Pulse are positioned perfectly within that movement.
Dallas is a volleyball city. North Texas consistently produces elite athletes, nationally ranked programs, and passionate fan bases. A professional team anchored in this region is not an experiment. It is a natural progression.
That is why this first home win matters.
It represents proof of concept. It validates the market. It signals to fans, sponsors, and young athletes watching from the stands that professional volleyball in Dallas is here to stay.
At Heartland Journal, we will be watching closely. More importantly, we will be covering this growth intentionally. Our vision has always been to highlight stories at the intersection of sports, culture, and community, and women's volleyball sits squarely at that crossroads.
The Dallas Pulse's first home victory will not be remembered simply as a win in the standings. It will be remembered as the beginning of something larger. A signal that women's volleyball is no longer on the horizon.
It has arrived.
Andre Calder
CEO

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. name: Deb Haaland
subject: Hey, it’s Deb – let me tell you why I love to cook
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
Cooking has always been a way for me to foster connection and build community.

| | |
---
Hey, there — it’s Deb.
One thing you should know about me is that**I love to cook.**
My love of cooking New Mexican cuisine started early, thanks to the hours I spent watching my grandmother bake bread in her mud oven and stir huge pots of posole. She wouldn’t let us kids in the kitchen while she cooked, but I’d perch myself outside and watch her through the window for hours. I still hold those memories close as I prepare my favorite traditional New Mexican dishes.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7938?refcode=jtk557-fr-nd&t=1&akid=8899%2E400544%2ENojdN9) _New Mexico chiles — the best in the world!_
**There’s something powerful about connecting with others over a home-cooked meal.** When I was in law school at UNM, I’d make chicken green chile stew for student gatherings, and I made that same dish for my congressional colleagues during the 2019 winter holiday season. I even cooked chile and tortillas for the water protectors when I traveled to Standing Rock during the protests against the Dakota Access Pipeline.
Cooking became more than a hobby after I decided to start my own salsa business. I worked out of a commercial kitchen and bought my red chile pequin from a farm in northern New Mexico. I’d prepare my salsa and deliver jars to mom-and-pop shops across the state, often with my child Somáh riding with me in the back seat.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7938?refcode=jtk557-fr-nd&t=2&akid=8899%2E400544%2ENojdN9) _Here’s Somáh posing with jars of my homemade salsa. Kids in New Mexico start early ... 🌶️_
**For me, cooking has always been a way to foster connection and build community, which is exactly what we’re doing now as we grow our campaign for New Mexico.** I’ve had the chance to sit down with New Mexicans in living rooms and at kitchen tables to hear about their lives, their struggles, and their hopes for the future. Every conversation is another reminder of the incredibly high stakes in this race – and proof that if we organize around our shared values, we win.
[**Will you donate $5 to power our grassroots campaign? If you donate through this link, I’ll even send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole — one of my favorite dishes to make during the holiday season!**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7944?refcode=jtk557-fr-nd&t=3&akid=8899%2E400544%2ENojdN9)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7939?refcode=jtk557-fr-nd&t=4&akid=8899%2E400544%2ENojdN9)
---
| | [Donate $35](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7940?refcode=jtk557-fr-nd&t=5&akid=8899%2E400544%2ENojdN9)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7941?refcode=jtk557-fr-nd&t=6&akid=8899%2E400544%2ENojdN9)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7938?refcode=jtk557-fr-nd&t=7&akid=8899%2E400544%2ENojdN9)
---
Happy cooking,

Deb 🌶️
P.S. Throughout my life, cooking has helped me bring my community together – and bringing people together is exactly how we’ll win this campaign. [**If you make a donation of any amount through this link, I’ll be sure to send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole so you can cook it for your friends and family.**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7938?refcode=jtk557-fr-nd&t=8&akid=8899%2E400544%2ENojdN9)
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7942?refcode=jtk557-fr-nd&t=9&akid=8899%2E400544%2ENojdN9)

name: Team Scalise
subject: (5) Missed Messages from JD Vance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
His message will expire at midnight
| Hi, it's Justin from Team Scalise.
Vice President JD Vance has been trying to reach you but hasn't heard back from you. He's asked us to pass along his message to as many Patriots as possible, and you've made the cut!
After you read his final memo, you can call it a day.
\- Justin Team Scalise

That's because EVERYTHING comes down to the midterm elections. If the Democrats win back control of Congress, everything we've worked so hard for comes to a SCREECHING HALT!

body:
