name: Jasmine Clark
subject: A scientific voice in Congress…for once
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Clark for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260411em-scientific-fr-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260411em-scientific-fr-rs]
I’m Jasmine Clark — microbiologist, Emory professor, mom, and your Democratic State Representative in the Georgia General Assembly.
Now, I’m running to represent Georgia’s 13th district in the U.S. House of Representatives because I believe it’s time we had a scientific voice representing us in Congress.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260411em-scientific-fr-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260411em-scientific-fr-rs]
I’ve proudly stood as a scientific voice in the Georgia State House since 2019, defending our democracy, reproductive rights, and public health.
But today, I’m asking you to help me take these values even further.
Can you chip in $10, $25, or more to help me bring a new generation of leadership to GA-13 and the halls of Congress? I’d be so grateful for whatever you can spare. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260411em-scientific-fr-rs]
DONATE NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260411em-scientific-fr-rs]
In Georgia, I’ve worked tirelessly to:
* Advance equitable access to healthcare and strengthen protections for reproductive rights.
* Provide oversight of public health and ensure the collection of accurate data, especially during the pandemic, when truth was under attack.
* Give voice to working families, immigrants, and communities too often ignored by Washington.
Now, I’m working to bring that kind of people-powered, results-oriented leadership to Washington as your next representative in Georgia’s 13th District.
But I can’t get the job done alone, so I’m asking you personally to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today. Your support builds grassroots power — and puts the future of Georgia’s 13th District back in the people’s hands. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260411em-scientific-fr-rs]
Thank you,
Dr. Jasmine Clark
Democratic Candidate for Georgia's 13th District

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Closer than it looks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03132026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03132026]
Peter ,
Ten days.
That's what's left before Virginia voters decide whether to redraw a congressional map that could flip four Republican House seats and reshape the battle for the House majority.
JD Vance’s billionaire mentor just spent $2.5 million trying to make sure that doesn't happen – on ads so dishonest that the state Attorney General called them voter suppression. Early voting is open right now, so the window to fight back is closing.
Ten days is enough time to win this, but not if we wait.
Donate before April 21 → https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em04112026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em04112026]
– GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03132026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03132026]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

**The quiet work of the last two years could be erased in months.**

**The team Charlie Kirk built is carrying the mission forward without missing a beat.**
**[Every dollar you give](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e15243221/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy90cHBhY19kb25fc2JfdHJzcl9hZy12c19icl8yMDI2MDQxMS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MTE/LbmNsWE1BU3JRTA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MDQwM2VtMyZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjgwMF93cjE/gadrJ7g/s4m0723d112)** to Turning Point PAC supports these proven programs: ballot chasing that actually moves votes and direct support for the candidates who will protect the gains we made in 2024.

As permitted by law, TPPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Please, allow me to try and convince you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek Ramaswamy and Rob McColley for Ohio

** And we can FLIP seats in these states!
[4 seats. That is all we need to take back the majority. So please, chip in $4 _(triple ‐matched to $12)_ to flip 4 GOP seats _BLUE_ and win back a majority >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/23079?amount=4&t=18&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=7&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-FD-20260411-MapAlert-4DollarstoFlip4Seatsv2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260411-MapAlert-4DollarstoFlip4Seatsv2-ETG-sl1&akid=23426%2E9716520%2EQn7pAv)**

But think about what happens when we combine your $4 with the donations of other dedicated supporters in all 50 states. It makes a real difference ‐‐ **_especially right now:_**

We're facing a _critical_ fundraising deadline TONIGHT, and we need your _immediate_ support if we want to hit our $35,000 goal to beat the GOP's megadonors. **$4, that's all we're asking for.**

**[We can flip the 4 states we need to take back the majority, but only with people like you on our side! Trump knows he doesn't have the numbers to expand his MAGA agenda across the country, and that's why he's recently called on the GOP to nationalize elections and attack voting rights. Chrissy Houlahan will always stand up to anyone who attacks our communities. clean_body: | | | Every single day, you’re flooded with texts, emails, pop-ups — all begging you to sign something, take a survey, or chip in a few bucks to “stop the Democrats.” And what actually happens? Nothing. > The same “Republicans” cave. > Elections aren’t protected. > The spending explodes. > The deportations stop. And the people paying the price — you — are flat-out ignored. These politicians take your hard-earned money, and then turn around and protect the same corrupt system they promised to destroy. They don’t respect you. They don’t fear you. And they certainly don’t fight for you. JOIN MY TEAM - DONATE $1 My name is Diego Morales. I’m a husband, father, Army and National Guard veteran, and member of the Northside Christian Church. Imay be from Guatemala,but I’m an AMERICAN first. My family immigrated here LEGALLY because we understand you don’t just enter someone’s home without knocking... And you certainly don’t show up without an invitation. America is a nation of laws. JOIN MY TEAM - DONATE $1 Truth is, it makes me sick watching “Republicans” placate to the Democrats. It makes me sick watching them talk a big game about “America First” and then go right back to cutting crooked deals with the Swamp. Because at the end of the day, Peter, I know it's Americans like YOU who are living with the consequences. Now, I don’t go around making a ton of promises, Peter... So I’d like to strike a deal with you instead. ✔ NEVER stop telling the truth ✔ NEVER stop fighting the ideologies destroying this country; and ✔ NEVER sell you out — not for power, not for access, not for money. America is worth fighting for. I know you’d be a GREAT addition to the team. JOIN MY TEAM - DONATE $1 God Bless America, Diego Morales Republican Secretary of State (IN) P.S. Peter, it makes me sick seeing politicians sell you out and then turn around and ask for your hard-earned money and support. I refuse to go down that path. You deserve better. P.P.S. No empty promises. Just a simple ask: Thank you in advance for your patriotism and support. name: Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: Over $22 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260411-476&t=2&akid=476%2E12592%2ESTev9T)
****
We need to be clear about what’s happening right now in Virginia.
Republicans and their allies have already poured **more than $22 million** in MAGA dark money into this race, and they’re flooding the Commonwealth with misleading ads and misinformation about the redistricting amendment.
_They’re not spending that kind of money by accident._
They’re doing it because they know this amendment would stop Trump’s power grabs and protect Virginia voters.
So they’re trying to confuse people. It’s why they’re flooding the Commonwealth with mailers comparing the redistricting amendment to Jim Crow (_seriously!_).
And the truth is: **if we go silent now, their message is the only one voters will hear.**
That’s why keeping our YES campaign ads on the air isn’t optional, it’s essential.
Our ads are how we:
* **Cut through the misinformation**

* **Reach voters across the Commonwealth**

* **Explain what this amendment actually does, and why it matters**

[**But staying on air takes real resources, can we count on you to chip in $3 today to help us keep our ads running and make sure voters hear the truth?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260411_2.lPArYb&amount=3&refcode=20260411-476&t=3&akid=476%2E12592%2ESTev9T)
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260411_2.lPArYb&amount=3&refcode=20260411-476&t=22&akid=476%2E12592%2ESTev9T)**
This moment is bigger than any single ad or any single day.
It’s about whether voters get clear, honest information or whether MAGA money and misinformation drown everything out.
_Virginia voters deserve the truth, and with your help, we can make sure they hear it._
Thank you for being part of this,
Virginians for Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=23&refcode2=476_12592_STev9T&akid=476%2E12592%2ESTev9T)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=476%2E12592%2ESTev9T)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/update-contact-information/?&t=25&akid=476%2E12592%2ESTev9T)
* [Unsubscribe](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=476%2E12592%2ESTev9T)

Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
Contributions or gifts to Virginians for Fair Elections are not tax deductible.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Our plan...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
A bold, aggressive strategic plan to end Trump's Senate majority...
| | | It's Senator Schiff.

When I first became a DSCC Vice Chair, we promised a bold, aggressive strategic plan to _end_ Trump's Senate majority. Not long ago, our team unveiled that plan ‐‐ and it's a simple one:

**Defend Georgia, Michigan, and New Hampshire** ‐‐ our three most endangered Democratic seats.

**Flip 4 out of 6 Republican ‐held seats** among Alaska, Iowa, Maine, North Carolina, Ohio, and Texas.

In other words, if we hold our own seats and win just **_one better than break‐even_** among the most vulnerable Republican‐held seats... **we flip the Senate.**

I don't want to make it sound easy, because it's not. But it is _essential_ if we ever want to put a real check on Donald Trump.

**As a Vice Chair of the DSCC, I'm confident this is the plan that will win a Democratic Senate, rein in Trump and his out ‐of‐control administration, and give us the best chance of still having a Democracy when Trump is long gone. Now we need your help to put this plan into action. **

**[If you believe in the power of this grassroots team, please pitch in $7 to the DSCC TODAY to flip the four out of six seats we need to flip the Senate blue. The election year is here, and we can't waste a single minute >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/23065?amount=7&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=7&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-FD-20260411-AdamSchiff-ViceChairsBGMap1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260411-AdamSchiff-ViceChairsBGMap1-Pros-sl1&akid=23414%2E9716520%2ER3Szgl)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Adam

Adam Schiff has represented the people of California at the state, congressional, and senatorial level for over 25 years. As a congressman, he worked to hold Trump accountable, and he continues that work as a member of the United States Senate.
_**[Will you join Adam Schiff in the fight to stop Donald Trump's agenda by flipping the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/23065?amount=7&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=7&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-FD-20260411-AdamSchiff-ViceChairsBGMap1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260411-AdamSchiff-ViceChairsBGMap1-Pros-sl1&akid=23414%2E9716520%2ER3Szgl)**_

name: Annie Andrews
subject: Tylenol does NOT cause autism…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
I'm a pediatrician. I’m pissed. I’m scared. And I need your help to defeat Lindsey Graham in the U.S. Senate.
I’m not the “monsters-under-the-bed” kind of scared. I’m the “I’ve watched children suffer from preventable illness and injury while politicians do absolutely nothing” kind of scared.
I’ve treated kids who’ve been shot. Kids whose families struggle to afford their medications.
Kids who live with mold that causes asthma attacks, miss school for climate disasters, and watch politicians use them as political pawns.
And now? Trump is causing chaos and Lindsey Graham is right by his side.
And Medicaid — the program that keeps half our pediatric patients insured, healthy, and...alive — is on the chopping block to pay for tax breaks for billionaires.
So yeah, I never planned to run for Senate.
But I’m scared. I’m pissed. I’m motivated. And I’m 100% in.
I’m running for Senate in South Carolina to defeat Lindsey Graham and to fight for the kids no one in D.C. seems to be thinking about. So I need you with me.

I’m running because the issues I care about — children’s healthcare, vaccines, gun violence, public education, Social Security, Medicaid and Medicare — are under direct attack right now.
And I’m running because I consider it my professional duty as a pediatrician — to give children a strong voice at the national level. Too many are comfortable on the sidelines. That won’t work for me.
We need bold leaders who aren’t afraid to fight. I am ready.
Even though the path will be hard, I know Lindsey Graham must be held accountable. He certainly doesn’t deserve a free pass back to D.C. for six more years.
That’s why I’m running for US Senate. To defeat Trump’s lapdog and fight for everyday Americans. But, I need your support today. name: The Democrats
subject: Something you might not know:
body:
---
Derek, You’ve probably heard about the lavish fundraisers and parties behind the GOP’s massive midterm war chest — with gaudy themes, luxurious venues, and _million-dollar-a-pop tickets_. You might have also wondered how Democrats plan to compete with the kind of cash advantage that can be compiled when you’re raking in millions of dollars in one night. We have a simple answer to that question: **You** are our plan. It might surprise you to hear, but more than **90%** of the DNC’s funding comes from contributions from grassroots supporters _just like you_ , chipping in what they can, when they can, to support a cause that matters to them. **In fact, our average online donation is just $31.67.** If everyone receiving this email matched that $31.67 contribution, we’d raise almost a _fifth_ of the war chest MAGA came into 2026 with. If everyone gave double that, we’d be close to 40%. _From just one email_. **So even though it will take a lot of work and a massive grassroots effort, we _can_ compete with the billionaire-backed GOP. We just need your help.** But the truth is that not everyone receiving this email will give, and many won’t even read it. So it’s critical for us to ask while we have you here: [**If this work matters to you, please chip in $7 to the DNC today. We will put your donation to work immediately to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot, across the country — this November and beyond.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?refcode=em_20260411_6656_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6656_22930333_nKBJR9&akid=6656%2E22930333%2EnKBJR9) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260411_6656_fr&refcode2=6656_22930333_nKBJR9&akid=6656%2E22930333%2EnKBJR9)**
